  3355	@v2_packs_router.patch("/{pack_name}", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  3356	def update_pack(
  3357	    pack_name: str,
  3358	    request: UpdatePackRequest = Body(...),
  3359	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  3360	):
  3361	    """
  3362	    Update pack metadata.
  3363	
  3364	    Supports partial updates - only provided fields are updated.
  3365	    Handles: description, user_tags, tags, cover_url, author, version, etc.
  3366	    Also supports pack renaming via the 'name' field.
  3367	    """
  3368	    try:
  3369	        pack = store.get_pack(pack_name)
  3370	        updated_name = pack_name
  3371	        updated_fields = []
  3372	
  3373	        # Update description (HTML content)
  3374	        if request.description is not None:
  3375	            pack.description = request.description
  3376	            updated_fields.append("description")
  3377	
  3378	        # Update user_tags
  3379	        if request.user_tags is not None:
  3380	            pack.user_tags = request.user_tags
  3381	            updated_fields.append("user_tags")
  3382	
  3383	        # Update tags
  3384	        if request.tags is not None:
  3385	            pack.tags = request.tags
  3386	            updated_fields.append("tags")
  3387	
  3388	        # Update cover_url
  3389	        if request.cover_url is not None:
  3390	            pack.cover_url = request.cover_url
  3391	            updated_fields.append("cover_url")
  3392	
  3393	        # Update author
  3394	        if request.author is not None:
  3395	            pack.author = request.author
  3396	            updated_fields.append("author")
  3397	
  3398	        # Update version
  3399	        if request.version is not None:
  3400	            pack.version = request.version
  3401	            updated_fields.append("version")
  3402	
  3403	        # Update trigger_words
  3404	        if request.trigger_words is not None:
  3405	            pack.trigger_words = request.trigger_words
  3406	            updated_fields.append("trigger_words")
  3407	
  3408	        # Update base_model
  3409	        if request.base_model is not None:
  3410	            pack.base_model = request.base_model
  3411	            updated_fields.append("base_model")
  3412	
  3413	        # Handle rename (must be last to avoid path issues)
  3414	        if request.name and request.name != pack_name:
  3415	            new_name = request.name
  3416	            # Check if new name exists
  3417	            try:
  3418	                store.get_pack(new_name)
  3419	                raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=f"Pack with name '{new_name}' already exists")
  3420	            except PackNotFoundError:
  3421	                pass  # Good - doesn't exist
  3422	
  3423	            # Rename pack directory
  3424	            old_path = store.layout.pack_path(pack_name)
  3425	            new_path = old_path.parent / new_name
  3426	            if old_path.exists():
  3427	                import shutil
  3428	                shutil.move(str(old_path), str(new_path))
  3429	
  3430	            pack.name = new_name
  3431	            updated_name = new_name
  3432	            updated_fields.append("name")
  3433	
  3434	        store.layout.save_pack(pack)
  3435	
  3436	        logger.info(f"[update_pack] Updated {pack_name}: {updated_fields}")
  3437	
  3438	        return {
  3439	            "success": True,
  3440	            "name": pack.name,
  3441	            "updated_fields": updated_fields,
  3442	        }
  3443	    except HTTPException:
  3444	        raise
  3445	    except Exception as e:
  3446	        logger.error(f"[update_pack] Error: {e}")
  3447	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
  3448	
  3449	
  3450	# Note: repair-urls removed in v2.0.5 - use reimport from Civitai instead
  3451	
  3452	
  3453	@v2_packs_router.get("/{pack_name}/parameters", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  3454	def get_pack_parameters(
  3455	    pack_name: str,
  3456	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  3457	):
  3458	    """Get recommended generation parameters for pack.
  3459	    
  3460	    Parameters are stored in pack.json under 'parameters' field.
  3461	    """
  3462	    try:
  3463	        pack = store.get_pack(pack_name)
  3464	        
  3465	        # Get parameters from pack.json
  3466	        if pack.parameters:
  3467	            return pack.parameters.model_dump(exclude_none=True)
  3468	        
  3469	        # Return defaults based on pack type
  3470	        defaults = {
  3471	            "sampler": "euler",
  3472	            "scheduler": "normal",
  3473	            "steps": 20,
  3474	            "cfg_scale": 7.0,
  3475	            "width": 512,
  3476	            "height": 768,
  3477	        }
  3478	        
  3479	        # Adjust defaults based on pack type
  3480	        if pack.pack_type == AssetKind.CHECKPOINT:
  3481	            defaults["width"] = 1024
  3482	            defaults["height"] = 1024
  3483	        elif pack.pack_type == AssetKind.LORA:
  3484	            defaults["steps"] = 25
  3485	            
  3486	        return defaults
  3487	    except Exception as e:
  3488	        logger.error(f"[get_pack_parameters] Error: {e}")
  3489	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
  3490	
  3491	
  3492	@v2_packs_router.patch("/{pack_name}/parameters", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  3493	def update_pack_parameters(
  3494	    pack_name: str,
  3495	    parameters: Dict[str, Any] = Body(...),
  3496	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  3497	):
  3498	    """Update recommended generation parameters.
  3499	    
  3500	    Parameters are stored in pack.json under 'parameters' field.
  3501	    Converts camelCase keys to snake_case for consistency.
  3502	    """
  3503	    try:
  3504	        pack = store.get_pack(pack_name)
  3505	        
  3506	        # Convert camelCase to snake_case for consistency
  3507	        import re
  3508	        def camel_to_snake(name: str) -> str:
  3509	            name = re.sub('(.)([A-Z][a-z]+)', r'\1_\2', name)
  3510	            return re.sub('([a-z0-9])([A-Z])', r'\1_\2', name).lower()
  3511	        
  3512	        converted = {camel_to_snake(k): v for k, v in parameters.items()}
  3513	        
  3514	        # Get existing parameters or create new
  3515	        existing = {}
  3516	        if pack.parameters:
  3517	            existing = pack.parameters.model_dump(exclude_none=True)
  3518	        
  3519	        # Merge new parameters into existing
  3520	        existing.update(converted)
  3521	        
  3522	        # Update pack
  3523	        from .models import GenerationParameters
  3524	        pack.parameters = GenerationParameters(**existing)
  3525	        
  3526	        # Save pack
  3527	        store.layout.save_pack(pack)
  3528	        
  3529	        logger.info(f"[update-parameters] Pack: {pack_name}, Parameters: {existing}")
  3530	
  3531	        return {"updated": True, "parameters": existing}
  3532	    except Exception as e:
  3533	        logger.error(f"[update-parameters] Error: {e}")
  3534	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
  3535	
  3536	
  3537	class ExtractParametersRequest(BaseModel):
  3538	    """Request for parameter extraction from various sources."""
  3539	    source: str = Field(..., description="Source type: 'image', 'aggregated', or 'description'")
  3540	    image_index: Optional[int] = Field(None, description="Image index for source='image'")
  3541	
  3542	
  3543	class ExtractParametersResponse(BaseModel):
  3544	    """Response with extracted parameters."""
  3545	    parameters: Dict[str, Any]
  3546	    source: str
  3547	    confidence: Optional[float] = None
  3548	    preview_count: Optional[int] = None
  3549	
  3550	
  3551	@v2_packs_router.post("/{pack_name}/parameters/extract", response_model=ExtractParametersResponse)
  3552	def extract_pack_parameters(
  3553	    pack_name: str,
  3554	    request: ExtractParametersRequest,
  3555	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  3556	):
  3557	    """Extract generation parameters from pack previews or description.
  3558	
  3559	    Sources:
  3560	    - 'image': Extract from specific preview image metadata (requires image_index)
  3561	    - 'aggregated': Aggregate from all preview images with metadata
  3562	    - 'description': Parse pack description for recommended parameters
  3563	
  3564	    Returns extracted parameters with confidence score for aggregated results.
  3565	    """
  3566	    from ..utils.parameter_extractor import (
  3567	        extract_from_image_meta,
  3568	        aggregate_from_previews,
  3569	        extract_from_description,
  3570	    )
  3571	
  3572	    try:
  3573	        pack = store.get_pack(pack_name)
  3574	
  3575	        if request.source == 'image':
  3576	            # Extract from specific preview image
  3577	            if request.image_index is None:
  3578	                raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="image_index required for source='image'")
  3579	
  3580	            if request.image_index < 0 or request.image_index >= len(pack.previews):
  3581	                raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=f"Invalid image_index: {request.image_index}")
  3582	
  3583	            preview = pack.previews[request.image_index]
  3584	            if not preview.meta:
  3585	                return ExtractParametersResponse(
  3586	                    parameters={},
  3587	                    source='image',
  3588	                    confidence=0.0,
  3589	                )
  3590	
  3591	            result = extract_from_image_meta(preview.meta)
  3592	            return ExtractParametersResponse(
  3593	                parameters=result.parameters,
  3594	                source='image',
  3595	                confidence=result.confidence,
  3596	            )
  3597	
  3598	        elif request.source == 'aggregated':
  3599	            # Aggregate from all previews with metadata
  3600	            previews_with_meta = [
  3601	                {'meta': p.meta}
  3602	                for p in pack.previews
  3603	                if p.meta
  3604	            ]
  3605	
  3606	            if not previews_with_meta:
  3607	                return ExtractParametersResponse(
  3608	                    parameters={},
  3609	                    source='aggregated',
  3610	                    confidence=0.0,
  3611	                    preview_count=0,
  3612	                )
  3613	
  3614	            result = aggregate_from_previews(previews_with_meta)
  3615	            return ExtractParametersResponse(
  3616	                parameters=result.parameters,
  3617	                source='aggregated',
  3618	                confidence=result.confidence,
  3619	                preview_count=len(previews_with_meta),
  3620	            )
  3621	
  3622	        elif request.source == 'description':
  3623	            # Extract from pack description using AI service
  3624	            if not pack.description:
  3625	                return ExtractParametersResponse(
  3626	                    parameters={},
  3627	                    source='description',
  3628	                    confidence=0.0,
  3629	                )
  3630	
  3631	            from src.avatar.ai_service import AvatarAIService
  3632	
  3633	            ai_service = AvatarAIService()
  3634	            ai_result = ai_service.extract_parameters(pack.description)
  3635	
  3636	            if ai_result.success and ai_result.output:
  3637	                # Normalize AI output using GenerationParameters validator
  3638	                # This converts AI formats like {recommended: 7} to plain values
  3639	                try:
  3640	                    normalized = GenerationParameters(**ai_result.output)
  3641	                    # Get normalized dict, excluding None values and _extracted_by
  3642	                    params = {
  3643	                        k: v for k, v in normalized.model_dump(exclude_none=True).items()
  3644	                        if k != "_extracted_by"
  3645	                    }
  3646	                except Exception as e:
  3647	                    logger.warning(f"[extract-parameters] Normalization failed: {e}, using raw output")
  3648	                    params = {k: v for k, v in ai_result.output.items() if k != "_extracted_by"}
  3649	
  3650	                return ExtractParametersResponse(
  3651	                    parameters=params,
  3652	                    source=f'description:{ai_result.provider_id}',  # Include provider info
  3653	                    confidence=1.0 if ai_result.provider_id != "rule_based" else 0.8,
  3654	                )
  3655	            else:
  3656	                return ExtractParametersResponse(
  3657	                    parameters={},
  3658	                    source='description',
  3659	                    confidence=0.0,
  3660	                )
  3661	
  3662	        else:
  3663	            raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=f"Invalid source: {request.source}")
  3664	
  3665	    except HTTPException:
  3666	        raise
  3667	    except Exception as e:
  3668	        logger.error(f"[extract-parameters] Error: {e}")
  3669	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
  3670	
  3671	
  3672	# =============================================================================
  3673	# Preview Endpoints
  3674	# =============================================================================
  3675	
  3676	
  3677	class PreviewOrderRequest(BaseModel):
  3678	    """Request to reorder previews."""
  3679	    order: List[str]  # List of filenames in new order
  3680	
  3681	
  3682	@v2_packs_router.patch("/{pack_name}/previews", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  3683	def batch_update_previews(
  3684	    pack_name: str,
  3685	    files: List[UploadFile] = File(default=[]),
  3686	    order: Optional[str] = Form(None),  # JSON array of filenames
  3687	    cover_filename: Optional[str] = Form(None),
  3688	    deleted: Optional[str] = Form(None),  # JSON array of filenames to delete
  3689	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  3690	):
  3691	    """
  3692	    Batch update previews in a single transaction.
  3693	
  3694	    Handles upload, delete, reorder, and cover change atomically.
  3695	    This prevents race conditions from multiple parallel requests.
  3696	
  3697	    Form fields:
  3698	    - files: New files to upload (multipart)
  3699	    - order: JSON array of filenames in desired order
  3700	    - cover_filename: Filename to set as cover
  3701	    - deleted: JSON array of filenames to delete
  3702	    """
  3703	    import json
  3704	    from .models import PreviewInfo
  3705	
  3706	    try:
  3707	        pack = store.get_pack(pack_name)
  3708	        previews_dir = store.layout.pack_previews_path(pack_name)
  3709	        previews_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
  3710	
  3711	        results = {
  3712	            "uploaded": [],
  3713	            "deleted": [],
  3714	            "reordered": False,
  3715	            "cover_changed": False,
  3716	        }
  3717	
  3718	        # 1. Delete specified previews
  3719	        if deleted:
  3720	            deleted_list = json.loads(deleted)
  3721	            for filename in deleted_list:
  3722	                # Remove from pack.previews
  3723	                pack.previews = [p for p in pack.previews if p.filename != filename]
  3724	                # Delete file
  3725	                file_path = previews_dir / filename
  3726	                if file_path.exists():
  3727	                    file_path.unlink()
  3728	                results["deleted"].append(filename)
  3729	                logger.info(f"[batch_update_previews] Deleted: {filename}")
  3730	
  3731	        # 2. Upload new files
  3732	        allowed_extensions = {'.jpg', '.jpeg', '.png', '.gif', '.webp', '.mp4', '.webm'}
  3733	        for file in files:
  3734	            ext = Path(file.filename).suffix.lower()
  3735	            if ext not in allowed_extensions:
  3736	                logger.warning(f"[batch_update_previews] Skipping unsupported file: {file.filename}")
  3737	                continue
  3738	
  3739	            media_type = 'video' if ext in {'.mp4', '.webm'} else 'image'
  3740	            dest_path = previews_dir / file.filename
  3741	            content = file.file.read()
  3742	            dest_path.write_bytes(content)
  3743	
  3744	            preview = PreviewInfo(
  3745	                filename=file.filename,
  3746	                url=f"/previews/{pack_name}/resources/previews/{file.filename}",
  3747	                media_type=media_type,
  3748	                nsfw=False,
  3749	            )
  3750	            pack.previews.append(preview)
  3751	            results["uploaded"].append(file.filename)
  3752	            logger.info(f"[batch_update_previews] Uploaded: {file.filename}")
  3753	
  3754	        # 3. Reorder previews
  3755	        if order:
  3756	            order_list = json.loads(order)
  3757	            preview_map = {p.filename: p for p in pack.previews}
  3758	            new_previews = []
  3759	
  3760	            # Add in specified order
  3761	            for filename in order_list:
  3762	                if filename in preview_map:
  3763	                    new_previews.append(preview_map.pop(filename))
  3764	
  3765	            # Append any remaining
  3766	            new_previews.extend(preview_map.values())
  3767	            pack.previews = new_previews
  3768	            results["reordered"] = True
  3769	            logger.info(f"[batch_update_previews] Reordered {len(new_previews)} previews")
  3770	
  3771	        # 4. Set cover
  3772	        if cover_filename:
  3773	            for p in pack.previews:
  3774	                if p.filename == cover_filename:
  3775	                    pack.cover_url = p.url
  3776	                    results["cover_changed"] = True
  3777	                    logger.info(f"[batch_update_previews] Set cover: {cover_filename}")
  3778	                    break
  3779	
  3780	        # Single atomic save
  3781	        store.layout.save_pack(pack)
  3782	
  3783	        return {
  3784	            "success": True,
  3785	            "pack_name": pack_name,
  3786	            **results,
  3787	            "total_previews": len(pack.previews),
  3788	        }
  3789	    except Exception as e:
  3790	        logger.error(f"[batch_update_previews] Error: {e}")
  3791	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
  3792	
  3793	
  3794	@v2_packs_router.post("/{pack_name}/previews/upload", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  3795	def upload_preview(
  3796	    pack_name: str,
  3797	    file: UploadFile = File(...),
  3798	    position: int = Form(-1),  # -1 = append at end
  3799	    nsfw: bool = Form(False),
  3800	    set_as_cover: bool = Form(False),
  3801	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  3802	):
  3803	    """
  3804	    Upload a preview image or video to a pack.
  3805	
  3806	    Supports jpg, png, gif, webp, mp4, webm.
  3807	    Position -1 appends at end, 0 inserts at beginning.
  3808	    """
  3809	    from .models import PreviewInfo
  3810	
  3811	    try:
  3812	        pack = store.get_pack(pack_name)
  3813	
  3814	        # Validate file type
  3815	        allowed_extensions = {'.jpg', '.jpeg', '.png', '.gif', '.webp', '.mp4', '.webm'}
  3816	        ext = Path(file.filename).suffix.lower()
  3817	        if ext not in allowed_extensions:
  3818	            raise HTTPException(
  3819	                status_code=400,
  3820	                detail=f"Unsupported file type: {ext}. Allowed: {', '.join(allowed_extensions)}"

exec
/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba src/store/api.py | sed -n '3820,4300p'" in /home/box/git/github/synapse
 succeeded in 0ms:
  3820	                detail=f"Unsupported file type: {ext}. Allowed: {', '.join(allowed_extensions)}"
  3821	            )
  3822	
  3823	        # Determine media type
  3824	        media_type = 'video' if ext in {'.mp4', '.webm'} else 'image'
  3825	
  3826	        # Save file to previews directory
  3827	        previews_dir = store.layout.pack_previews_path(pack_name)
  3828	        previews_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
  3829	
  3830	        dest_path = previews_dir / file.filename
  3831	        content = file.file.read()
  3832	        dest_path.write_bytes(content)
  3833	
  3834	        # Create preview info
  3835	        preview = PreviewInfo(
  3836	            filename=file.filename,
  3837	            url=f"/previews/{pack_name}/resources/previews/{file.filename}",
  3838	            media_type=media_type,
  3839	            nsfw=nsfw,
  3840	        )
  3841	
  3842	        # Insert at position
  3843	        if position < 0 or position >= len(pack.previews):
  3844	            pack.previews.append(preview)
  3845	        else:
  3846	            pack.previews.insert(position, preview)
  3847	
  3848	        # Set as cover if requested
  3849	        if set_as_cover:
  3850	            pack.cover_url = preview.url
  3851	
  3852	        store.layout.save_pack(pack)
  3853	
  3854	        logger.info(f"[upload_preview] Added {file.filename} to {pack_name}")
  3855	
  3856	        return {
  3857	            "success": True,
  3858	            "filename": file.filename,
  3859	            "media_type": media_type,
  3860	            "position": position if position >= 0 else len(pack.previews) - 1,
  3861	            "is_cover": set_as_cover,
  3862	        }
  3863	    except HTTPException:
  3864	        raise
  3865	    except Exception as e:
  3866	        logger.error(f"[upload_preview] Error: {e}")
  3867	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
  3868	
  3869	
  3870	@v2_packs_router.get("/{pack_name}/previews", response_model=List[Dict[str, Any]])
  3871	def list_pack_previews(
  3872	    pack_name: str,
  3873	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  3874	):
  3875	    """List all previews for a pack with metadata."""
  3876	    try:
  3877	        pack = store.get_pack(pack_name)
  3878	        previews = []
  3879	
  3880	        for i, preview in enumerate(pack.previews):
  3881	            is_cover = (
  3882	                pack.cover_url == preview.url if pack.cover_url
  3883	                else i == 0  # First preview is default cover
  3884	            )
  3885	            previews.append({
  3886	                "filename": preview.filename,
  3887	                "url": preview.url,
  3888	                "media_type": preview.media_type,
  3889	                "width": preview.width,
  3890	                "height": preview.height,
  3891	                "nsfw": preview.nsfw,
  3892	                "is_cover": is_cover,
  3893	                "meta": preview.meta,
  3894	                "duration": preview.duration,
  3895	                "has_audio": preview.has_audio,
  3896	                "thumbnail_url": preview.thumbnail_url,
  3897	            })
  3898	
  3899	        return previews
  3900	    except Exception as e:
  3901	        logger.error(f"[list_previews] Error: {e}")
  3902	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
  3903	
  3904	
  3905	@v2_packs_router.patch("/{pack_name}/previews/order", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  3906	def reorder_previews(
  3907	    pack_name: str,
  3908	    request: PreviewOrderRequest,
  3909	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  3910	):
  3911	    """
  3912	    Reorder previews for a pack.
  3913	
  3914	    The order list should contain filenames in the desired order.
  3915	    Filenames not in the list will be appended at the end.
  3916	    """
  3917	    try:
  3918	        pack = store.get_pack(pack_name)
  3919	
  3920	        # Create a map of filename -> preview
  3921	        preview_map = {p.filename: p for p in pack.previews}
  3922	
  3923	        # Build new order
  3924	        new_previews = []
  3925	        for filename in request.order:
  3926	            if filename in preview_map:
  3927	                new_previews.append(preview_map.pop(filename))
  3928	
  3929	        # Append any remaining previews not in the order
  3930	        new_previews.extend(preview_map.values())
  3931	
  3932	        pack.previews = new_previews
  3933	        store.layout.save_pack(pack)
  3934	
  3935	        logger.info(f"[reorder_previews] Reordered {len(new_previews)} previews for {pack_name}")
  3936	
  3937	        return {
  3938	            "success": True,
  3939	            "count": len(new_previews),
  3940	            "order": [p.filename for p in new_previews],
  3941	        }
  3942	    except Exception as e:
  3943	        logger.error(f"[reorder_previews] Error: {e}")
  3944	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
  3945	
  3946	
  3947	@v2_packs_router.patch("/{pack_name}/previews/{filename}/cover", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  3948	def set_cover_preview(
  3949	    pack_name: str,
  3950	    filename: str,
  3951	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  3952	):
  3953	    """Set a specific preview as the pack cover image."""
  3954	    try:
  3955	        pack = store.get_pack(pack_name)
  3956	
  3957	        # Find the preview
  3958	        preview = None
  3959	        for p in pack.previews:
  3960	            if p.filename == filename:
  3961	                preview = p
  3962	                break
  3963	
  3964	        if not preview:
  3965	            raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"Preview not found: {filename}")
  3966	
  3967	        # Set cover_url to the preview's URL
  3968	        pack.cover_url = preview.url
  3969	        store.layout.save_pack(pack)
  3970	
  3971	        logger.info(f"[set_cover] Set cover for {pack_name}: {filename}")
  3972	
  3973	        return {
  3974	            "success": True,
  3975	            "cover_url": pack.cover_url,
  3976	            "filename": filename,
  3977	        }
  3978	    except HTTPException:
  3979	        raise
  3980	    except Exception as e:
  3981	        logger.error(f"[set_cover] Error: {e}")
  3982	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
  3983

  3985	@v2_packs_router.delete("/{pack_name}/previews/{filename}", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  3986	def delete_preview(
  3987	    pack_name: str,
  3988	    filename: str,
  3989	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  3990	):
  3991	    """
  3992	    Delete a preview from a pack.
  3993	
  3994	    Removes both the file and the entry from pack.json.
  3995	    If this was the cover, cover_url will be cleared.
  3996	    """
  3997	    try:
  3998	        pack = store.get_pack(pack_name)
  3999	
  4000	        # Find and remove the preview from the list
  4001	        original_count = len(pack.previews)
  4002	        removed_preview = None
  4003	        for p in pack.previews:
  4004	            if p.filename == filename:
  4005	                removed_preview = p
  4006	                break
  4007	
  4008	        if not removed_preview:
  4009	            raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"Preview not found: {filename}")
  4010	
  4011	        pack.previews = [p for p in pack.previews if p.filename != filename]
  4012	
  4013	        # Clear cover_url if this was the cover
  4014	        if pack.cover_url and removed_preview.url == pack.cover_url:
  4015	            pack.cover_url = None
  4016	
  4017	        # Delete the file if it exists locally
  4018	        previews_dir = store.layout.pack_previews_path(pack_name)
  4019	        preview_file = previews_dir / filename
  4020	        if preview_file.exists():
  4021	            preview_file.unlink()
  4022	            logger.info(f"[delete_preview] Deleted file: {preview_file}")
  4023	
  4024	        store.layout.save_pack(pack)
  4025	
  4026	        logger.info(f"[delete_preview] Removed preview {filename} from {pack_name}")
  4027	
  4028	        return {
  4029	            "success": True,
  4030	            "deleted": filename,
  4031	            "remaining_count": len(pack.previews),
  4032	        }
  4033	    except HTTPException:
  4034	        raise
  4035	    except Exception as e:
  4036	        logger.error(f"[delete_preview] Error: {e}")
  4037	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
  4038	
  4039	
  4040	# =============================================================================
  4041	# Workflow Endpoints

  4043	
  4044	@v2_packs_router.get("/{pack_name}/workflows", response_model=List[Dict[str, Any]])
  4045	def list_pack_workflows(
  4046	    pack_name: str,
  4047	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  4048	):
  4049	    """List workflows for a pack."""
  4050	    try:
  4051	        workflows_dir = store.layout.pack_workflows_path(pack_name)
  4052	        
  4053	        workflows = []
  4054	        if workflows_dir.exists():
  4055	            for f in sorted(workflows_dir.glob("*.json")):
  4056	                workflows.append({
  4057	                    "name": f.stem,
  4058	                    "filename": f.name,
  4059	                    "local_path": str(f),
  4060	                    "is_default": f.stem == "default",
  4061	                })
  4062	        
  4063	        return workflows
  4064	    except Exception as e:
  4065	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
  4066	
  4067	
  4068	@v2_packs_router.post("/{pack_name}/generate-workflow", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  4069	def generate_pack_workflow(
  4070	    pack_name: str,
  4071	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  4072	):
  4073	    """Generate a default workflow for pack based on pack type and parameters."""
  4074	    import json
  4075	    
  4076	    try:
  4077	        # Load pack
  4078	        pack_dir = store.layout.pack_path(pack_name)
  4079	        pack_json = pack_dir / "pack.json"
  4080	        
  4081	        if not pack_json.exists():
  4082	            raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"Pack not found: {pack_name}")
  4083	        
  4084	        from .models import Pack
  4085	        pack = Pack.model_validate_json(pack_json.read_text())
  4086	        
  4087	        # Detect architecture from base_model
  4088	        architecture = _detect_architecture(pack)
  4089	        
  4090	        # Get checkpoint and lora dependencies
  4091	        checkpoint_dep = None
  4092	        lora_deps = []
  4093	        
  4094	        for dep in pack.dependencies:
  4095	            if dep.kind == AssetKind.CHECKPOINT:
  4096	                checkpoint_dep = dep
  4097	            elif dep.kind == AssetKind.LORA:
  4098	                lora_deps.append(dep)
  4099	        
  4100	        # Build workflow
  4101	        workflow = _build_v2_workflow(
  4102	            pack=pack,
  4103	            architecture=architecture,
  4104	            checkpoint_dep=checkpoint_dep,
  4105	            lora_deps=lora_deps,
  4106	        )
  4107	        
  4108	        # Save workflow file
  4109	        workflows_dir = store.layout.pack_workflows_path(pack_name)
  4110	        workflows_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
  4111	        
  4112	        safe_name = pack_name.replace("[", "_").replace("]", "_").replace(" ", "_")
  4113	        workflow_filename = f"default_{safe_name}.json"
  4114	        workflow_path = workflows_dir / workflow_filename
  4115	        
  4116	        with open(workflow_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
  4117	            json.dump(workflow, f, indent=2)
  4118	        
  4119	        # Add workflow info to pack.json
  4120	        workflow_info = WorkflowInfo(
  4121	            name=f"Default - {pack.name}",
  4122	            filename=workflow_filename,
  4123	            description="Auto-generated default workflow based on pack parameters",
  4124	            is_default=True,
  4125	        )
  4126	        
  4127	        # Remove existing default workflows
  4128	        pack.workflows = [w for w in pack.workflows if not w.is_default]
  4129	        pack.workflows.append(workflow_info)
  4130	        
  4131	        # Save pack.json
  4132	        with open(pack_json, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
  4133	            f.write(pack.model_dump_json(indent=2, by_alias=True, exclude_none=True))
  4134	        
  4135	        logger.info(f"[generate-workflow] Generated: {workflow_filename} for {pack_name}")
  4136	        
  4137	        return {
  4138	            "generated": True,
  4139	            "message": "Default workflow generated successfully",
  4140	            "workflow_filename": workflow_filename,
  4141	            "pack_name": pack_name,
  4142	        }
  4143	        
  4144	    except HTTPException:
  4145	        raise
  4146	    except Exception as e:
  4147	        logger.exception(f"[generate-workflow] Error: {e}")
  4148	        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=str(e))
  4149	
  4150	
  4151	def _detect_architecture(pack) -> str:
  4152	    """Detect architecture from pack's base model."""
  4153	    BASE_MODEL_ARCHITECTURE = {
  4154	        "SD 1.5": "sd15",
  4155	        "SD 1.4": "sd15",
  4156	        "SD 2.0": "sd20",
  4157	        "SD 2.1": "sd21",
  4158	        "SDXL 1.0": "sdxl",
  4159	        "SDXL": "sdxl",
  4160	        "SDXL Turbo": "sdxl",
  4161	        "SDXL Lightning": "sdxl",
  4162	        "Pony": "sdxl",
  4163	        "Illustrious": "sdxl",
  4164	        "NoobAI": "sdxl",
  4165	        "Flux.1 D": "flux",
  4166	        "Flux.1 S": "flux",
  4167	        "Flux": "flux",
  4168	        "AuraFlow": "auraflow",
  4169	    }
  4170	    
  4171	    # Check pack.base_model first
  4172	    if pack.base_model:
  4173	        for key, arch in BASE_MODEL_ARCHITECTURE.items():
  4174	            if key.lower() in pack.base_model.lower():
  4175	                return arch
  4176	    
  4177	    # Check model_info.base_model
  4178	    if pack.model_info and pack.model_info.base_model:
  4179	        for key, arch in BASE_MODEL_ARCHITECTURE.items():
  4180	            if key.lower() in pack.model_info.base_model.lower():
  4181	                return arch
  4182	    
  4183	    # Check dependency selectors for base_model
  4184	    for dep in pack.dependencies:
  4185	        if dep.selector and dep.selector.base_model:
  4186	            for key, arch in BASE_MODEL_ARCHITECTURE.items():
  4187	                if key.lower() in dep.selector.base_model.lower():
  4188	                    return arch
  4189	    
  4190	    return "sd15"
  4191	
  4192	
  4193	def _build_v2_workflow(pack, architecture: str, checkpoint_dep, lora_deps) -> Dict[str, Any]:
  4194	    """Build ComfyUI workflow for v2 pack."""
  4195	    # Sampler mapping
  4196	    SAMPLER_MAPPING = {
  4197	        "Euler": "euler",
  4198	        "Euler a": "euler_ancestral",
  4199	        "DPM++ 2M": "dpmpp_2m",
  4200	        "DPM++ 2M Karras": "dpmpp_2m",
  4201	        "DPM++ 2M SDE": "dpmpp_2m_sde",
  4202	        "DPM++ 2M SDE Karras": "dpmpp_2m_sde",
  4203	        "DPM++ 3M SDE": "dpmpp_3m_sde",
  4204	        "DPM++ 3M SDE Karras": "dpmpp_3m_sde",
  4205	        "DDIM": "ddim",
  4206	    }
  4207	    
  4208	    SCHEDULER_MAPPING = {
  4209	        "Euler": "normal",
  4210	        "Euler a": "normal",
  4211	        "DPM++ 2M": "normal",
  4212	        "DPM++ 2M Karras": "karras",
  4213	        "DPM++ 2M SDE": "normal",
  4214	        "DPM++ 2M SDE Karras": "karras",
  4215	        "DPM++ 3M SDE": "normal",
  4216	        "DPM++ 3M SDE Karras": "karras",
  4217	        "DDIM": "ddim_uniform",
  4218	    }
  4219	    
  4220	    # Get parameters
  4221	    params = pack.parameters or GenerationParameters()
  4222	    
  4223	    # Dimensions based on architecture
  4224	    if architecture == "sdxl":
  4225	        default_width, default_height = 1024, 1024
  4226	    elif architecture == "flux":
  4227	        default_width, default_height = 1024, 1024
  4228	    else:
  4229	        default_width, default_height = 512, 512
  4230	    
  4231	    width = params.width or default_width
  4232	    height = params.height or default_height
  4233	    sampler = SAMPLER_MAPPING.get(params.sampler, "euler") if params.sampler else "euler"
  4234	    scheduler = SCHEDULER_MAPPING.get(params.sampler, "normal") if params.sampler else "normal"
  4235	    steps = params.steps or 20
  4236	    cfg = params.cfg_scale or 7.0
  4237	    seed = params.seed if params.seed and params.seed >= 0 else 0
  4238	    
  4239	    # Get checkpoint filename
  4240	    ckpt_filename = "model.safetensors"
  4241	    if checkpoint_dep and checkpoint_dep.expose and checkpoint_dep.expose.filename:
  4242	        ckpt_filename = checkpoint_dep.expose.filename
  4243	    
  4244	    # Build trigger words
  4245	    trigger_words = ""
  4246	    if pack.trigger_words:
  4247	        trigger_words = ", ".join(pack.trigger_words) + ", "
  4248	    elif pack.model_info and pack.model_info.trigger_words:
  4249	        trigger_words = ", ".join(pack.model_info.trigger_words) + ", "
  4250	    
  4251	    # Build prompts
  4252	    positive_prompt = f"{trigger_words}masterpiece, best quality, "
  4253	    negative_prompt = "lowres, bad anatomy, bad hands, text, error, missing fingers, extra digit, fewer digits, cropped, worst quality, low quality, jpeg artifacts, signature, watermark, blurry"
  4254	    
  4255	    # Node ID counter
  4256	    node_id = 1
  4257	    link_id = 1
  4258	    nodes = []
  4259	    links = []
  4260	    
  4261	    # 1. CheckpointLoaderSimple
  4262	    ckpt_node_id = node_id
  4263	    nodes.append({
  4264	        "id": ckpt_node_id,
  4265	        "type": "CheckpointLoaderSimple",
  4266	        "pos": [50, 100],
  4267	        "size": [315, 98],
  4268	        "flags": {},
  4269	        "order": 0,
  4270	        "mode": 0,
  4271	        "outputs": [
  4272	            {"name": "MODEL", "type": "MODEL", "links": [], "slot_index": 0},
  4273	            {"name": "CLIP", "type": "CLIP", "links": [], "slot_index": 1},
  4274	            {"name": "VAE", "type": "VAE", "links": [], "slot_index": 2}
  4275	        ],
  4276	        "properties": {"Node name for S&R": "CheckpointLoaderSimple"},
  4277	        "widgets_values": [ckpt_filename]
  4278	    })
  4279	    node_id += 1
  4280	    
  4281	    current_model_node = ckpt_node_id
  4282	    current_model_slot = 0
  4283	    current_clip_node = ckpt_node_id
  4284	    current_clip_slot = 1
  4285	    vae_node = ckpt_node_id
  4286	    vae_slot = 2
  4287	    
  4288	    # 2. LoRA Loaders
  4289	    for i, lora in enumerate(lora_deps):
  4290	        lora_filename = "lora.safetensors"
  4291	        if lora.expose and lora.expose.filename:
  4292	            lora_filename = lora.expose.filename

  4568	@v2_packs_router.post("/{pack_name}/workflow/symlink", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  4569	def create_workflow_symlink(
  4570	    pack_name: str,
  4571	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  4572	):
  4573	    """Create symlinks for all pack workflows to ComfyUI."""
  4574	    try:
  4575	        from config.settings import get_config
  4576	        import json
  4577	        
  4578	        config = get_config()
  4579	        
  4580	        # Load pack
  4581	        pack_dir = store.layout.pack_path(pack_name)
  4582	        pack_json = pack_dir / "pack.json"
  4583	        
  4584	        if not pack_json.exists():
  4585	            raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"Pack not found: {pack_name}")
  4586	        
  4587	        from .models import Pack
  4588	        pack = Pack.model_validate_json(pack_json.read_text())
  4589	        
  4590	        # ComfyUI workflows folder
  4591	        comfyui_workflows = config.comfyui.base_path / "user" / "default" / "workflows"
  4592	        comfyui_workflows.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
  4593	        
  4594	        workflows_dir = store.layout.pack_workflows_path(pack_name)
  4595	        created = []
  4596	        
  4597	        for wf in pack.workflows:
  4598	            source = workflows_dir / wf.filename
  4599	            if not source.exists():
  4600	                continue
  4601	            
  4602	            # Create symlink with pack prefix to avoid conflicts
  4603	            symlink_name = f"[{pack_name}] {wf.filename}"
  4604	            symlink_path = comfyui_workflows / symlink_name
  4605	            
  4606	            # Remove existing symlink
  4607	            if symlink_path.exists() or symlink_path.is_symlink():
  4608	                symlink_path.unlink()
  4609	            
  4610	            # Create new symlink
  4611	            symlink_path.symlink_to(source)
  4612	            created.append(symlink_name)
  4613	        
  4614	        logger.info(f"[workflow-symlink] Created {len(created)} symlinks for {pack_name}")
  4615	        
  4616	        return {
  4617	            "created": True,
  4618	            "pack_name": pack_name,
  4619	            "symlinks": created,
  4620	            "target_dir": str(comfyui_workflows),
  4621	        }
  4622	        
  4623	    except HTTPException:
  4624	        raise
  4625	    except Exception as e:
  4626	        logger.exception(f"[workflow-symlink] Error: {e}")
  4627	        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=str(e))
  4628

  4630	@v2_packs_router.post("/{pack_name}/workflow/{filename}/symlink", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  4631	def create_specific_workflow_symlink(
  4632	    pack_name: str,
  4633	    filename: str,
  4634	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  4635	):
  4636	    """Create symlink for specific workflow."""
  4637	    try:
  4638	        from config.settings import get_config
  4639	        
  4640	        config = get_config()
  4641	        
  4642	        workflows_dir = store.layout.pack_workflows_path(pack_name)
  4643	        source = workflows_dir / filename
  4644	        
  4645	        if not source.exists():
  4646	            raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"Workflow not found: {filename}")
  4647	        
  4648	        # ComfyUI workflows folder
  4649	        comfyui_workflows = config.comfyui.base_path / "user" / "default" / "workflows"
  4650	        comfyui_workflows.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
  4651	        
  4652	        # Create symlink with pack prefix
  4653	        symlink_name = f"[{pack_name}] {filename}"
  4654	        symlink_path = comfyui_workflows / symlink_name
  4655	        
  4656	        # Remove existing symlink
  4657	        if symlink_path.exists() or symlink_path.is_symlink():
  4658	            symlink_path.unlink()
  4659	        
  4660	        # Create new symlink
  4661	        symlink_path.symlink_to(source)
  4662	        
  4663	        logger.info(f"[workflow-symlink] Created symlink: {symlink_name}")
  4664	        
  4665	        return {
  4666	            "created": True,
  4667	            "symlink": symlink_name,
  4668	            "source": str(source),
  4669	            "target": str(symlink_path),
  4670	        }
  4671	        
  4672	    except HTTPException:
  4673	        raise
  4674	    except Exception as e:
  4675	        logger.exception(f"[workflow-symlink] Error: {e}")
  4676	        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=str(e))

  4679	@v2_packs_router.get("/{pack_name}/workflow/{filename}", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  4680	def get_workflow_content(
  4681	    pack_name: str,
  4682	    filename: str,
  4683	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  4684	):
  4685	    """Get workflow JSON content."""
  4686	    try:
  4687	        workflows_dir = store.layout.pack_workflows_path(pack_name)
  4688	        workflow_file = workflows_dir / filename
  4689	        
  4690	        if not workflow_file.exists():
  4691	            raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"Workflow not found: {filename}")
  4692	        
  4693	        import json
  4694	        content = json.loads(workflow_file.read_text())
  4695	        
  4696	        return {
  4697	            "filename": filename,
  4698	            "content": content,
  4699	        }
  4700	    except HTTPException:
  4701	        raise
  4702	    except Exception as e:
  4703	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))

  4706	@v2_packs_router.delete("/{pack_name}/workflow/{filename}", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  4707	def delete_workflow(
  4708	    pack_name: str,
  4709	    filename: str,
  4710	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  4711	):
  4712	    """Delete a workflow file from pack and remove from pack.json."""
  4713	    try:
  4714	        import json
  4715	        
  4716	        workflows_dir = store.layout.pack_workflows_path(pack_name)
  4717	        workflow_file = workflows_dir / filename
  4718	        
  4719	        if not workflow_file.exists():
  4720	            raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"Workflow not found: {filename}")
  4721	        
  4722	        # Delete the workflow file
  4723	        workflow_file.unlink()
  4724	        
  4725	        # Also delete symlink if exists (in ComfyUI workflows folder)
  4726	        from config.settings import get_config
  4727	        config = get_config()
  4728	        comfyui_workflows = config.comfyui.base_path / "user" / "default" / "workflows"
  4729	        
  4730	        # Try both formats for symlink
  4731	        symlink_path1 = comfyui_workflows / filename
  4732	        symlink_path2 = comfyui_workflows / f"[{pack_name}] {filename}"
  4733	        
  4734	        for symlink_path in [symlink_path1, symlink_path2]:
  4735	            if symlink_path.is_symlink():
  4736	                symlink_path.unlink()
  4737	        
  4738	        # Remove from pack.json
  4739	        pack_dir = store.layout.pack_path(pack_name)
  4740	        pack_json = pack_dir / "pack.json"
  4741	        
  4742	        if pack_json.exists():
  4743	            from .models import Pack
  4744	            pack = Pack.model_validate_json(pack_json.read_text())
  4745	            pack.workflows = [w for w in pack.workflows if w.filename != filename]
  4746	            
  4747	            with open(pack_json, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
  4748	                f.write(pack.model_dump_json(indent=2, by_alias=True, exclude_none=True))
  4749	        
  4750	        logger.info(f"[delete-workflow] Deleted: {filename} from {pack_name}")
  4751	        
  4752	        return {
  4753	            "deleted": filename,
  4754	            "pack_name": pack_name,
  4755	        }
  4756	    except HTTPException:
  4757	        raise
  4758	    except Exception as e:
  4759	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
  4760

  4762	class AddWorkflowRequest(BaseModel):
  4763	    """Request to add workflow info to pack.json."""
  4764	    name: str
  4765	    filename: str
  4766	    description: Optional[str] = None
  4767	    source_url: Optional[str] = None
  4768	    is_default: bool = False
  4769	
  4770	
  4771	@v2_packs_router.post("/{pack_name}/workflow/add", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  4772	def add_workflow_to_pack(
  4773	    pack_name: str,
  4774	    request: AddWorkflowRequest,
  4775	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  4776	):
  4777	    """Add workflow info to pack.json (workflow file must exist)."""
  4778	    try:
  4779	        # Check if workflow file exists
  4780	        workflows_dir = store.layout.pack_workflows_path(pack_name)
  4781	        workflow_file = workflows_dir / request.filename
  4782	        
  4783	        if not workflow_file.exists():
  4784	            raise HTTPException(
  4785	                status_code=404, 
  4786	                detail=f"Workflow file not found: {request.filename}. Upload the file first."
  4787	            )
  4788	        
  4789	        # Load pack
  4790	        pack_dir = store.layout.pack_path(pack_name)
  4791	        pack_json = pack_dir / "pack.json"
  4792	        
  4793	        if not pack_json.exists():
  4794	            raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"Pack not found: {pack_name}")
  4795	        
  4796	        from .models import Pack
  4797	        pack = Pack.model_validate_json(pack_json.read_text())
  4798	        
  4799	        # Remove existing workflow with same filename if exists
  4800	        pack.workflows = [w for w in pack.workflows if w.filename != request.filename]
  4801	        
  4802	        # Add new workflow info
  4803	        workflow_info = WorkflowInfo(
  4804	            name=request.name,
  4805	            filename=request.filename,
  4806	            description=request.description,
  4807	            source_url=request.source_url,
  4808	            is_default=request.is_default,
  4809	        )
  4810	        
  4811	        # If is_default, remove other defaults
  4812	        if request.is_default:
  4813	            pack.workflows = [w for w in pack.workflows if not w.is_default]
  4814	        
  4815	        pack.workflows.append(workflow_info)
  4816	        
  4817	        # Save pack.json
  4818	        with open(pack_json, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
  4819	            f.write(pack.model_dump_json(indent=2, by_alias=True, exclude_none=True))
  4820	        
  4821	        logger.info(f"[add-workflow] Added: {request.filename} to {pack_name}")
  4822	        
  4823	        return {
  4824	            "added": True,
  4825	            "workflow": workflow_info.model_dump(),
  4826	            "pack_name": pack_name,
  4827	        }
  4828	        
  4829	    except HTTPException:
  4830	        raise
  4831	    except Exception as e:
  4832	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))

  4835	class RenameWorkflowRequest(BaseModel):
  4836	    """Request to rename a workflow."""
  4837	    new_name: Optional[str] = None  # Display name in pack.json
  4838	    new_filename: Optional[str] = None  # Actual file name
  4839	
  4840	
  4841	@v2_packs_router.patch("/{pack_name}/workflow/{filename}", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  4842	def rename_workflow(
  4843	    pack_name: str,
  4844	    filename: str,
  4845	    request: RenameWorkflowRequest,
  4846	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  4847	):
  4848	    """Rename a workflow (display name and/or filename)."""
  4849	    try:
  4850	        import shutil
  4851	        
  4852	        workflows_dir = store.layout.pack_workflows_path(pack_name)
  4853	        workflow_file = workflows_dir / filename
  4854	        
  4855	        if not workflow_file.exists():
  4856	            raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"Workflow not found: {filename}")
  4857	        
  4858	        # Load pack
  4859	        pack_dir = store.layout.pack_path(pack_name)
  4860	        pack_json = pack_dir / "pack.json"
  4861	        
  4862	        if not pack_json.exists():
  4863	            raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"Pack not found: {pack_name}")
  4864	        
  4865	        from .models import Pack
  4866	        pack = Pack.model_validate_json(pack_json.read_text())
  4867	        
  4868	        # Find workflow in pack.workflows
  4869	        workflow_idx = None
  4870	        for i, w in enumerate(pack.workflows):
  4871	            if w.filename == filename:
  4872	                workflow_idx = i
  4873	                break
  4874	        
  4875	        old_filename = filename
  4876	        new_filename = request.new_filename or filename
  4877	        
  4878	        # Rename file if new_filename provided
  4879	        if request.new_filename and request.new_filename != filename:
  4880	            # Ensure it ends with .json
  4881	            if not new_filename.endswith(".json"):
  4882	                new_filename += ".json"
  4883	            
  4884	            new_path = workflows_dir / new_filename
  4885	            if new_path.exists():
  4886	                raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=f"Workflow already exists: {new_filename}")
  4887	            
  4888	            workflow_file.rename(new_path)
  4889	            
  4890	            # Update symlink if exists
  4891	            from config.settings import get_config
  4892	            config = get_config()
  4893	            comfyui_workflows = config.comfyui.base_path / "user" / "default" / "workflows"
  4894	            
  4895	            old_symlink = comfyui_workflows / f"[{pack_name}] {old_filename}"
  4896	            if old_symlink.is_symlink():
  4897	                old_symlink.unlink()
  4898	                new_symlink = comfyui_workflows / f"[{pack_name}] {new_filename}"
  4899	                new_symlink.symlink_to(new_path)
  4900	        
  4901	        # Update pack.workflows
  4902	        if workflow_idx is not None:
  4903	            if request.new_name:
  4904	                pack.workflows[workflow_idx].name = request.new_name
  4905	            if request.new_filename:
  4906	                pack.workflows[workflow_idx].filename = new_filename
  4907	        
  4908	        # Save pack.json
  4909	        with open(pack_json, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
  4910	            f.write(pack.model_dump_json(indent=2, by_alias=True, exclude_none=True))
  4911	        
  4912	        logger.info(f"[rename-workflow] Renamed: {filename} -> {new_filename} in {pack_name}")
  4913	        
  4914	        return {
  4915	            "renamed": True,
  4916	            "old_filename": old_filename,
  4917	            "new_filename": new_filename,
  4918	            "new_name": request.new_name,
  4919	            "pack_name": pack_name,
  4920	        }
  4921	        
  4922	    except HTTPException:
  4923	        raise
  4924	    except Exception as e:
  4925	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
  4926	
  4927	
  4928	@v2_packs_router.post("/{pack_name}/workflow/upload-file", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  4929	def upload_workflow_file(
  4930	    pack_name: str,
  4931	    file: UploadFile = File(...),
  4932	    name: Optional[str] = Form(None),
  4933	    description: Optional[str] = Form(None),
  4934	    is_default: bool = Form(False),
  4935	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  4936	):
  4937	    """Upload a workflow file to pack and optionally add to pack.json."""
  4938	    try:
  4939	        import json
  4940	        
  4941	        workflows_dir = store.layout.pack_workflows_path(pack_name)
  4942	        workflows_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
  4943	        
  4944	        # Save file
  4945	        dest_path = workflows_dir / file.filename
  4946	        content = file.file.read()
  4947	        
  4948	        # Validate JSON
  4949	        try:
  4950	            json.loads(content)
  4951	        except json.JSONDecodeError:
  4952	            raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Invalid JSON file")
  4953	        
  4954	        dest_path.write_bytes(content)
  4955	        
  4956	        # Add to pack.json if name provided
  4957	        if name:
  4958	            pack_dir = store.layout.pack_path(pack_name)
  4959	            pack_json = pack_dir / "pack.json"
  4960	            
  4961	            if pack_json.exists():
  4962	                from .models import Pack
  4963	                pack = Pack.model_validate_json(pack_json.read_text())
  4964	                
  4965	                # Remove existing with same filename
  4966	                pack.workflows = [w for w in pack.workflows if w.filename != file.filename]
  4967	                
  4968	                # Remove other defaults if this is default
  4969	                if is_default:
  4970	                    pack.workflows = [w for w in pack.workflows if not w.is_default]
  4971	                
  4972	                # Add new workflow info
  4973	                workflow_info = WorkflowInfo(
  4974	                    name=name,
  4975	                    filename=file.filename,
  4976	                    description=description,
  4977	                    is_default=is_default,
  4978	                )
  4979	                pack.workflows.append(workflow_info)
  4980	                
  4981	                # Save pack.json
  4982	                with open(pack_json, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
  4983	                    f.write(pack.model_dump_json(indent=2, by_alias=True, exclude_none=True))
  4984	        
  4985	        return {
  4986	            "uploaded": True,
  4987	            "filename": file.filename,
  4988	            "path": str(dest_path),
  4989	            "added_to_pack": name is not None,
  4990	        }
  4991	    except HTTPException:
  4992	        raise
  4993	    except Exception as e:
  4994	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
  4995

  5011	@profiles_router.get("/status", response_model=ProfilesStatusResponse)
  5012	def get_profiles_status(
  5013	    ui_set: Optional[str] = Query(None),
  5014	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  5015	):
  5016	    """
  5017	    Get complete profiles status for UI display.
  5018	    
  5019	    Returns per-UI runtime status, stack visualization, and shadowed files.
  5020	    """
  5021	    try:
  5022	        ui_targets = store.get_ui_targets(ui_set)
  5023	        
  5024	        # Load runtime directly for stack info
  5025	        runtime = store.layout.load_runtime()
  5026	        
  5027	        # Build per-UI status list
  5028	        ui_statuses = []
  5029	        for ui in ui_targets:
  5030	            stack = runtime.get_stack(ui)
  5031	            active = runtime.get_active_profile(ui)
  5032	            ui_statuses.append(UIRuntimeStatus(
  5033	                ui=ui,
  5034	                active_profile=active,
  5035	                stack=stack,
  5036	                stack_depth=len(stack),
  5037	            ))
  5038	        
  5039	        # Get status for shadowed info
  5040	        status = store.status(ui_set=ui_set)
  5041	        
  5042	        # Convert shadowed entries to dicts
  5043	        all_shadowed = []
  5044	        for entry in status.shadowed:
  5045	            all_shadowed.append({
  5046	                "ui": entry.ui if hasattr(entry, 'ui') else ui_targets[0] if ui_targets else "unknown",
  5047	                "dst_relpath": entry.dst_relpath,
  5048	                "winner_pack": entry.winner_pack,
  5049	                "loser_pack": entry.loser_pack,
  5050	            })
  5051	        
  5052	        # Count available updates (from cached check or 0)
  5053	        updates_count = getattr(store, "_cached_updates_count", 0)
  5054	        
  5055	        return ProfilesStatusResponse(
  5056	            ui_statuses=ui_statuses,
  5057	            shadowed=all_shadowed,
  5058	            shadowed_count=len(all_shadowed),
  5059	            updates_available=updates_count,
  5060	        )
  5061	    except Exception as e:
  5062	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))

  5122	@profiles_router.post("/reset", response_model=Dict[str, Any])

  5143	            }

  5148	            "ui_results": ui_results,
  5149	        }
  5150	    except Exception as e:
  5151	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))

  5173	@updates_router.get("/plan", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  5174	def get_update_plan(
  5175	    pack: Optional[str] = Query(None),
  5176	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  5177	):
  5178	    """Get update plan for a pack (or all packs if pack is None)."""
  5179	    try:
  5180	        if pack is None:
  5181	            # Get all packs
  5182	            plans = store.check_all_updates()
  5183	            return {
  5184	                name: plan.model_dump()
  5185	                for name, plan in plans.items()
  5186	            }
  5187	        else:
  5188	            # Get single pack
  5189	            plan = store.check_updates(pack)
  5190	            return {pack: plan.model_dump()}
  5191	    except Exception as e:
  5192	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))

  5195	@updates_router.get("/check/{pack_name}", response_model=UpdateCheckResponse)
  5196	def check_pack_updates(
  5197	    pack_name: str,
  5198	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  5199	):
  5200	    """Check if a specific pack has updates available."""
  5201	    try:
  5202	        plan = store.check_updates(pack_name)
  5203	        plan_dict = plan.model_dump()
  5204	        changes_count = len(plan_dict.get("changes", []))
  5205	        ambiguous_count = len(plan_dict.get("ambiguous", []))
  5206	        pending_count = len(plan_dict.get("pending_downloads", []))
  5207	
  5208	        return UpdateCheckResponse(
  5209	            pack=pack_name,
  5210	            has_updates=changes_count > 0 or ambiguous_count > 0 or pending_count > 0,
  5211	            changes_count=changes_count,
  5212	            ambiguous_count=ambiguous_count,
  5213	            plan=plan_dict,
  5214	        )
  5215	    except Exception as e:
  5216	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
  5217	
  5218	
  5219	@updates_router.get("/check-all", response_model=BulkUpdateCheckResponse)
  5220	def check_all_updates(store=Depends(require_initialized)):
  5221	    """Check all packs for available updates."""
  5222	    try:
  5223	        plans = store.check_all_updates()
  5224	        
  5225	        packs_with_updates = 0
  5226	        total_changes = 0
  5227	        plans_dict = {}
  5228	        
  5229	        for name, plan in plans.items():
  5230	            plan_dict = plan.model_dump()
  5231	            changes = len(plan_dict.get("changes", []))
  5232	            ambiguous = len(plan_dict.get("ambiguous", []))
  5233	            pending = len(plan_dict.get("pending_downloads", []))
  5234	
  5235	            if changes > 0 or ambiguous > 0 or pending > 0:
  5236	                packs_with_updates += 1
  5237	                total_changes += changes + ambiguous
  5238	                plans_dict[name] = plan_dict
  5239	        
  5240	        # Cache the count for profiles status endpoint
  5241	        store._cached_updates_count = packs_with_updates
  5242	        
  5243	        return BulkUpdateCheckResponse(
  5244	            packs_checked=len(plans),
  5245	            packs_with_updates=packs_with_updates,
  5246	            total_changes=total_changes,
  5247	            plans=plans_dict,
  5248	        )
  5249	    except Exception as e:
  5250	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
  5251

  5266	                update_description=request.options.update_description,
  5267	                update_model_info=request.options.update_model_info,
  5268	            )
  5269	
  5270	        result = store.update(

  2508	@v2_packs_router.post("/{pack_name}/download-asset", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  2509	async def download_asset(
  2510	    pack_name: str,
  2511	    request: DownloadAssetRequest,
  2512	    background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
  2513	    store=Depends(require_initialized),

  2516	    
  2517	    Uses v2 blob store for content-addressable storage.
  2518	    """

  2524	    
  2525	    pack = store.get_pack(pack_name)
  2526	    if not pack:
  2527	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"Pack not found: {pack_name}")
  2528	    
  2529	    # Find the dependency (use .id not .dependency_id)
  2530	    dep = None

  2532	        if d.id == request.asset_name:
  2533	            dep = d
  2534	            break
  2535	    
  2536	    if not dep:
  2537	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"Dependency not found: {request.asset_name}")
  2538	    
  2539	    # Get download URL - first from request, then from lock file
  2540	    download_url = request.url
  2541	    resolved_filename = None
  2542	
  2543	    if not download_url:
  2544	        # Try to get URL from resolved artifact in lock
  2545	        lock = store.get_pack_lock(pack_name)
  2546	        if lock:
  2547	            resolved = lock.get_resolved(request.asset_name)

  2549	                download_url = resolved.artifact.download.urls[0]
  2550	                resolved_filename = resolved.artifact.provider.filename
  2551	
  2552	    # Validate lock URL against dependency's pinned version_id.
  2553	    # Stale locks may have wrong version in URL (e.g. always latest instead of pinned).
  2554	    if download_url and dep.selector.civitai and dep.selector.civitai.version_id:
  2555	        expected_vid = str(dep.selector.civitai.version_id)
  2556	        if "civitai.com" in download_url and f"models/{expected_vid}" not in download_url:
  2557	            stale_url = download_url
  2558	            download_url = f"https://civitai.com/api/download/models/{expected_vid}"
  2559	            logger.warning(
  2560	                "[download-asset] Lock URL stale (version_id mismatch), "
  2561	                "reconstructed: %s → %s", stale_url, download_url,
  2562	            )
  2563	
  2564	    # Last resort: construct URL from dependency's Civitai selector
  2565	    if not download_url and dep.selector.civitai and dep.selector.civitai.version_id:
  2566	        download_url = f"https://civitai.com/api/download/models/{dep.selector.civitai.version_id}"
  2567	        logger.info("[download-asset] No URL in request or lock, constructed from version_id: %s", download_url)
  2568	
  2569	    if not download_url:
  2570	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="No download URL available for this asset")
  2571	
  2572	    # Pre-flight: log Civitai API key status for debugging auth issues
  2573	    if "civitai.com" in download_url:
  2574	        if store.blob_store.api_key:
  2575	            logger.info(f"[download-asset] Civitai API key: {store.blob_store.api_key[:6]}... (configured)")
  2576	        else:
  2577	            logger.warning(f"[download-asset] NO Civitai API key configured! NSFW downloads will fail.")
  2578	
  2579	    # Determine filename
  2580	    filename = request.filename or resolved_filename or f"{request.asset_name}.safetensors"
  2581	
  2582	    logger.info(f"[download-asset] Downloading {filename} from {download_url[:100]}...")
  2583	    if store.blob_store.api_key:
  2584	        logger.debug(f"[download-asset] Using Civitai API key: {store.blob_store.api_key[:8]}...")
  2585	    
  2586	    # Create download tracking entry
  2587	    download_id = str(uuid.uuid4())[:8]
  2588	    _active_downloads[download_id] = {
  2589	        "download_id": download_id,
  2590	        "pack_name": pack_name,
  2591	        "asset_name": request.asset_name,
  2592	        "filename": filename,
  2593	        "status": "pending",
  2594	        "progress": 0.0,
  2595	        "downloaded_bytes": 0,
  2596	        "total_bytes": 0,
  2597	        "speed_bps": 0,
  2598	        "speed_mbps": 0,
  2599	        "eta_seconds": 0,
  2600	        "error": None,
  2601	        "started_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
  2602	        "completed_at": None,
  2603	        "target_path": None,
  2604	        "group_id": request.group_id,
  2605	        "group_label": request.group_label,
  2606	    }
  2607	    
  2608	    def do_download():
  2609	        """Background download task."""
  2610	        import time
  2611	        
  2612	        entry = _active_downloads[download_id]
  2613	        entry["status"] = "downloading"
  2614	        start_time = time.time()
  2615	        last_update_time = start_time
  2616	        last_downloaded = 0
  2617	        
  2618	        try:
  2619	            # Use blob store for download
  2620	            def progress_callback(downloaded: int, total: int):
  2621	                nonlocal last_update_time, last_downloaded
  2622	                
  2623	                current_time = time.time()
  2624	                elapsed = current_time - start_time
  2625	                time_delta = current_time - last_update_time
  2626	                
  2627	                entry["downloaded_bytes"] = downloaded
  2628	                entry["total_bytes"] = total
  2629	                if total > 0:
  2630	                    entry["progress"] = (downloaded / total) * 100
  2631	                
  2632	                # Calculate speed (bytes per second)
  2633	                if time_delta > 0.5:  # Update speed every 0.5 seconds
  2634	                    bytes_delta = downloaded - last_downloaded
  2635	                    speed_bps = bytes_delta / time_delta if time_delta > 0 else 0
  2636	                    entry["speed_bps"] = speed_bps
  2637	                    entry["speed_mbps"] = speed_bps / (1024 * 1024)  # MB/s
  2638	                    
  2639	                    # Calculate ETA
  2640	                    remaining_bytes = total - downloaded
  2641	                    if speed_bps > 0:
  2642	                        entry["eta_seconds"] = int(remaining_bytes / speed_bps)
  2643	                    else:
  2644	                        entry["eta_seconds"] = 0
  2645	                    
  2646	                    last_update_time = current_time
  2647	                    last_downloaded = downloaded
  2648	            
  2649	            # Download via blob store
  2650	            sha256 = store.blob_store.download(
  2651	                download_url,
  2652	                expected_sha256=None,
  2653	                progress_callback=progress_callback,
  2654	            )
  2655	
  2656	            # Validate downloaded file is not HTML/error page

  2658	            blob_size = blob_path.stat().st_size
  2659	
  2660	            # Check if file is suspiciously small (likely error page)
  2661	            MIN_MODEL_SIZE = 100_000  # 100KB minimum for models
  2662	            if blob_size < MIN_MODEL_SIZE:
  2663	                # Read first bytes to check if HTML
  2664	                with open(blob_path, 'rb') as f:
  2665	                    header = f.read(100)
  2666	                if b'<!DOCTYPE' in header or b'<html' in header.lower():
  2667	                    # Delete the corrupt blob
  2668	                    store.blob_store.remove_blob(sha256)

  2670	                        f"Download failed: received HTML error page instead of model file. "
  2671	                        f"Size: {blob_size} bytes. This usually means Civitai returned an error. "

  2673	                    )

  2676

  2678	            # Map asset type to directory

  2743	@v2_packs_router.get("/downloads/active", response_model=List[Dict[str, Any]])
  2744	def get_active_downloads():
  2745	    """Get list of active downloads for UI."""
  2746	    return list(_active_downloads.values())
  2747	
  2748	
  2749	@v2_packs_router.get("/downloads/{download_id}/progress", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  2750	def get_download_progress(download_id: str):
  2751	    """Get progress of a specific download."""
  2752	    if download_id not in _active_downloads:
  2753	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"Download not found: {download_id}")
  2754	    return _active_downloads[download_id]
  2755	
  2756	
  2757	@v2_packs_router.delete("/downloads/completed")
  2758	def clear_completed_downloads():
  2759	    """Clear completed/failed downloads from tracking."""
  2760	    to_remove = [
  2761	        k for k, v in _active_downloads.items()
  2762	        if v.get("status") in ["completed", "failed", "cancelled"]
  2763	    ]
  2764	    import traceback
  2765	    logger.warning("[downloads] clear_completed called, removing %d entries. Caller:\n%s", len(to_remove), "".join(traceback.format_stack()[-4:-1]))
  2766	    for k in to_remove:
  2767	        del _active_downloads[k]
  2768	    return {"cleared": len(to_remove)}
  2769	
  2770	
  2771	@v2_packs_router.delete("/downloads/group/{group_id}")
  2772	def cancel_download_group(group_id: str):
  2773	    """Cancel and remove all downloads matching the given group_id."""
  2774	    import traceback
  2775	    logger.warning("[downloads] cancel_download_group called for group_id=%s. Caller:\n%s", group_id, "".join(traceback.format_stack()[-4:-1]))
  2776	    cancelled = []
  2777	    to_remove = [
  2778	        k for k, v in _active_downloads.items()
  2779	        if v.get("group_id") == group_id
  2780	    ]
  2781	    for k in to_remove:
  2782	        _active_downloads[k]["status"] = "cancelled"
  2783	        cancelled.append(k)
  2784	        del _active_downloads[k]
  2785	    return {"cancelled": cancelled, "count": len(cancelled)}
  2786	
  2787	
  2788	@v2_packs_router.delete("/downloads/{download_id}")
  2789	def cancel_download(download_id: str):
  2790	    """Cancel a download."""
  2791	    import traceback
  2792	    logger.warning("[downloads] cancel_download called for id=%s. Caller:\n%s", download_id, "".join(traceback.format_stack()[-4:-1]))
  2793	    if download_id in _active_downloads:
  2794	        _active_downloads[download_id]["status"] = "cancelled"
  2795	        del _active_downloads[download_id]
  2796	    return {"cancelled": download_id}
  2797	
  2798	
  2799	@v2_packs_router.post("/{pack_name}/download-all", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  2800	def download_all_assets(
  2801	    pack_name: str,
  2802	    background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
  2803	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  2804	):
  2805	    """Download all pending assets for a pack using v2 install mechanism."""
  2806	    try:
  2807	        # Re-resolve lock to ensure URLs are fresh (handles stale lock issue)
  2808	        try:
  2809	            store.resolve(pack_name)
  2810	            logger.info("[download-all] Re-resolved lock for %s before download", pack_name)
  2811	        except Exception as e:
  2812	            logger.warning("[download-all] Lock re-resolve failed for %s: %s (proceeding with existing)", pack_name, e)
  2813	
  2814	        # Use v2 install which downloads all blobs
  2815	        installed = store.install(pack_name)
  2816	
  2817	        return {
  2818	            "success": True,
  2819	            "pack_name": pack_name,
  2820	            "blobs_installed": len(installed),
  2821	            "message": f"Installed {len(installed)} blob(s)",
  2822	        }
  2823	    except Exception as e:
  2824	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))

  2828	    """Request to delete resource (blob) for a dependency."""

  2831	
  2832	
  2833	@v2_packs_router.delete("/{pack_name}/dependencies/{dep_id}/resource", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  2834	def delete_dependency_resource(
  2835	    pack_name: str,
  2836	    dep_id: str,
  2837	    delete_dependency: bool = Query(False, description="Also remove dependency from pack.json"),
  2838	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  2839	):
  2840	    """Delete downloaded resource (blob) for a dependency.
  2841	    
  2842	    By default, only deletes the blob file but keeps the dependency in pack.json.
  2843	    If delete_dependency=true, also removes the dependency from pack.json (DANGEROUS).
  2844	    """
  2845	    try:
  2846	        pack = store.get_pack(pack_name)
  2847	        lock = store.get_pack_lock(pack_name)
  2848	        
  2849	        # Find the dependency
  2850	        dep = None
  2851	        for d in pack.dependencies:
  2852	            if d.id == dep_id:
  2853	                dep = d
  2854	                break
  2855	        
  2856	        if not dep:
  2857	            raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"Dependency not found: {dep_id}")
  2858	        
  2859	        deleted_blob = False
  2860	        deleted_dependency = False
  2861	        blob_path = None
  2862	        
  2863	        # Delete blob if exists (but KEEP resolved info in lock.json for re-download!)
  2864	        if lock:
  2865	            resolved = lock.get_resolved(dep_id)
  2866	            if resolved and resolved.artifact.sha256:
  2867	                sha256 = resolved.artifact.sha256
  2868	                if store.blob_store.blob_exists(sha256):
  2869	                    blob_path = str(store.blob_store.blob_path(sha256))
  2870	                    # Delete the blob

  1190	        self.layout.save_pack_lock(lock)

  1192	
  1193	    def _ensure_resolvers(self) -> None:

  1203	            LocalFileResolver,
  1204	            UrlResolver,
  1205	        )
  1206	
  1207	        self._resolvers = {

  1209	            SelectorStrategy.CIVITAI_MODEL_LATEST: CivitaiLatestResolver(self.civitai),
  1210	            SelectorStrategy.BASE_MODEL_HINT: BaseModelHintResolver(self.civitai, self.layout),
  1211	            SelectorStrategy.HUGGINGFACE_FILE: HuggingFaceResolver(),
  1212	            SelectorStrategy.URL_DOWNLOAD: UrlResolver(),
  1213	            SelectorStrategy.LOCAL_FILE: LocalFileResolver(),
  1214	        }
  1215	
  1216	    def _resolve_dependency(
  1217	        self,
  1218	        pack: Pack,
  1219	        dep: PackDependency,
  1220	        existing_lock: Optional[PackLock],
  1221	    ) -> Optional[ResolvedArtifact]:

  1228	            return None
  1229	
  1230	        return resolver.resolve(dep)
  1231	
  1232	    # =========================================================================
  1233	    # Installation
  1234	    # =========================================================================
  1235	
  1236	    def install_pack(
  1237	        self,
  1238	        pack_name: str,
  1239	        progress_callback: Optional[Callable[[str, int, int], None]] = None,
  1240	    ) -> List[str]:
  1241	        """
  1242	        Install all blobs for a pack from its lock file.
  1243	
  1244	        Args:
  1245	            pack_name: Pack to install
  1246	            progress_callback: Optional callback (dep_id, downloaded, total)
  1247	
  1248	        Returns:
  1249	            List of installed SHA256 hashes
  1250	        """
  1251	        lock = self.layout.load_pack_lock(pack_name)
  1252	        if not lock:
  1253	            raise PackNotFoundError(f"No lock file for pack: {pack_name}")
  1254	
  1255	        # Load pack for expose filename lookup
  1256	        pack = self.layout.load_pack(pack_name)
  1257	
  1258	        installed = []
  1259	
  1260	        for resolved in lock.resolved:
  1261	            sha256 = resolved.artifact.sha256
  1262	            urls = resolved.artifact.download.urls
  1263	
  1264	            if not urls:
  1265	                continue
  1266	
  1267	            blob_already_existed = sha256 and self.blob_store.blob_exists(sha256)
  1268	
  1269	            if blob_already_existed:
  1270	                installed.append(sha256)
  1271	                # Ensure manifest exists even for pre-existing blobs
  1272	                self._ensure_blob_manifest(sha256, resolved, pack)
  1273	                continue

  1276	                def make_callback(dep_id: str):

  1278	                        return lambda d, t: progress_callback(dep_id, d, t)
  1279	                    return None
  1280	
  1281	                actual_sha = self.blob_store.download(
  1282	                    urls[0],
  1283	                    sha256,
  1284	                    progress_callback=make_callback(resolved.dependency_id),
  1285	                )
  1286	                installed.append(actual_sha)
  1287	
  1288	                if not sha256:
  1289	                    resolved.artifact.sha256 = actual_sha
  1290	                    resolved.artifact.integrity.sha256_verified = True
  1291	                    self.layout.save_pack_lock(lock)
  1292	
  1293	                # Create manifest for newly downloaded blob
  1294	                self._ensure_blob_manifest(actual_sha, resolved, pack)
  1295	
  1296	            except Exception as e:
  1297	                logger.error(f"[PackService] Failed to install {resolved.dependency_id}: {e}")
  1298	
  1299	        return installed
  1300	
  1301	    def _ensure_blob_manifest(
  1302	        self,
