codex
Backend creation exists, including `provider=local`, but I’m seeing two important separation lines already: model dependencies are not the same as pack-to-pack dependencies, and profile/view building only reads profile packs directly. I’ll now pin down the frontend surface and where custom editing actually hooks into those endpoints.

    12	import { useUpdatesStore } from '@/stores/updatesStore'

    14	import { BreathingOrb } from '../ui/BreathingOrb'
    15	import { Button } from '../ui/Button'
    16	import { CreatePackModal, type CreatePackData } from './pack-detail/modals'
    17	import { UpdatesPanel } from './packs/UpdatesPanel'
    18	import { AssetKindIcon, getKindLabel } from './inventory/AssetKindIcon'
    19	import type { AssetKind } from './inventory/types'
    20	import { toast } from '@/stores/toastStore'
    21	
    22	interface PackSummary {
    23	  name: string
    24	  version: string
    25	  description?: string
    26	  installed: boolean
    27	  assets_count: number
    28	  previews_count: number
    29	  nsfw_previews_count: number
    30	  source_url?: string
    31	  created_at?: string
    32	  thumbnail?: string
    33	  thumbnail_type?: 'image' | 'video'
    34	  tags: string[]
    35	  user_tags: string[]
    36	  has_unresolved: boolean
    37	  pack_type?: string
    38	  base_model?: string
    39	  is_nsfw?: boolean
    40	  is_nsfw_hidden?: boolean
    41	}
    42	
    43	// Special tags with distinct colors
    44	const SPECIAL_TAGS: Record<string, { bg: string; text: string }> = {
    45	  'nsfw-pack': { bg: 'bg-red-500/60', text: 'text-red-100' },
    46	  'nsfw-pack-hide': { bg: 'bg-red-700/60', text: 'text-red-100' },
    47	  'favorites': { bg: 'bg-amber-500/60', text: 'text-amber-100' },
    48	  'to-review': { bg: 'bg-blue-500/60', text: 'text-blue-100' },
    49	  'wip': { bg: 'bg-orange-500/60', text: 'text-orange-100' },
    50	  'archived': { bg: 'bg-slate-500/60', text: 'text-slate-200' },
    51	}
    52	
    53	/** Get style for user tag (special or default) */
    54	function getTagStyle(tag: string): string {
    55	  const special = SPECIAL_TAGS[tag.toLowerCase()]
    56	  if (special) {
    57	    return `${special.bg} ${special.text} backdrop-blur-sm`
    58	  }
    59	  return 'bg-pulse/50 text-white backdrop-blur-sm'
    60	}
    61	
    62	// Card widths for zoom - fixed sizes
    63	const CARD_WIDTHS = {
    64	  sm: 220,
    65	  md: 300,
    66	  lg: 380,
    67	}
    68	
    69	type CardSize = keyof typeof CARD_WIDTHS
    70	
    71	export function PacksPage() {
    72	  const { t } = useTranslation()
    73	  const navigate = useNavigate()
    74	  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
    75	  const { nsfwBlurEnabled } = useSettingsStore()
    76	  const { searchQuery, selectedTag, setSearchQuery, setSelectedTag } = usePacksStore()
    77	  const [cardSize, setCardSize] = useState<CardSize>('md')
    78	  const [fullscreenImage, setFullscreenImage] = useState<string | null>(null)
    79	  const [isCreateModalOpen, setIsCreateModalOpen] = useState(false)
    80	  const [isUpdatesPanelOpen, setIsUpdatesPanelOpen] = useState(false)
    81	  const { isChecking, checkProgress, updatesCount, checkAll } = useUpdatesStore()
    82	
    83	  const handleCheckUpdates = async () => {
    84	    await checkAll()
    85	    const state = useUpdatesStore.getState()
    86	    if (state.updatesCount > 0) {
    87	      toast.info(t('updates.panel.updatesFound', { count: state.updatesCount }))
    88	      setIsUpdatesPanelOpen(true)
    89	    } else {
    90	      toast.success(t('updates.panel.allUpToDate'))
    91	    }
    92	  }
    93	
    94	  // Fetch packs
    95	  const { data: packs = [], isLoading, error } = useQuery<PackSummary[]>({
    96	    queryKey: ['packs'],
    97	    queryFn: async () => {
    98	      const res = await fetch('/api/packs/')
    99	      if (!res.ok) {
   100	        throw new Error(`Failed to fetch packs: ${res.status}`)
   101	      }
   102	      const data = await res.json()
   103	      return data.packs || data || []
   104	    },
   105	  })
   106	
   107	  // Create pack mutation
   108	  const createPackMutation = useMutation({
   109	    mutationFn: async (data: CreatePackData) => {
   110	      const res = await fetch('/api/packs/create', {
   111	        method: 'POST',
   112	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   113	        body: JSON.stringify(data),
   114	      })
   115	      if (!res.ok) {
   116	        const err = await res.json().catch(() => ({ detail: 'Unknown error' }))
   117	        throw new Error(err.detail || 'Failed to create pack')
   118	      }
   119	      return res.json()
   120	    },
   121	    onSuccess: (data) => {
   122	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['packs'] })
   123	      setIsCreateModalOpen(false)
   124	      // Navigate to the new pack
   125	      navigate(`/packs/${encodeURIComponent(data.name)}`)
   126	    },
   127	  })
   128	
   129	  // Get unique user tags from all packs
   130	  const allUserTags = Array.from(
   131	    new Set(packs.flatMap(p => p.user_tags || []))
   132	  ).sort()
   133	
   134	  // Filter packs
   135	  const filteredPacks = packs.filter(pack => {
   136	    // Hide nsfw-pack-hide packs when blur is enabled
   137	    if (nsfwBlurEnabled && (pack.is_nsfw_hidden || pack.user_tags?.includes('nsfw-pack-hide'))) {
   138	      return false
   139	    }
   140	
   141	    // Search filter
   142	    if (searchQuery) {
   143	      const q = searchQuery.toLowerCase()
   144	      const matchesName = pack.name.toLowerCase().includes(q)
   145	      const matchesDesc = pack.description?.toLowerCase().includes(q)
   146	      const matchesTags = pack.tags?.some(t => t.toLowerCase().includes(q))
   147	      const matchesUserTags = pack.user_tags?.some(t => t.toLowerCase().includes(q))
   148	      if (!matchesName && !matchesDesc && !matchesTags && !matchesUserTags) return false
   149	    }
   150	
   151	    // User tag filter
   152	    if (selectedTag && !pack.user_tags?.includes(selectedTag)) return false
   153	
   154	    return true
   155	  })
   156	
   157	  // Zoom handlers
   158	  const zoomIn = () => {
   159	    if (cardSize === 'sm') setCardSize('md')
   160	    else if (cardSize === 'md') setCardSize('lg')
   161	  }
   162	
   163	  const zoomOut = () => {
   164	    if (cardSize === 'lg') setCardSize('md')
   165	    else if (cardSize === 'md') setCardSize('sm')
   166	  }
   167	
   168	  const cardWidth = CARD_WIDTHS[cardSize]
   169	
   170	  return (
   171	    <div className="space-y-6">
   172	      {/* Fullscreen image viewer */}
   173	      {fullscreenImage && (
   174	        <div
   175	          className="fixed inset-0 bg-black z-[90] flex items-center justify-center"
   176	          onClick={() => setFullscreenImage(null)}
   177	        >
   178	          <button
   179	            className="absolute top-6 right-6 p-3 bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 rounded-full transition-colors z-10"
   180	            onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); setFullscreenImage(null) }}
   181	          >
   182	            <X className="w-8 h-8 text-white" />
   183	          </button>
   184	          <img
   185	            src={fullscreenImage}
   186	            alt="Fullscreen preview"
   187	            className="max-w-[95vw] max-h-[95vh] object-contain"
   188	            onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
   189	          />
   190	        </div>
   191	      )}
   192	
   193	      {/* Header with zoom and create button */}
   194	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   195	        <div>
   196	          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-text-primary flex items-center gap-3">
   197	            <Package className="w-7 h-7 text-synapse" />
   198	            {t('packs.title')}
   199	          </h1>
   200	          <p className="text-text-muted mt-1">
   201	            {t('packs.subtitle', { count: packs.length })}
   202	          </p>
   203	        </div>
   204	
   205	        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   206	          {/* Updates badge button */}
   207	          {updatesCount > 0 && (
   208	            <Button
   209	              variant="secondary"
   210	              onClick={() => setIsUpdatesPanelOpen(true)}
   211	              className="relative transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-105"
   212	            >
   213	              <RefreshCw className="w-4 h-4" />
   214	              {t('updates.badge', { count: updatesCount })}
   215	              <span className="absolute -top-1.5 -right-1.5 w-5 h-5 bg-amber-500 text-white text-[10px] font-bold rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
   216	                {updatesCount}
   217	              </span>
   218	            </Button>
   219	          )}
   220	
   221	          {/* Check Updates Button */}
   222	          <Button
   223	            variant="secondary"
   224	            onClick={handleCheckUpdates}
   225	            disabled={isChecking}
   226	            className="transition-all duration-200"
   227	          >
   228	            {isChecking ? (
   229	              <>
   230	                <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
   231	                {checkProgress && checkProgress.total > 0
   232	                  ? `${checkProgress.current}/${checkProgress.total}`
   233	                  : t('updates.checkUpdates')
   234	                }
   235	              </>
   236	            ) : (
   237	              <>
   238	                <RefreshCw className="w-4 h-4" />
   239	                {t('updates.checkUpdates')}
   240	              </>
   241	            )}
   242	          </Button>
   243	
   244	          {/* Create Pack Button */}
   245	          <Button
   246	            variant="primary"
   247	            onClick={() => setIsCreateModalOpen(true)}
   248	            className="transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-synapse/20"
   249	          >
   250	            <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
   251	            {t('packs.create')}
   252	          </Button>
   253	
   254	          {/* Zoom controls */}
   255	          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 bg-slate-dark/80 backdrop-blur rounded-xl p-1 border border-slate-mid/50">
   256	            <button
   257	              onClick={zoomOut}
   258	              disabled={cardSize === 'sm'}
   259	              className="p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-mid disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-colors"
   260	              title={t('packs.zoom.out')}

   262	              <ZoomOut className="w-4 h-4 text-text-secondary" />

   265	            <button
   266	              onClick={zoomIn}
   267	              disabled={cardSize === 'lg'}
   268	              className="p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-mid disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-colors"
   269	              title={t('packs.zoom.in')}
   270	            >
   271	              <ZoomIn className="w-4 h-4 text-text-secondary" />
   272	            </button>
   273	          </div>
   274	        </div>
   275	      </div>
   276	
   277	      {/* Search and filters */}
   278	      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-4">
   279	        {/* Search */}
   280	        <div className="flex-1 min-w-[300px] relative">
   281	          <Search className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-5 h-5 text-text-muted" />
   282	          <input
   283	            type="text"
   284	            value={searchQuery}
   285	            onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
   286	            placeholder={t('packs.search')}
   287	            className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-3 bg-slate-dark border border-slate-mid rounded-xl text-text-primary placeholder-text-muted focus:outline-none focus:border-synapse transition-colors"
   288	          />
   289	        </div>
   290	
   291	        {/* User tag filter */}
   292	        {allUserTags.length > 0 && (
   293	          <select
   294	            value={selectedTag}
   295	            onChange={(e) => setSelectedTag(e.target.value)}
   296	            className="px-4 py-3 bg-slate-dark border border-slate-mid rounded-xl text-text-primary focus:outline-none focus:border-synapse cursor-pointer"
   297	          >
   298	            <option value="">{t('packs.filter.allTags')}</option>
   299	            {allUserTags.map(tag => (
   300	              <option key={tag} value={tag}>{tag}</option>
   301	            ))}
   302	          </select>
   303	        )}
   304	      </div>
   305	
   306	      {/* Active filters display */}
   307	      {selectedTag && (
   308	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
   309	          <span className="text-sm text-text-muted">{t('packs.filter.activeFilters')}:</span>
   310	          <button
   311	            onClick={() => setSelectedTag('')}
   312	            className="px-3 py-1 bg-pulse/20 text-pulse rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center gap-1 hover:bg-pulse/30"
   313	          >
   314	            <Tag className="w-3 h-3" />
   315	            {selectedTag}
   316	            <X className="w-3 h-3" />
   317	          </button>
   318	        </div>
   319	      )}
   320	
   321	      {/* Loading */}
   322	      {isLoading && (
   323	        <BreathingOrb size="lg" text={t('common.loading')} className="py-16" />
   324	      )}
   325	
   326	      {/* Error */}
   327	      {error && (
   328	        <div className="bg-red-900/20 border border-red-500/50 rounded-xl p-4 text-red-400">
   329	          <p className="font-medium">{t('errors.loadFailed')}</p>
   330	          <p className="text-sm mt-1">{(error as Error).message}</p>
   331	        </div>
   332	      )}
   333	
   334	      {/* Packs grid - CIVITAI STYLE */}
   335	      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-4">
   336	        {filteredPacks.map(pack => {
   337	          const thumbnailUrl = pack.thumbnail
   338	          // Check NSFW status from API flag OR user_tags
   339	          const isNsfwPack = pack.is_nsfw || pack.user_tags?.includes('nsfw-pack') || pack.nsfw_previews_count > 0
   340	
   341	          return (
   342	            <Link
   343	              key={pack.name}
   344	              to={`/packs/${encodeURIComponent(pack.name)}`}
   345	              className="group cursor-pointer"
   346	              style={{ width: cardWidth }}
   347	            >
   348	              {/* Card - Civitai style with Border + Inner Glow hover effect */}
   349	              <div className={clsx(
   350	                "relative aspect-[3/4] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden bg-slate-dark",
   351	                "transition-all duration-300 ease-out",
   352	                "shadow-md shadow-black/30",
   353	                "group-hover:scale-[1.03]",
   354	                "group-hover:shadow-[inset_0_0_40px_rgba(102,126,234,0.3),0_0_0_2px_rgba(102,126,234,0.6),0_8px_24px_rgba(102,126,234,0.3)]"
   355	              )}>
   356	                {/* Media preview with video autoPlay support */}
   357	                {thumbnailUrl ? (
   358	                  <MediaPreview
   359	                    src={thumbnailUrl}
   360	                    type={pack.thumbnail_type || 'image'}
   361	                    nsfw={isNsfwPack}
   362	                    aspectRatio="portrait"
   363	                    className="w-full h-full"
   364	                    autoPlay={true}
   365	                    playFullOnHover={true}
   366	                  />
   367	                ) : (
   368	                  <div className="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-dark to-slate-mid">
   369	                    <Package className="w-16 h-16 text-slate-mid" />
   370	                  </div>
   371	                )}
   372	
   373	                {/* Gradient overlay */}
   374	                <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/90 via-black/30 to-transparent pointer-events-none" />
   375	
   376	                {/* Top badges */}
   377	                <div className="absolute top-3 left-3 flex gap-1.5 flex-wrap max-w-[80%]">
   378	                  <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-lg text-xs text-white font-semibold flex items-center gap-1.5">
   379	                    {pack.pack_type && (
   380	                      <AssetKindIcon kind={pack.pack_type as AssetKind} size="sm" />
   381	                    )}
   382	                    {pack.pack_type ? getKindLabel(pack.pack_type as AssetKind) : t('packs.card.assets', { count: pack.assets_count })}
   383	                  </span>
   384	                </div>
   385	
   386	                {/* Unresolved warning */}
   387	                {pack.has_unresolved && (
   388	                  <div className="absolute top-3 right-3">
   389	                    <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-amber-500/90 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-lg text-xs text-white font-semibold flex items-center gap-1 animate-breathe">
   390	                      <AlertTriangle className="w-3 h-3" />
   391	                      {t('packs.card.needsSetup')}
   392	                    </span>
   393	                  </div>
   394	                )}
   395	
   396	                {/* User tags with special colors */}
   397	                {pack.user_tags && pack.user_tags.length > 0 && (
   398	                  <div className="absolute top-12 left-3 flex gap-1 flex-wrap max-w-[90%]">
   399	                    {pack.user_tags.slice(0, 3).map(tag => (
   400	                      <span
   401	                        key={tag}
   402	                        className={clsx(
   403	                          'px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs',
   404	                          getTagStyle(tag)
   405	                        )}
   406	                      >
   407	                        {tag}
   408	                      </span>
   409	                    ))}
   410	                  </div>
   411	                )}
   412	
   413	                {/* Bottom content */}
   414	                <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 p-3 space-y-2">
   415	                  {/* Title */}
   416	                  <h3 className="font-bold text-white text-sm leading-tight line-clamp-2 drop-shadow-lg">
   417	                    {pack.name}
   418	                  </h3>
   419	
   420	                  {/* Base model and version badges */}
   421	                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 flex-wrap">
   422	                    {pack.base_model && (
   423	                      <span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-white/20 rounded text-xs text-white/90">
   424	                        {pack.base_model}
   425	                      </span>
   426	                    )}
   427	                    <span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-white/10 rounded text-xs text-white/70">
   428	                      v{pack.version}
   429	                    </span>
   430	                  </div>
   431	                </div>
   432	              </div>
   433	            </Link>
   434	          )
   435	        })}
   436	      </div>
   437	
   438	      {/* Empty state */}
   439	      {!isLoading && filteredPacks.length === 0 && (
   440	        <div className="text-center py-12">
   441	          <Package className="w-16 h-16 text-slate-mid mx-auto mb-4" />
   442	          <p className="text-text-muted mb-4">
   443	            {packs.length === 0
   444	              ? t('packs.empty.noPacks')
   445	              : t('packs.empty.noMatch')}
   446	          </p>
   447	          {packs.length === 0 && (
   448	            <Button
   449	              variant="primary"
   450	              onClick={() => setIsCreateModalOpen(true)}
   451	              className="transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-105"
   452	            >
   453	              <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
   454	              {t('packs.create')}
   455	            </Button>
   456	          )}
   457	        </div>
   458	      )}
   459	
   460	      {/* Create Pack Modal */}
   461	      <CreatePackModal
   462	        isOpen={isCreateModalOpen}
   463	        onClose={() => setIsCreateModalOpen(false)}
   464	        onCreate={createPackMutation.mutateAsync}
   465	        isCreating={createPackMutation.isPending}
   466	      />
   467	
   468	      {/* Updates Panel */}
   469	      <UpdatesPanel
   470	        open={isUpdatesPanelOpen}
   471	        onClose={() => setIsUpdatesPanelOpen(false)}
   472	      />
   473	    </div>
   474	  )
   475	}

     1	/**
     2	 * PackDetailPage
     3	 *
     4	 * Integrated pack detail page using modular components from pack-detail/.
     5	 *
     6	 * ARCHITECTURE:
     7	 * - Hooks: usePackData, usePackDownloads, usePackEdit, usePackPlugin
     8	 * - Sections: PackHeader, PackGallery, PackInfoSection, etc.
     9	 * - Modals: EditPackModal, BaseModelResolverModal, etc.
    10	 * - Plugins: CivitaiPlugin, CustomPlugin, InstallPlugin
    11	 *
    12	 * This file is the orchestrator - it connects hooks to components.
    13	 */
    14	
    15	import { useState, useMemo, useCallback } from 'react'
    16	import { useParams, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'
    17	import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
    18	import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'
    19	import { ArrowLeft } from 'lucide-react'
    20	
    21	import { FullscreenMediaViewer } from '@/components/ui/FullscreenMediaViewer'
    22	import { BreathingOrb } from '@/components/ui/BreathingOrb'
    23	import { Button } from '@/components/ui/Button'
    24	
    25	// Modular pack-detail components
    26	import {
    27	  // Hooks
    28	  usePackData,
    29	  usePackDownloads,
    30	  usePackEdit,
    31	  usePackPlugin,
    32	  // Sections
    33	  PackHeader,
    34	  PackGallery,
    35	  PackInfoSection,
    36	  PackDependenciesSection,
    37	  PackDepsSection,
    38	  PackWorkflowsSection,
    39	  PackParametersSection,
    40	  PackStorageSection,
    41	  PackUserTagsSection,
    42	  // Modals
    43	  EditPackModal,
    44	  EditParametersModal,
    45	  UploadWorkflowModal,
    46	  BaseModelResolverModal,
    47	  EditPreviewsModal,
    48	  DescriptionEditorModal,
    49	  // Shared
    50	  ErrorBoundary,
    51	  SectionErrorBoundary,
    52	  // Types
    53	  type LocalModel,
    54	  type BaseModelSearchResponse,
    55	  type HuggingFaceFile,
    56	  type AssetInfo,
    57	  type ModalState,
    58	  // Constants
    59	  DEFAULT_MODAL_STATE,
    60	  QUERY_KEYS,
    61	} from './pack-detail'
    62	
    63	// Legacy components still used
    64	import {
    65	  PullConfirmDialog,
    66	  PushConfirmDialog,
    67	} from './packs'
    68	
    69	// =============================================================================
    70	// Component
    71	// =============================================================================
    72	
    73	function PackDetailPageContent() {
    74	  const { packName: packNameParam } = useParams<{ packName: string }>()
    75	  const navigate = useNavigate()
    76	  const { t } = useTranslation()
    77	
    78	  // Decode pack name from URL
    79	  const packName = packNameParam ? decodeURIComponent(packNameParam) : ''
    80	
    81	  // ==========================================================================
    82	  // Hooks
    83	  // ==========================================================================
    84	
    85	  // Main pack data and mutations
    86	  const packData = usePackData({
    87	    packName,
    88	    onDeleteSuccess: () => navigate('/'),
    89	  })
    90	
    91	  // Download progress tracking
    92	  const downloads = usePackDownloads({
    93	    packName,
    94	  })
    95

   115

   141

   160	  const [resolverTab, setResolverTab] = useState<'local' | 'civitai' | 'huggingface'>('local')
   161	  const [searchTrigger, setSearchTrigger] = useState('')
   162	
   163	  // Local models from ComfyUI
   164	  const { data: localModels = [], isLoading: isLoadingLocalModels } = useQuery<LocalModel[]>({
   165	    queryKey: QUERY_KEYS.localModels('checkpoints'),
   166	    queryFn: async () => {
   167	      const res = await fetch('/api/comfyui/models/checkpoints')
   168	      if (!res.ok) return []
   169	      const data = await res.json()
   170	      return (data || []).map((m: { name: string; path: string; size?: number }) => ({
   171	        name: m.name,
   172	        path: m.path,
   173	        type: 'checkpoint',
   174	        size: m.size,
   175	      }))
   176	    },
   177	    enabled: modals.baseModelResolver,
   178	  })
   179	
   180	  // Remote search (Civitai/HuggingFace)
   181	  const { data: searchResponse, isLoading: isSearching } = useQuery<BaseModelSearchResponse>({
   182	    queryKey: QUERY_KEYS.baseModelSearch(resolverTab, searchTrigger),
   183	    queryFn: async () => {
   184	      if (!searchTrigger || searchTrigger.length < 2) {
   185	        return { results: [], total_found: 0, source: resolverTab, search_query: '' }
   186	      }
   187	      if (resolverTab !== 'civitai' && resolverTab !== 'huggingface') {
   188	        return { results: [], total_found: 0, source: resolverTab, search_query: '' }
   189	      }
   190	
   191	      const params = new URLSearchParams({
   192	        query: searchTrigger,
   193	        source: resolverTab,
   194	        limit: '30',
   195	        max_batches: '3',
   196	      })
   197	      const res = await fetch(`/api/browse/base-models/search?${params}`)
   198	      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Search failed')
   199	      return res.json()
   200	    },
   201	    enabled:
   202	      modals.baseModelResolver &&
   203	      (resolverTab === 'civitai' || resolverTab === 'huggingface') &&
   204	      searchTrigger.length >= 2,
   205	    staleTime: 60000,
   206	  })
   207	
   208	  const handleBaseModelSearch = useCallback(
   209	    (query: string, source: 'civitai' | 'huggingface') => {
   210	      setResolverTab(source)

   213	    []
   214	  )
   215	
   216	  const handleFetchHfFiles = useCallback(async (repoId: string): Promise<HuggingFaceFile[]> => {

   220	      return res.json()

   222	      return []
   223	    }

   225	
   226	  // ==========================================================================
   227	  // Handlers
   228	  // ==========================================================================
   229	
   230	  // Dependencies section handlers

   235	        set.add(d.asset_name)

   237	    })
   238	    return set
   239	  }, [downloads.activeDownloads])
   240	
   241	  const handleRestoreFromBackup = useCallback(
   242	    async (_asset: AssetInfo) => {

   249

   253	  // ==========================================================================

   255	  // ==========================================================================
   256	
   257	  // Loading state
   258	  if (packData.isLoading) {
   259	    return (
   260	      <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh]">

   260	      <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh]">

   266	  // Error state
   267	  if (packData.error) {

   283	  if (!packData.pack) {
   284	    return (
   285	      <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh] gap-4">
   286	        <p className="text-text-muted">{t('packDetail.notFound')}</p>
   287	        <Button variant="secondary" onClick={() => navigate('/')}>
   288	          <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" />
   289	          {t('packDetail.backToPacks')}
   290	        </Button>
   291	      </div>
   292	    )
   293	  }
   294	
   295	  const { pack, backupStatus } = packData
   296	
   297	  return (
   298	    <div className="space-y-8 pb-12">
   299	      {/* Back Button */}
   300	      <Button
   301	        variant="secondary"
   302	        onClick={() => navigate('/')}
   303	        className="opacity-70 hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity"
   304	      >
   305	        <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" />
   306	        {t('packDetail.backToPacks')}
   307	      </Button>
   308	
   309	      {/* Header Section */}
   310	      {/*
   311	        Edit mode: We use modal-based editing via per-section Edit buttons

   313	        is for inline editing which isn't implemented yet, so we don't pass onStartEdit.
   314	      */}
   315	      <PackHeader
   316	        pack={pack}
   317	        onUsePack={packData.usePack}
   318	        onDelete={packData.deletePack}
   319	        isUsingPack={packData.isUsingPack}
   320	        isDeleting={packData.isDeleting}
   321	        animationDelay={0}
   322	        // Plugin header actions are rendered inside PackHeader via pluginActions prop
   323	        pluginActions={pluginContext && plugin?.renderHeaderActions?.(pluginContext)}
   324	      />

   326	      {/* Gallery Section */}
   327	      {pack.previews && pack.previews.length > 0 && (
   328	        <SectionErrorBoundary sectionName="Gallery" onRetry={packData.refetch}>

   330	            previews={pack.previews}
   331	            onPreviewClick={(index) => setFullscreenIndex(index)}
   332	            onEdit={plugin?.features?.canEditPreviews ? () => openModal('editPreviews') : undefined}
   333	            animationDelay={50}
   334	          />
   335	        </SectionErrorBoundary>
   336	      )}
   337	
   338	      {/* Info Section */}
   339	      <SectionErrorBoundary sectionName="Information" onRetry={packData.refetch}>
   340	        <PackInfoSection
   341	          pack={pack}
   342	          onEditDescription={plugin?.features?.canEditMetadata ? () => openModal('markdownEditor') : undefined}
   343	          animationDelay={100}
   344	        />
   345	      </SectionErrorBoundary>
   346	
   347	      {/* User Tags Section - always editable even for Civitai packs */}
   348	      <SectionErrorBoundary sectionName="User Tags" onRetry={packData.refetch}>

   350	          tags={pack.user_tags || []}
   351	          onEdit={() => openModal('editPack')}
   352	          animationDelay={125}
   353	        />
   354	      </SectionErrorBoundary>
   355	
   356	      {/* Dependencies Section */}
   357	      <SectionErrorBoundary sectionName="Dependencies" onRetry={packData.refetch}>
   358	        <PackDependenciesSection
   359	          assets={pack.assets}
   360	          backupStatus={backupStatus}
   361	          downloadingAssets={downloadingAssetsSet}
   362	          getAssetDownload={downloads.getAssetDownload}
   363	          onDownloadAll={downloads.downloadAll}
   364	          onDownloadAsset={downloads.downloadAsset}
   365	          onRestoreFromBackup={handleRestoreFromBackup}
   366	          onDeleteResource={packData.deleteResource}
   367	          onOpenBaseModelResolver={() => openModal('baseModelResolver')}
   368	          onResolvePack={packData.resolvePack}
   369	          onSetAsBaseModel={(asset) => packData.setAsBaseModel(asset.name)}
   370	          isDownloadAllPending={downloads.isDownloadingAll}
   371	          isResolvePending={packData.isResolvingPack}
   372	          animationDelay={150}
   373	        />
   374	      </SectionErrorBoundary>
   375	
   376	      {/* Pack Dependencies Section (pack-to-pack) - right after file dependencies */}
   377	      {pluginContext && (
   378	        <SectionErrorBoundary sectionName="Pack Dependencies" onRetry={packData.refetch}>
   379	          <PackDepsSection context={pluginContext} />
   380	        </SectionErrorBoundary>
   381	      )}
   382	
   383	      {/* Workflows Section */}
   384	      <SectionErrorBoundary sectionName="Workflows" onRetry={packData.refetch}>
   385	        <PackWorkflowsSection
   386	          workflows={pack.workflows}
   387	          packName={pack.name}
   388	          needsBaseModel={pack.has_unresolved}
   389	          onCreateSymlink={packData.createSymlink}
   390	          onRemoveSymlink={packData.removeSymlink}
   391	          onDeleteWorkflow={packData.deleteWorkflow}
   392	          onGenerateWorkflow={packData.generateWorkflow}
   393	          onOpenUploadModal={() => openModal('uploadWorkflow')}
   394	          isCreateSymlinkPending={packData.isCreatingSymlink}
   395	          isRemoveSymlinkPending={packData.isRemovingSymlink}
   396	          isDeletePending={packData.isDeletingWorkflow}
   397	          isGeneratePending={packData.isGeneratingWorkflow}
   398	          animationDelay={200}
   399	        />
   400	      </SectionErrorBoundary>
   401	
   402	      {/* Parameters Section */}
   403	      <SectionErrorBoundary sectionName="Parameters" onRetry={packData.refetch}>
   404	        <PackParametersSection
   405	          parameters={pack.parameters}
   406	          modelInfo={pack.model_info}
   407	          onEdit={() => openModal('editParameters')}
   408	          animationDelay={250}
   409	        />
   410	      </SectionErrorBoundary>
   411	
   412	      {/* Storage Section */}
   413	      <SectionErrorBoundary sectionName="Storage" onRetry={packData.refetch}>
   414	        <PackStorageSection
   415	          backupStatus={backupStatus}
   416	          isLoading={packData.isBackupStatusLoading}
   417	          onPull={() => openModal('pullConfirm')}
   418	          onPush={() => {
   419	            setPushWithCleanup(false)
   420	            openModal('pushConfirm')
   421	          }}
   422	          onPushAndFree={() => {
   423	            setPushWithCleanup(true)
   424	            openModal('pushConfirm')
   425	          }}
   426	          isPulling={packData.isPullingPack}
   427	          isPushing={packData.isPushingPack}
   428	          animationDelay={300}
   429	        />
   430	      </SectionErrorBoundary>
   431	
   432	      {/* =====================================================================
   433	          PLUGIN SECTIONS
   434	          ===================================================================== */}
   435	
   436	      {/* Plugin Extra Sections (CivitaiPlugin: updates, CustomPlugin: pack deps, etc.) */}
   437	      {pluginContext && plugin?.renderExtraSections && (
   438	        <SectionErrorBoundary
   439	          sectionName={`${plugin.name || 'Plugin'} Sections`}
   440	          onRetry={packData.refetch}
   441	        >
   442	          {plugin.renderExtraSections(pluginContext)}
   443	        </SectionErrorBoundary>
   444	      )}
   445	
   446	      {/* Plugin Modals - wrapped in error boundary for safety */}
   447	      <ErrorBoundary
   448	        onError={(error) => {
   449	          console.error('[PackDetailPage] Plugin modal error:', error)
   450	        }}
   451	      >
   452	        {pluginContext && plugin?.renderModals?.(pluginContext)}
   453	      </ErrorBoundary>
   454	
   455	      {/* =====================================================================
   456	          MODALS
   457	          ===================================================================== */}
   458	
   459	      {/* Fullscreen Gallery Viewer */}
   460	      <FullscreenMediaViewer
   461	        isOpen={isFullscreenOpen}
   462	        items={mediaItems}
   463	        initialIndex={fullscreenIndex}
   464	        onClose={() => setFullscreenIndex(-1)}
   465	      />
   466	
   467	      {/* Edit Pack Modal (User Tags) */}
   468	      <EditPackModal
   469	        isOpen={modals.editPack}
   470	        initialTags={pack.user_tags}
   471	        onSave={(tags) => {
   472	          packData.updatePack({ user_tags: tags })
   473	          closeModal('editPack')
   474	        }}
   475	        onClose={() => closeModal('editPack')}
   476	        isSaving={packData.isUpdatingPack}
   477	      />
   478	
   479	      {/* Edit Parameters Modal */}
   480	      <EditParametersModal
   481	        isOpen={modals.editParameters}
   482	        initialParameters={
   483	          pack.parameters
   484	            ? Object.fromEntries(
   485	                Object.entries(pack.parameters).map(([k, v]) => [k, String(v ?? '')])
   486	              )
   487	            : {}
   488	        }
   489	        onSave={(params) => {
   490	          packData.updateParameters(params as Record<string, unknown>)
   491	          closeModal('editParameters')
   492	        }}
   493	        onClose={() => closeModal('editParameters')}
   494	        isSaving={packData.isUpdatingParameters}
   495	      />
   496	
   497	      {/* Upload Workflow Modal */}
   498	      <UploadWorkflowModal
   499	        isOpen={modals.uploadWorkflow}
   500	        onUpload={(data) => {
   501	          packData.uploadWorkflow(data)
   502	          closeModal('uploadWorkflow')
   503	        }}
   504	        onClose={() => closeModal('uploadWorkflow')}
   505	        isUploading={packData.isUploadingWorkflow}
   506	      />
   507	
   508	      {/* Base Model Resolver Modal */}
   509	      <BaseModelResolverModal
   510	        isOpen={modals.baseModelResolver}
   511	        packDescription={pack.description}
   512	        localModels={localModels}
   513	        isLoadingLocalModels={isLoadingLocalModels}
   514	        searchResponse={searchResponse}
   515	        isSearching={isSearching}
   516	        onSearch={handleBaseModelSearch}
   517	        onFetchHfFiles={handleFetchHfFiles}
   518	        onResolve={(data) => {
   519	          packData.resolveBaseModel(data)
   520	          closeModal('baseModelResolver')
   521	        }}
   522	        onClose={() => closeModal('baseModelResolver')}
   523	        isResolving={packData.isResolvingBaseModel}
   524	      />
   525	
   526	      {/* Edit Previews Modal */}
   527	      <EditPreviewsModal
   528	        isOpen={modals.editPreviews}
   529	        previews={pack.previews}
   530	        coverUrl={pack.cover_url}
   531	        onSave={async (data) => {
   532	          try {
   533	            // Get deleted filenames from original pack
   534	            const deletedFilenames = data.removedIndices
   535	              ?.map(index => pack.previews[index]?.filename)
   536	              .filter(Boolean) as string[] | undefined
   537	
   538	            // Get new order (only existing files, not blob URLs)
   539	            const order = data.previews
   540	              .filter(p => !p.url?.startsWith('blob:'))
   541	              .map(p => p.filename)
   542	
   543	            // Get cover filename if changed
   544	            let coverFilename: string | undefined
   545	            const packCoverUrl = pack.cover_url
   546	            if (data.coverUrl && data.coverUrl !== packCoverUrl) {
   547	              const coverPreview = data.previews.find(p => p.url === data.coverUrl)
   548	              if (coverPreview?.filename && !coverPreview.url?.startsWith('blob:')) {
   549	                coverFilename = coverPreview.filename
   550	              }
   551	            }
   552	
   553	            // Single batch update - atomic, no race conditions
   554	            await packData.batchUpdatePreviews({
   555	              files: data.addedFiles,
   556	              order,
   557	              coverFilename,
   558	              deleted: deletedFilenames,
   559	            })
   560	
   561	            closeModal('editPreviews')
   562	          } catch (error) {
   563	            console.error('[PackDetailPage] Error saving previews:', error)
   564	          }
   565	        }}
   566	        onClose={() => closeModal('editPreviews')}
   567	        isSaving={packData.isBatchUpdatingPreviews}
   568	      />
   569	
   570	      {/* Description Editor Modal */}
   571	      <DescriptionEditorModal
   572	        isOpen={modals.markdownEditor}
   573	        content={pack.description || ''}
   574	        onSave={(content) => {
   575	          packData.updateDescription(content)
   576	          closeModal('markdownEditor')
   577	        }}
   578	        onClose={() => closeModal('markdownEditor')}
   579	        isSaving={packData.isUpdatingDescription}
   580	      />
   581	
   582	      {/* Pull Confirm Dialog */}
   583	      <PullConfirmDialog
   584	        isOpen={modals.pullConfirm}
   585	        onConfirm={() => {
   586	          packData.pullPack()
   587	          closeModal('pullConfirm')
   588	        }}
   589	        onClose={() => closeModal('pullConfirm')}
   590	        isLoading={packData.isPullingPack}
   591	        packName={pack.name}
   592	        blobs={backupStatus?.blobs?.filter(b => b.location === 'backup_only') || []}
   593	      />
   594	
   595	      {/* Push Confirm Dialog */}
   596	      <PushConfirmDialog
   597	        isOpen={modals.pushConfirm}
   598	        onConfirm={(cleanup) => {
   599	          packData.pushPack(cleanup)
   600	          closeModal('pushConfirm')
   601	        }}
   602	        onClose={() => closeModal('pushConfirm')}
   603	        isLoading={packData.isPushingPack}
   604	        packName={pack.name}
   605	        blobs={backupStatus?.blobs?.filter(b => b.location === 'local_only') || []}
   606	        initialCleanup={pushWithCleanup}
   607	      />
   608	    </div>
   609	  )
   610	}
   611	
   612	// =============================================================================
   613	// Exported Component with Error Boundary
   614	// =============================================================================
   615	
   616	export function PackDetailPage() {
   617	  return (
   618	    <ErrorBoundary
   619	      onError={(error, errorInfo) => {
   620	        console.error('[PackDetailPage] Error caught by boundary:', error)
   621	        console.error('[PackDetailPage] Component stack:', errorInfo.componentStack)
   622	      }}
   623	    >
   624	      <PackDetailPageContent />
   625	    </ErrorBoundary>
   626	  )
   627	}
   628	
   629	export default PackDetailPage

     1	/**
     2	 * CreatePackModal
     3	 *
     4	 * Modal wizard for creating a new custom pack from scratch.
     5	 *
     6	 * Features:
     7	 * - Pack name and type selection
     8	 * - Optional metadata (description, base model, author)
     9	 * - Tags and trigger words
    10	 * - Validation before creation
    11	 * - i18n support
    12	 */
    13	
    14	import { useState, type KeyboardEvent } from 'react'
    15	import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'
    16	import {
    17	  X,
    18	  Loader2,
    19	  Package,
    20	  Plus,
    21	  Tag,
    22	  Sparkles,
    23	  FileText,
    24	  User,
    25	  Hash,
    26	} from 'lucide-react'
    27	import { clsx } from 'clsx'
    28	import { Button } from '@/components/ui/Button'
    29	import { ANIMATION_PRESETS, ASSET_TYPE_ICONS } from '../constants'
    30	import type { AssetType } from '../types'
    31	
    32	// =============================================================================
    33	// Types
    34	// =============================================================================
    35	
    36	export interface CreatePackModalProps {
    37	  /**
    38	   * Whether modal is open
    39	   */
    40	  isOpen: boolean
    41	
    42	  /**
    43	   * Handler for close/cancel
    44	   */
    45	  onClose: () => void
    46	
    47	  /**
    48	   * Handler for creating pack
    49	   */
    50	  onCreate: (data: CreatePackData) => Promise<void>
    51	
    52	  /**
    53	   * Whether creation is in progress
    54	   */
    55	  isCreating?: boolean
    56	}
    57	
    58	export interface CreatePackData {
    59	  name: string
    60	  pack_type: string
    61	  description?: string
    62	  base_model?: string
    63	  version: string
    64	  author?: string
    65	  tags: string[]
    66	  user_tags: string[]
    67	  trigger_words: string[]
    68	}
    69	
    70	// =============================================================================
    71	// Pack Type Options
    72	// =============================================================================
    73	
    74	const PACK_TYPES: { value: AssetType }[] = [
    75	  { value: 'lora' },
    76	  { value: 'checkpoint' },
    77	  { value: 'vae' },
    78	  { value: 'controlnet' },
    79	  { value: 'embedding' },
    80	  { value: 'upscaler' },
    81	]
    82	
    83	// =============================================================================
    84	// Tag Input Component
    85	// =============================================================================
    86	
    87	interface TagInputProps {
    88	  tags: string[]
    89	  onChange: (tags: string[]) => void
    90	  placeholder?: string
    91	  label?: string
    92	  hint?: string
    93	}
    94	
    95	function TagInput({ tags, onChange, placeholder, label, hint }: TagInputProps) {
    96	  const [inputValue, setInputValue] = useState('')
    97	
    98	  const addTag = (value: string) => {
    99	    const trimmed = value.trim().toLowerCase()
   100	    if (trimmed && !tags.includes(trimmed)) {
   101	      onChange([...tags, trimmed])
   102	    }
   103	    setInputValue('')
   104	  }
   105	
   106	  const removeTag = (tag: string) => {
   107	    onChange(tags.filter(t => t !== tag))
   108	  }
   109	
   110	  const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
   111	    if (e.key === 'Enter') {
   112	      e.preventDefault()
   113	      addTag(inputValue)
   114	    } else if (e.key === 'Backspace' && !inputValue && tags.length > 0) {
   115	      removeTag(tags[tags.length - 1])
   116	    }
   117	  }
   118	
   119	  return (
   120	    <div>
   121	      {label && (
   122	        <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-text-primary mb-1.5">
   123	          {label}
   124	        </label>
   125	      )}
   126	      <div className={clsx(
   127	        'flex flex-wrap gap-2 p-3 rounded-lg',
   128	        'bg-slate-dark border border-slate-mid',
   129	        'focus-within:border-synapse focus-within:ring-1 focus-within:ring-synapse/30',
   130	        'transition-all duration-200'
   131	      )}>
   132	        {tags.map(tag => (
   133	          <span
   134	            key={tag}
   135	            className={clsx(
   136	              'inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm',
   137	              'bg-synapse/20 text-synapse border border-synapse/30'
   138	            )}
   139	          >
   140	            <Tag className="w-3 h-3" />
   141	            {tag}
   142	            <button
   143	              type="button"
   144	              onClick={() => removeTag(tag)}
   145	              className="hover:text-red-400 transition-colors"
   146	            >
   147	              <X className="w-3 h-3" />
   148	            </button>
   149	          </span>
   150	        ))}
   151	        <input
   152	          type="text"
   153	          value={inputValue}
   154	          onChange={(e) => setInputValue(e.target.value)}
   155	          onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
   156	          placeholder={tags.length === 0 ? placeholder : ''}
   157	          className={clsx(
   158	            'flex-1 min-w-[120px] bg-transparent outline-none',
   159	            'text-text-primary placeholder:text-text-muted'
   160	          )}
   161	        />
   162	      </div>
   163	      {hint && (
   164	        <p className="text-xs text-text-muted mt-1">{hint}</p>
   165	      )}
   166	    </div>
   167	  )
   168	}
   169	
   170	// =============================================================================
   171	// Main Component
   172	// =============================================================================
   173	
   174	export function CreatePackModal({
   175	  isOpen,
   176	  onClose,
   177	  onCreate,
   178	  isCreating = false,
   179	}: CreatePackModalProps) {
   180	  const { t } = useTranslation()
   181	
   182	  // Form state
   183	  const [name, setName] = useState('')
   184	  const [packType, setPackType] = useState<AssetType>('lora')
   185	  const [description, setDescription] = useState('')
   186	  const [baseModel, setBaseModel] = useState('')
   187	  const [version, setVersion] = useState('1.0.0')
   188	  const [author, setAuthor] = useState('')
   189	  const [tags, setTags] = useState<string[]>([])
   190	  const [triggerWords, setTriggerWords] = useState<string[]>([])
   191	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
   192	
   193	  // Validation
   194	  const isValid = name.trim().length > 0
   195	
   196	  // Handle create
   197	  const handleCreate = async () => {
   198	    if (!isValid) return
   199	
   200	    setError(null)
   201	
   202	    try {
   203	      await onCreate({
   204	        name: name.trim(),
   205	        pack_type: packType,
   206	        description: description.trim() || undefined,
   207	        base_model: baseModel.trim() || undefined,
   208	        version: version.trim() || '1.0.0',
   209	        author: author.trim() || undefined,
   210	        tags,
   211	        user_tags: [],
   212	        trigger_words: triggerWords,
   213	      })
   214	    } catch (err) {
   215	      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : t('pack.modals.create.error'))
   216	    }
   217	  }
   218	
   219	  // Reset form
   220	  const handleClose = () => {
   221	    setName('')
   222	    setPackType('lora')
   223	    setDescription('')
   224	    setBaseModel('')
   225	    setVersion('1.0.0')
   226	    setAuthor('')
   227	    setTags([])
   228	    setTriggerWords([])
   229	    setError(null)
   230	    onClose()
   231	  }
   232	
   233	  if (!isOpen) return null
   234	
   235	  return (
   236	    <div
   237	      className={clsx(
   238	        "fixed inset-0 bg-black/70 z-50",
   239	        "flex items-center justify-center p-4",
   240	        ANIMATION_PRESETS.fadeIn
   241	      )}
   242	      onClick={(e) => {
   243	        if (e.target === e.currentTarget) handleClose()
   244	      }}
   245	    >
   246	      <div
   247	        className={clsx(
   248	          "bg-slate-deep rounded-2xl max-w-2xl w-full max-h-[90vh]",
   249	          "border border-slate-mid/50",
   250	          "shadow-2xl flex flex-col",
   251	          ANIMATION_PRESETS.scaleIn
   252	        )}
   253	        onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
   254	      >
   255	        {/* Header */}
   256	        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-6 border-b border-slate-mid/50">
   257	          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   258	            <div className="p-2 rounded-xl bg-synapse/20">
   259	              <Package className="w-6 h-6 text-synapse" />
   260	            </div>
   261	            <div>
   262	              <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-text-primary">
   263	                {t('pack.modals.create.title')}
   264	              </h3>
   265	              <p className="text-sm text-text-muted">
   266	                {t('pack.modals.create.subtitle')}
   267	              </p>
   268	            </div>
   269	          </div>
   270	          <button
   271	            onClick={handleClose}
   272	            className={clsx(
   273	              "p-2 rounded-lg",
   274	              "hover:bg-slate-mid transition-colors duration-200"
   275	            )}
   276	          >
   277	            <X className="w-5 h-5 text-text-muted" />
   278	          </button>
   279	        </div>
   280	
   281	        {/* Content */}
   282	        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 space-y-6">
   283	          {/* Error message */}
   284	          {error && (
   285	            <div className="p-3 rounded-lg bg-red-500/20 border border-red-500/30 text-red-400 text-sm">
   286	              {error}
   287	            </div>
   288	          )}
   289	
   290	          {/* Name field - Required */}
   291	          <div>
   292	            <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-text-primary mb-1.5">
   293	              {t('pack.modals.create.name')} <span className="text-red-400">*</span>
   294	            </label>
   295	            <div className="relative">
   296	              <Package className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-5 h-5 text-text-muted" />
   297	              <input
   298	                type="text"
   299	                value={name}
   300	                onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)}

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/**
     2	 * CustomPlugin
     3	 *
     4	 * Plugin for custom (locally created) packs.
     5	 *
     6	 * FEATURES:
     7	 * - Full editability of all fields
     8	 * - Pack dependencies management (via PackDepsSection)
     9	 * - Support for 7+ asset dependencies
    10	 * - Markdown description editor
    11	 * - Preview management
    12	 *
    13	 * This is the DEFAULT plugin - used as fallback when no other plugin matches.
    14	 */
    15	
    16	import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'
    17	import {
    18	  Check,
    19	  Edit3,
    20	} from 'lucide-react'
    21	import { clsx } from 'clsx'
    22	import { Card } from '@/components/ui/Card'
    23	import type { PackDetail } from '../types'
    24	import type {
    25	  PackPlugin,
    26	  PluginContext,
    27	  PluginBadge,
    28	} from './types'
    29	import i18n from '@/i18n'
    30	import { ANIMATION_PRESETS } from '../constants'
    31	
    32	// =============================================================================
    33	// Edit Capabilities Info
    34	// =============================================================================
    35	
    36	interface EditCapabilitiesInfoProps {
    37	  context: PluginContext
    38	}
    39	
    40	function EditCapabilitiesInfo({ context }: EditCapabilitiesInfoProps) {
    41	  const { t } = useTranslation()
    42	  const { isEditing } = context
    43	
    44	  if (!isEditing) return null
    45	
    46	  return (
    47	    <Card className={clsx('p-4 bg-synapse/10 border-synapse/30', ANIMATION_PRESETS.fadeIn)}>
    48	      <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
    49	        <div className="p-2 bg-synapse/20 rounded-lg">
    50	          <Edit3 className="w-5 h-5 text-synapse" />
    51	        </div>
    52	        <div>
    53	          <h3 className="font-medium text-text-primary">{t('pack.plugins.custom.fullEditMode')}</h3>
    54	          <p className="text-sm text-text-muted mt-1">
    55	            {t('pack.plugins.custom.fullEditDesc')}
    56	          </p>
    57	          <ul className="text-sm text-text-muted mt-2 space-y-1">
    58	            <li className="flex items-center gap-2">
    59	              <Check className="w-3 h-3 text-synapse" />
    60	              {t('pack.plugins.custom.editName')}
    61	            </li>
    62	            <li className="flex items-center gap-2">
    63	              <Check className="w-3 h-3 text-synapse" />
    64	              {t('pack.plugins.custom.editPreviews')}
    65	            </li>
    66	            <li className="flex items-center gap-2">
    67	              <Check className="w-3 h-3 text-synapse" />
    68	              {t('pack.plugins.custom.editDeps')}
    69	            </li>
    70	            <li className="flex items-center gap-2">
    71	              <Check className="w-3 h-3 text-synapse" />
    72	              {t('pack.plugins.custom.editWorkflows')}
    73	            </li>
    74	          </ul>
    75	        </div>
    76	      </div>
    77	    </Card>
    78	  )
    79	}
    80	
    81	// =============================================================================
    82	// Plugin Definition
    83	// =============================================================================
    84	
    85	export const CustomPlugin: PackPlugin = {
    86	  id: 'custom',
    87	  get name() { return i18n.t('pack.plugins.custom.title') },
    88	  priority: 0, // Lowest - fallback
    89	
    90	  appliesTo: (pack: PackDetail) => {
    91	    // Match custom packs or use as fallback
    92	    return pack.pack?.pack_category === 'custom' || true
    93	  },
    94	
    95	  getBadge: (pack: PackDetail): PluginBadge | null => {
    96	    // Only show badge for explicitly custom packs
    97	    if (pack.pack?.pack_category === 'custom') {
    98	      return {
    99	        label: i18n.t('pack.plugins.custom.title'),
   100	        variant: 'success',
   101	        icon: 'Package',
   102	        tooltip: i18n.t('pack.plugins.custom.localPack'),
   103	      }
   104	    }
   105	    return null
   106	  },
   107	
   108	  features: {
   109	    canEditMetadata: true,
   110	    canEditPreviews: true,
   111	    canEditDependencies: true,
   112	    canEditWorkflows: true,
   113	    canEditParameters: true,
   114	    canCheckUpdates: false,
   115	    canManagePackDependencies: true,
   116	    canRunScripts: false,
   117	    canDelete: true,
   118	  },
   119	
   120	  renderHeaderActions: (_context: PluginContext) => {
   121	    // Custom packs don't need extra header actions
   122	    // Edit button is already provided by the main header
   123	    return null
   124	  },
   125	
   126	  renderExtraSections: (context: PluginContext) => {
   127	    return (
   128	      <div className="space-y-4">
   129	        <EditCapabilitiesInfo context={context} />
   130	      </div>
   131	    )
   132	  },
   133	
   134	  onPackLoad: (_pack: PackDetail) => {
   135	    // Pack loaded
   136	  },
   137	
   138	  validateChanges: (_pack, changes) => {
   139	    const errors: Record<string, string> = {}
   140	
   141	    // Validate name if changed
   142	    if (changes.name !== undefined) {
   143	      if (!changes.name || changes.name.trim() === '') {
   144	        errors.name = i18n.t('pack.plugins.custom.nameRequired')
   145	      } else if (changes.name.length > 100) {
   146	        errors.name = i18n.t('pack.plugins.custom.nameTooLong')
   147	      }
   148	    }
   149	
   150	    // Validate version if changed
   151	    if (changes.version !== undefined) {
   152	      const versionRegex = /^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/
   153	      if (changes.version && !versionRegex.test(changes.version)) {
   154	        errors.version = i18n.t('pack.plugins.custom.invalidVersion')
   155	      }
   156	    }
   157	
   158	    return {
   159	      valid: Object.keys(errors).length === 0,
   160	      errors,
   161	    }
   162	  },
   163	
   164	  onBeforeSave: (_pack, changes) => {
   165	    // Clean up changes before save
   166	    const cleanedChanges = { ...changes }
   167	
   168	    // Trim strings
   169	    if (cleanedChanges.name) {
   170	      cleanedChanges.name = cleanedChanges.name.trim()
   171	    }
   172	    if (cleanedChanges.description) {
   173	      cleanedChanges.description = cleanedChanges.description.trim()
   174	    }
   175	
   176	    return { changes: cleanedChanges }
   177	  },
   178	}
   179	
   180	export default CustomPlugin

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/**
     2	 * CivitaiPlugin
     3	 *
     4	 * Plugin for packs imported from Civitai.
     5	 *
     6	 * FEATURES:
     7	 * - Check for updates (calls /api/updates/check/{pack_name})
     8	 * - View on Civitai (opens source URL)
     9	 * - Apply updates with UI feedback
    10	 * - Show Civitai metadata (model_id, version_id)
    11	 * - Update notification badge
    12	 *
    13	 * EDIT RESTRICTIONS:
    14	 * - Metadata is read-only (synced from Civitai)
    15	 * - User tags are editable
    16	 * - Parameters are editable
    17	 * - Previews are read-only (from Civitai)
    18	 */
    19	
    20	import { useState } from 'react'
    21	import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'
    22	import { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'
    23	import {
    24	  RefreshCw,
    25	  ExternalLink,
    26	  AlertTriangle,
    27	  Check,
    28	  Loader2,
    29	  Download,
    30	  Info,
    31	  Globe,
    32	  Layers,
    33	} from 'lucide-react'
    34	import { clsx } from 'clsx'
    35	import { Button } from '@/components/ui/Button'
    36	import { Card } from '@/components/ui/Card'
    37	import type { PackDetail } from '../types'
    38	import type {
    39	  PackPlugin,
    40	  PluginContext,
    41	  PluginBadge,
    42	  UpdateCheckResponse,
    43	  UpdateResult,
    44	} from './types'
    45	import { UpdateOptionsDialog, type UpdateOptionsResult } from '../../packs/UpdateOptionsDialog'
    46	import i18n from '@/i18n'
    47	import { ANIMATION_PRESETS } from '../constants'
    48	
    49	// =============================================================================
    50	// Update Check Component
    51	// =============================================================================
    52	
    53	interface UpdateCheckSectionProps {
    54	  context: PluginContext
    55	}
    56	
    57	function UpdateCheckSection({ context }: UpdateCheckSectionProps) {
    58	  const { t } = useTranslation()
    59	  const { pack, toast, refetch } = context
    60	  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
    61	  const [showDetails, setShowDetails] = useState(false)
    62	  const [showOptionsDialog, setShowOptionsDialog] = useState(false)
    63	
    64	  // Query for update check
    65	  const {
    66	    data: updateCheck,
    67	    isLoading: isChecking,
    68	    refetch: checkUpdates,
    69	    isFetched,
    70	  } = useQuery<UpdateCheckResponse>({
    71	    queryKey: ['update-check', pack.name],
    72	    queryFn: async () => {
    73	      const res = await fetch(`/api/updates/check/${encodeURIComponent(pack.name)}`)
    74	      if (!res.ok) {
    75	        const error = await res.text()
    76	        throw new Error(error || t('pack.plugins.civitai.failedToCheck'))
    77	      }
    78	      return res.json()
    79	    },
    80	    enabled: false, // Manual trigger only
    81	    staleTime: 5 * 60 * 1000, // 5 minutes
    82	  })
    83	
    84	  // Mutation for applying updates
    85	  const applyUpdateMutation = useMutation({
    86	    mutationFn: async (applyOptions?: { choose?: Record<string, number>; options?: UpdateOptionsResult }) => {
    87	      const res = await fetch('/api/updates/apply', {
    88	        method: 'POST',
    89	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    90	        body: JSON.stringify({
    91	          pack: pack.name,
    92	          dry_run: false,
    93	          sync: true,
    94	          ...applyOptions,
    95	        }),
    96	      })
    97	      if (!res.ok) {
    98	        const error = await res.text()
    99	        throw new Error(error || t('pack.plugins.civitai.failedToApply'))
   100	      }
   101	      return res.json() as Promise<UpdateResult>
   102	    },
   103	    onSuccess: (result) => {
   104	      if (result.applied) {
   105	        toast.success(t('pack.plugins.civitai.updatedSuccess'))
   106	        queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['pack', pack.name] })
   107	        queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['update-check', pack.name] })
   108	        setShowOptionsDialog(false)
   109	        refetch()
   110	      } else if (result.already_up_to_date) {
   111	        toast.info(t('pack.plugins.civitai.alreadyUpToDate'))
   112	      }
   113	    },
   114	    onError: (error: Error) => {
   115	      toast.error(t('pack.plugins.civitai.updateFailed', { error: error.message }))
   116	    },
   117	  })
   118	
   119	  const hasUpdates = updateCheck?.has_updates ?? false
   120	  const changesCount = updateCheck?.changes_count ?? 0
   121	  const ambiguousCount = updateCheck?.ambiguous_count ?? 0
   122	
   123	  return (
   124	    <Card className={clsx('p-4', ANIMATION_PRESETS.fadeIn)}>
   125	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   126	        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   127	          <div className={clsx(
   128	            'p-2 rounded-lg',
   129	            hasUpdates ? 'bg-amber-500/20' : 'bg-synapse/20'
   130	          )}>
   131	            {hasUpdates ? (
   132	              <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-400" />
   133	            ) : (
   134	              <Check className="w-5 h-5 text-synapse" />
   135	            )}
   136	          </div>
   137	          <div>
   138	            <h3 className="font-medium text-text-primary">{t('pack.plugins.civitai.updates')}</h3>
   139	            <p className="text-sm text-text-muted">
   140	              {!isFetched ? (
   141	                t('pack.plugins.civitai.checkTooltip')
   142	              ) : hasUpdates ? (
   143	                t('pack.plugins.civitai.updatesAvailable', { count: changesCount })
   144	              ) : (
   145	                t('pack.plugins.civitai.upToDate')
   146	              )}
   147	            </p>
   148	          </div>
   149	        </div>
   150	
   151	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   152	          {hasUpdates && (
   153	            <Button
   154	              variant="primary"
   155	              size="sm"
   156	              onClick={() => setShowOptionsDialog(true)}
   157	              disabled={applyUpdateMutation.isPending}
   158	            >
   159	              {applyUpdateMutation.isPending ? (
   160	                <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
   161	              ) : (
   162	                <Download className="w-4 h-4" />
   163	              )}
   164	              {t('pack.plugins.civitai.applyUpdates')}
   165	            </Button>
   166	          )}
   167	
   168	          <Button
   169	            variant="secondary"
   170	            size="sm"
   171	            onClick={() => checkUpdates()}
   172	            disabled={isChecking}
   173	          >
   174	            {isChecking ? (
   175	              <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
   176	            ) : (
   177	              <RefreshCw className="w-4 h-4" />
   178	            )}
   179	            {t('pack.plugins.civitai.check')}
   180	          </Button>
   181	        </div>
   182	      </div>
   183	
   184	      {/* Update Details */}
   185	      {hasUpdates && updateCheck?.plan && (
   186	        <div className="mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-slate-mid">
   187	          <button
   188	            onClick={() => setShowDetails(!showDetails)}
   189	            className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-text-muted hover:text-text-primary transition-colors"
   190	          >
   191	            <Info className="w-4 h-4" />
   192	            {showDetails ? t('pack.plugins.civitai.hideDetails') : t('pack.plugins.civitai.showDetails')}
   193	          </button>
   194	
   195	          {showDetails && (
   196	            <div className="mt-3 space-y-2">
   197	              {updateCheck.plan.changes.map((change, idx) => (
   198	                <div
   199	                  key={idx}
   200	                  className="p-3 bg-slate-dark rounded-lg text-sm"
   201	                >
   202	                  <p className="font-mono text-synapse">{change.dependency_id}</p>
   203	                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1 text-text-muted">
   204	                    <span>{String(change.old?.version_name || t('pack.plugins.civitai.unknown'))}</span>
   205	                    <span>→</span>
   206	                    <span className="text-pulse">{String(change.new?.version_name || t('pack.plugins.civitai.new'))}</span>
   207	                  </div>
   208	                </div>
   209	              ))}
   210	
   211	              {ambiguousCount > 0 && (
   212	                <div className="p-3 bg-amber-500/10 border border-amber-500/30 rounded-lg">
   213	                  <p className="text-sm text-amber-400">
   214	                    {t('pack.plugins.civitai.manualSelection', { count: ambiguousCount })}
   215	                  </p>
   216	                </div>
   217	              )}
   218	
   219	              {/* Impacted packs */}
   220	              {(updateCheck.plan.impacted_packs?.length ?? 0) > 0 && (
   221	                <div className="p-3 bg-blue-500/10 border border-blue-500/30 rounded-lg">
   222	                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
   223	                    <Layers className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400" />
   224	                    <p className="text-sm font-medium text-blue-400">
   225	                      {t('pack.plugins.civitai.impactedPacks', {
   226	                        count: updateCheck.plan.impacted_packs.length,
   227	                      })}
   228	                    </p>
   229	                  </div>
   230	                  <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 mt-2">
   231	                    {updateCheck.plan.impacted_packs.map((name) => (
   232	                      <a
   233	                        key={name}
   234	                        href={`/pack/${encodeURIComponent(name)}`}
   235	                        className="text-xs px-2 py-1 bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-300 rounded hover:bg-blue-500/30 transition-colors"
   236	                      >
   237	                        {name}
   238	                      </a>
   239	                    ))}
   240	                  </div>
   241	                </div>
   242	              )}
   243	            </div>
   244	          )}
   245	        </div>
   246	      )}
   247	
   248	      {/* Update Options Dialog */}
   249	      <UpdateOptionsDialog
   250	        open={showOptionsDialog}
   251	        onClose={() => setShowOptionsDialog(false)}
   252	        onApply={(opts) => applyUpdateMutation.mutate({ options: opts })}
   253	        packName={pack.name}
   254	        changesCount={changesCount}
   255	        isApplying={applyUpdateMutation.isPending}
   256	      />
   257	    </Card>
   258	  )
   259	}
   260	
   261	// =============================================================================
   262	// Civitai Info Section
   263	// =============================================================================
   264	
   265	interface CivitaiInfoSectionProps {
   266	  context: PluginContext
   267	}
   268	
   269	function CivitaiInfoSection({ context }: CivitaiInfoSectionProps) {
   270	  const { t } = useTranslation()
   271	  const { pack } = context
   272	  const source = pack.pack?.source
   273	
   274	  if (!source) return null
   275	
   276	  return (
   277	    <Card className={clsx('p-4', ANIMATION_PRESETS.fadeIn)}>
   278	      <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
   279	        <div className="p-2 bg-pulse/20 rounded-lg">
   280	          <Globe className="w-5 h-5 text-pulse" />
   281	        </div>
   282	        <h3 className="font-medium text-text-primary">{t('pack.plugins.civitai.source')}</h3>
   283	      </div>
   284	
   285	      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 text-sm">
   286	        <div>
   287	          <p className="text-text-muted">{t('pack.plugins.civitai.provider')}</p>
   288	          <p className="font-mono text-text-primary">{source.provider}</p>
   289	        </div>
   290	        {source.model_id && (
   291	          <div>
   292	            <p className="text-text-muted">{t('pack.plugins.civitai.modelId')}</p>
   293	            <p className="font-mono text-synapse">{source.model_id}</p>
   294	          </div>
   295	        )}
   296	        {source.version_id && (
   297	          <div>
   298	            <p className="text-text-muted">{t('pack.plugins.civitai.versionId')}</p>
   299	            <p className="font-mono text-pulse">{source.version_id}</p>
   300	          </div>
   301	        )}
   302	        {pack.source_url && (
   303	          <div className="col-span-2">
   304	            <p className="text-text-muted">{t('pack.plugins.civitai.sourceUrl')}</p>
   305	            <a
   306	              href={pack.source_url}
   307	              target="_blank"
   308	              rel="noopener noreferrer"
   309	              className="text-synapse hover:underline truncate block"
   310	            >
   311	              {pack.source_url}
   312	            </a>
   313	          </div>
   314	        )}
   315	      </div>
   316	    </Card>
   317	  )
   318	}
   319	
   320	// =============================================================================
   321	// Plugin Definition
   322	// =============================================================================
   323	
   324	export const CivitaiPlugin: PackPlugin = {
   325	  id: 'civitai',
   326	  get name() { return i18n.t('pack.plugins.civitai.integration') },
   327	  priority: 50,
   328	
   329	  appliesTo: (pack: PackDetail) => {
   330	    return pack.pack?.source?.provider === 'civitai'
   331	  },
   332	
   333	  getBadge: (): PluginBadge => ({
   334	    label: i18n.t('pack.plugins.civitai.name'),
   335	    variant: 'info',
   336	    icon: 'Globe',
   337	    tooltip: i18n.t('pack.plugins.civitai.importedFrom'),
   338	  }),
   339	
   340	  features: {
   341	    // After import, pack is YOUR local copy - you can customize it
   342	    // Updates only change the blob (model file), not metadata/previews
   343	    canEditMetadata: true,       // Edit name, description, tags
   344	    canEditPreviews: true,       // Add/remove preview images/videos
   345	    canEditDependencies: false,  // Managed by Civitai (version tracking)
   346	    canEditWorkflows: true,
   347	    canEditParameters: true,
   348	    canCheckUpdates: true,
   349	    canManagePackDependencies: false,
   350	    canRunScripts: false,
   351	    canDelete: true,
   352	  },
   353	
   354	  renderHeaderActions: (context: PluginContext) => {
   355	    const { pack } = context
   356	
   357	    return (
   358	      <>
   359	        {/* View on Civitai */}
   360	        {pack.source_url && (
   361	          <Button
   362	            variant="secondary"
   363	            size="sm"
   364	            onClick={() => window.open(pack.source_url, '_blank')}
   365	            className="hover:bg-pulse/20 hover:text-pulse transition-colors"
   366	          >
   367	            <ExternalLink className="w-4 h-4" />
   368	            {i18n.t('pack.plugins.civitai.name')}
   369	          </Button>
   370	        )}
   371	      </>
   372	    )
   373	  },
   374	
   375	  renderExtraSections: (context: PluginContext) => {
   376	    return (
   377	      <div className="space-y-4">
   378	        <UpdateCheckSection context={context} />
   379	        <CivitaiInfoSection context={context} />
   380	      </div>
   381	    )
   382	  },
   383	
   384	  onPackLoad: (_pack: PackDetail) => {
   385	    // Pack loaded
   386	  },
   387	
   388	  validateChanges: (_pack, _changes) => {
   389	    // All changes are allowed - pack is user's local copy
   390	    // Updates only change the blob (model file), user changes are preserved
   391	    return {
   392	      valid: true,
   393	      errors: {},
   394	    }
   395	  },
   396	}
   397	
   398	export default CivitaiPlugin
