     1	/**
     2	 * Pack Plugin Type Definitions
     3	 *
     4	 * Plugin system enables type-specific behavior for different pack sources:
     5	 * - CivitaiPlugin: Update checking, View on Civitai, Civitai metadata
     6	 * - CustomPlugin: Full editability, pack dependencies management
     7	 * - InstallPlugin: Script management, console output, start/stop
     8	 *
     9	 * Each plugin can:
    10	 * - Add extra actions to the header
    11	 * - Render additional sections
    12	 * - Validate changes before save
    13	 * - Hook into pack lifecycle events
    14	 */
    15	
    16	import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
    17	import type { PackDetail, PackDependencyRef, ValidationResult } from '../types'
    18	
    19	// =============================================================================
    20	// Core Plugin Interface
    21	// =============================================================================
    22	
    23	/**
    24	 * Base plugin interface that all plugins must implement
    25	 */
    26	export interface PackPlugin {
    27	  /**
    28	   * Unique plugin identifier
    29	   */
    30	  id: string
    31	
    32	  /**
    33	   * Human-readable plugin name
    34	   */
    35	  name: string
    36	
    37	  /**
    38	   * Determines if this plugin applies to a given pack
    39	   * Only one plugin should match per pack (first match wins)
    40	   */
    41	  appliesTo: (pack: PackDetail) => boolean
    42	
    43	  /**
    44	   * Priority for plugin matching (higher = checked first)
    45	   * Default: 0
    46	   */
    47	  priority?: number
    48	
    49	  // ===========================================================================
    50	  // UI Extensions
    51	  // ===========================================================================
    52	
    53	  /**
    54	   * Render extra action buttons in the pack header
    55	   * These appear alongside Edit, Use, Delete buttons
    56	   */
    57	  renderHeaderActions?: (context: PluginContext) => ReactNode
    58	
    59	  /**
    60	   * Render additional sections after the main content
    61	   * Can be used for plugin-specific features
    62	   */
    63	  renderExtraSections?: (context: PluginContext) => ReactNode
    64	
    65	  /**
    66	   * Render plugin-specific modals
    67	   * Return null when no modal should be shown
    68	   */
    69	  renderModals?: (context: PluginContext) => ReactNode
    70	
    71	  /**
    72	   * Custom badge to show next to pack name
    73	   * e.g., "Civitai", "Custom", "Install"
    74	   */
    75	  getBadge?: (pack: PackDetail) => PluginBadge | null
    76	
    77	  // ===========================================================================
    78	  // Behavior Hooks
    79	  // ===========================================================================
    80	
    81	  /**
    82	   * Called when pack is loaded
    83	   * Can be used for initialization, prefetching, etc.
    84	   */
    85	  onPackLoad?: (pack: PackDetail) => void
    86	
    87	  /**
    88	   * Called before saving changes
    89	   * Can modify the changes or return validation errors
    90	   */
    91	  onBeforeSave?: (
    92	    pack: PackDetail,
    93	    changes: Partial<PackDetail>
    94	  ) => {
    95	    changes: Partial<PackDetail>
    96	    errors?: Record<string, string>
    97	  }
    98	
    99	  /**
   100	   * Validate changes before save
   101	   * Return validation result with errors if invalid
   102	   */
   103	  validateChanges?: (
   104	    pack: PackDetail,
   105	    changes: Partial<PackDetail>
   106	  ) => ValidationResult
   107	
   108	  // ===========================================================================
   109	  // Feature Flags
   110	  // ===========================================================================
   111	
   112	  /**
   113	   * What features are enabled for this plugin?
   114	   */
   115	  features?: PluginFeatures
   116	}
   117	
   118	// =============================================================================
   119	// Plugin Context
   120	// =============================================================================
   121	
   122	/**
   123	 * Context passed to plugin render methods
   124	 * Contains pack data and common actions
   125	 */
   126	export interface PluginContext {
   127	  /**
   128	   * Current pack data
   129	   */
   130	  pack: PackDetail
   131	
   132	  /**
   133	   * Whether edit mode is active
   134	   */
   135	  isEditing: boolean
   136	
   137	  /**
   138	   * Whether the pack has unsaved changes
   139	   */
   140	  hasUnsavedChanges: boolean
   141	
   142	  /**
   143	   * Open a modal by key
   144	   */
   145	  openModal: (key: string) => void
   146	
   147	  /**
   148	   * Close a modal by key
   149	   */
   150	  closeModal: (key: string) => void
   151	
   152	  /**
   153	   * Current modal state
   154	   */
   155	  modals: Record<string, boolean>
   156	
   157	  /**
   158	   * Trigger a pack refetch
   159	   */
   160	  refetch: () => void
   161	
   162	  /**
   163	   * Show a toast notification
   164	   */
   165	  toast: {
   166	    success: (message: string) => void
   167	    error: (message: string) => void
   168	    info: (message: string) => void
   169	  }
   170	}
   171	
   172	// =============================================================================
   173	// Plugin Badge
   174	// =============================================================================
   175	
   176	/**
   177	 * Badge configuration for plugin identification
   178	 */
   179	export interface PluginBadge {
   180	  /**
   181	   * Badge text (short)
   182	   */
   183	  label: string
   184	
   185	  /**
   186	   * Badge variant for styling
   187	   */
   188	  variant: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'warning' | 'info' | 'success'
   189	
   190	  /**
   191	   * Optional icon (Lucide icon name)
   192	   */
   193	  icon?: string
   194	
   195	  /**
   196	   * Tooltip text
   197	   */
   198	  tooltip?: string
   199	}
   200	
   201	// =============================================================================
   202	// Plugin Features
   203	// =============================================================================
   204	
   205	/**
   206	 * Feature flags for plugins
   207	 */
   208	export interface PluginFeatures {
   209	  /**
   210	   * Can edit pack metadata (name, description, etc.)
   211	   */
   212	  canEditMetadata?: boolean
   213	
   214	  /**
   215	   * Can edit previews (add, remove, reorder)
   216	   */
   217	  canEditPreviews?: boolean
   218	
   219	  /**
   220	   * Can edit dependencies (add, remove)
   221	   */
   222	  canEditDependencies?: boolean
   223	
   224	  /**
   225	   * Can edit workflows
   226	   */
   227	  canEditWorkflows?: boolean
   228	
   229	  /**
   230	   * Can edit parameters
   231	   */
   232	  canEditParameters?: boolean
   233	
   234	  /**
   235	   * Can check for updates (Civitai only)
   236	   */
   237	  canCheckUpdates?: boolean
   238	
   239	  /**
   240	   * Can manage pack dependencies (pack-to-pack)
     1	/**
     2	 * Pack Detail Plugins
     3	 *
     4	 * Type-specific plugins for pack behavior customization.
     5	 *
     6	 * AVAILABLE PLUGINS:
     7	 * - CivitaiPlugin: For packs imported from Civitai (update checking, view on Civitai)
     8	 * - CustomPlugin: For locally created packs (full editability)
     9	 * - InstallPlugin: For installation packs (PROTOTYPE - script management)
    10	 *
    11	 * USAGE:
    12	 * ```tsx
    13	 * import { usePackPlugin } from './pack-detail'
    14	 *
    15	 * function PackDetailPage() {
    16	 *   const { plugin, context } = usePackPlugin({ pack, isEditing, ... })
    17	 *
    18	 *   return (
    19	 *     <>
    20	 *       {plugin?.renderHeaderActions?.(context)}
    21	 *       {plugin?.renderExtraSections?.(context)}
    22	 *     </>
    23	 *   )
    24	 * }
    25	 * ```
    26	 */
    27	
    28	// Types
    29	export type {
    30	  PackPlugin,
    31	  PluginContext,
    32	  PluginBadge,
    33	  PluginFeatures,
    34	  PluginRegistration,
    35	  PluginRegistryConfig,
    36	  UsePackPluginReturn,
    37	  // Update types (Civitai)
    38	  UpdateCheckResponse,
    39	  UpdatePlan,
    40	  UpdateChange,
    41	  UpdateCandidate,
    42	  AmbiguousUpdate,
    43	  UpdateResult,
    44	  // Pack dependency types (Custom)
    45	  PackDependencyStatus,
    46	} from './types'
    47	
    48	// Hook
    49	export {
    50	  usePackPlugin,
    51	  PLUGIN_REGISTRY,
    52	  type UsePackPluginOptions,
    53	} from './usePackPlugin'
    54	
    55	// Plugins
    56	export { CivitaiPlugin } from './CivitaiPlugin'
    57	export { CustomPlugin } from './CustomPlugin'
    58	export { InstallPlugin } from './InstallPlugin'

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/**
     2	 * usePackPlugin Hook
     3	 *
     4	 * Loads and manages the appropriate plugin for a pack based on its source/category.
     5	 *
     6	 * Plugin matching priority:
     7	 * 1. InstallPlugin - user_tags includes 'install-pack'
     8	 * 2. CivitaiPlugin - source.provider === 'civitai'
     9	 * 3. CustomPlugin - pack_category === 'custom' or fallback
    10	 */
    11	
    12	import { useMemo, useCallback, useEffect } from 'react'
    13	import { toast } from '@/stores/toastStore'
    14	import type { PackDetail } from '../types'
    15	import type {
    16	  PackPlugin,
    17	  PluginContext,
    18	  UsePackPluginReturn,
    19	} from './types'
    20	
    21	// Import plugins
    22	import { CivitaiPlugin } from './CivitaiPlugin'
    23	import { CustomPlugin } from './CustomPlugin'
    24	import { InstallPlugin } from './InstallPlugin'
    25	
    26	// =============================================================================
    27	// Plugin Registry
    28	// =============================================================================
    29	
    30	/**
    31	 * All available plugins, sorted by priority (highest first)
    32	 */
    33	const PLUGIN_REGISTRY: PackPlugin[] = [
    34	  InstallPlugin,  // Priority: 100 - Most specific
    35	  CivitaiPlugin,  // Priority: 50 - Source-based
    36	  CustomPlugin,   // Priority: 0 - Fallback
    37	].sort((a, b) => (b.priority ?? 0) - (a.priority ?? 0))
    38	
    39	// =============================================================================
    40	// Hook Options
    41	// =============================================================================
    42	
    43	export interface UsePackPluginOptions {
    44	  /**
    45	   * Current pack data
    46	   */
    47	  pack?: PackDetail
    48	
    49	  /**
    50	   * Whether edit mode is active
    51	   */
    52	  isEditing?: boolean
    53	
    54	  /**
    55	   * Whether pack has unsaved changes
    56	   */
    57	  hasUnsavedChanges?: boolean
    58	
    59	  /**
    60	   * Modal state
    61	   */
    62	  modals?: Record<string, boolean>
    63	
    64	  /**
    65	   * Open modal handler
    66	   */
    67	  openModal?: (key: string) => void
    68	
    69	  /**
    70	   * Close modal handler
    71	   */
    72	  closeModal?: (key: string) => void
    73	
    74	  /**
    75	   * Refetch pack data
    76	   */
    77	  refetch?: () => void
    78	}
    79	
    80	// =============================================================================
    81	// Hook Implementation
    82	// =============================================================================
    83	
    84	export function usePackPlugin(options: UsePackPluginOptions): UsePackPluginReturn {
    85	  const {
    86	    pack,
    87	    isEditing = false,
    88	    hasUnsavedChanges = false,
    89	    modals = {},
    90	    openModal = () => {},
    91	    closeModal = () => {},
    92	    refetch = () => {},
    93	  } = options
    94	
    95	  // Find matching plugin
    96	  const plugin = useMemo(() => {
    97	    if (!pack) return null
    98	
    99	    for (const p of PLUGIN_REGISTRY) {
   100	      if (p.appliesTo(pack)) {
   101	        return p
   102	      }
   103	    }
   104	
   105	    // Should never happen - CustomPlugin is fallback
   106	    console.warn('[usePackPlugin] No plugin matched for pack:', pack.name)
   107	    return CustomPlugin
   108	  }, [pack])
   109	
   110	  // Build plugin context
   111	  const context: PluginContext | null = useMemo(() => {
   112	    if (!pack || !plugin) return null
   113	
   114	    return {
   115	      pack,
   116	      isEditing,
   117	      hasUnsavedChanges,
   118	      modals,
   119	      openModal,
   120	      closeModal,
   121	      refetch,
   122	      toast: {
   123	        success: (message: string) => toast.success(message),
   124	        error: (message: string) => toast.error(message),
   125	        info: (message: string) => toast.info(message),
   126	      },
   127	    }
   128	  }, [pack, plugin, isEditing, hasUnsavedChanges, modals, openModal, closeModal, refetch])
   129	
   130	  // Call onPackLoad when pack changes
   131	  useEffect(() => {
   132	    if (pack && plugin?.onPackLoad) {
   133	      plugin.onPackLoad(pack)
   134	    }
   135	  }, [pack?.name, plugin])
   136	
   137	  // Get plugin by ID
   138	  const getPlugin = useCallback((id: string): PackPlugin | undefined => {
   139	    return PLUGIN_REGISTRY.find(p => p.id === id)
   140	  }, [])
   141	
   142	  return {
   143	    plugin,
   144	    context,
   145	    isLoading: false,
   146	    allPlugins: PLUGIN_REGISTRY,
   147	    getPlugin,
   148	  }
   149	}
   150	
   151	// =============================================================================
   152	// Exports
   153	// =============================================================================
   154	
   155	export { PLUGIN_REGISTRY }
   156	export default usePackPlugin
   290	          {/* Name field - Required */}

   292	            <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-text-primary mb-1.5">

   301	                placeholder={t('pack.modals.create.namePlaceholder')}
   302	                className={clsx(

   304	                  'bg-slate-dark border border-slate-mid',

   306	                  'focus:outline-none focus:border-synapse focus:ring-1 focus:ring-synapse/30',
   307	                  'transition-all duration-200'
   308	                )}
   309	              />
   310	            </div>
   311	            <p className="text-xs text-text-muted mt-1">
   312	              {t('pack.modals.create.nameHint')}
   313	            </p>
   314	          </div>
   315	
   316	          {/* Pack Type */}
   317	          <div>
   318	            <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-text-primary mb-1.5">
   319	              {t('pack.modals.create.type')}
   320	            </label>
   321	            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">

   337	                    <span className="text-lg">{icon}</span>
   338	                    <span className="font-medium">{t(`inventory.assetKind.${value}`)}</span>
   339	                  </button>
   340	                )
   341	              })}
   342	            </div>
   343	            <p className="text-xs text-text-muted mt-1">
   344	              {t('pack.modals.create.typeHint')}
   345	            </p>
   346	          </div>
   347	
   348	          {/* Two column layout for optional fields */}
   349	          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
   350	            {/* Base Model */}
   351	            <div>
   352	              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-text-primary mb-1.5">
   353	                {t('pack.modals.create.baseModel')}
   354	              </label>
   355	              <div className="relative">
   356	                <Sparkles className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-text-muted" />
   357	                <input
   358	                  type="text"
   359	                  value={baseModel}
   360	                  onChange={(e) => setBaseModel(e.target.value)}
   361	                  placeholder={t('pack.modals.create.baseModelPlaceholder')}
   362	                  className={clsx(
   363	                    'w-full pl-9 pr-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-sm',
   364	                    'bg-slate-dark border border-slate-mid',
   365	                    'text-text-primary placeholder:text-text-muted',
   366	                    'focus:outline-none focus:border-synapse',
   367	                    'transition-all duration-200'
   368	                  )}
   369	                />
   370	              </div>
   371	            </div>
   372	
   373	            {/* Version */}
   374	            <div>
   375	              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-text-primary mb-1.5">
   376	                {t('pack.modals.create.version')}
   377	              </label>
   378	              <div className="relative">
   379	                <Hash className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-text-muted" />
   380	                <input
   381	                  type="text"
   382	                  value={version}
   383	                  onChange={(e) => setVersion(e.target.value)}
   384	                  placeholder={t('pack.modals.create.versionPlaceholder')}
   385	                  className={clsx(
   386	                    'w-full pl-9 pr-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-sm',
   387	                    'bg-slate-dark border border-slate-mid',
   388	                    'text-text-primary placeholder:text-text-muted',
   389	                    'focus:outline-none focus:border-synapse',
   390	                    'transition-all duration-200'
   391	                  )}
   392	                />
   393	              </div>
   394	            </div>
   395	          </div>
   396	
   397	          {/* Author */}
   398	          <div>
   399	            <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-text-primary mb-1.5">
   400	              {t('pack.modals.create.author')}
   401	            </label>
   402	            <div className="relative">
   403	              <User className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-text-muted" />
   404	              <input
   405	                type="text"
   406	                value={author}
   407	                onChange={(e) => setAuthor(e.target.value)}
   408	                placeholder={t('pack.modals.create.authorPlaceholder')}
   409	                className={clsx(
   410	                  'w-full pl-9 pr-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-sm',
   411	                  'bg-slate-dark border border-slate-mid',
   412	                  'text-text-primary placeholder:text-text-muted',
   413	                  'focus:outline-none focus:border-synapse',
   414	                  'transition-all duration-200'
   415	                )}
   416	              />
   417	            </div>
   418	          </div>
   419	
   420	          {/* Description */}
   421	          <div>
   422	            <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-text-primary mb-1.5">
   423	              {t('pack.modals.create.description')}
   424	            </label>
   425	            <div className="relative">
   426	              <FileText className="absolute left-3 top-3 w-4 h-4 text-text-muted" />
   427	              <textarea
   428	                value={description}
   429	                onChange={(e) => setDescription(e.target.value)}
   430	                placeholder={t('pack.modals.create.descriptionPlaceholder')}
   431	                rows={3}
   432	                className={clsx(
   433	                  'w-full pl-9 pr-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-sm resize-none',
   434	                  'bg-slate-dark border border-slate-mid',
   435	                  'text-text-primary placeholder:text-text-muted',
   436	                  'focus:outline-none focus:border-synapse',
   437	                  'transition-all duration-200'
   438	                )}
   439	              />
   440	            </div>
   441	            <p className="text-xs text-text-muted mt-1">
   442	              {t('pack.modals.create.descriptionHint')}
   443	            </p>
   444	          </div>
   445	
   446	          {/* Tags */}
   447	          <TagInput
   448	            tags={tags}
   449	            onChange={setTags}
   450	            label={t('pack.modals.create.tags')}
   451	            placeholder={t('pack.modals.create.tagsPlaceholder')}
   452	            hint={t('pack.modals.create.tagsHint')}
   453	          />
   454	
   455	          {/* Trigger Words */}
   456	          <TagInput
   457	            tags={triggerWords}
   458	            onChange={setTriggerWords}
   459	            label={t('pack.modals.create.triggerWords')}
   460	            placeholder={t('pack.modals.create.triggerWordsPlaceholder')}
   461	            hint={t('pack.modals.create.triggerWordsHint')}
   462	          />
   463	        </div>
   464	
   465	        {/* Footer */}
   466	        <div className="flex justify-end gap-3 p-6 border-t border-slate-mid/50">
   467	          <Button variant="secondary" onClick={handleClose} disabled={isCreating}>
   468	            {t('common.cancel')}
   469	          </Button>
   470	          <Button
   471	            variant="primary"
   472	            onClick={handleCreate}
   473	            disabled={!isValid || isCreating}
   474	          >
   475	            {isCreating ? (
   476	              <>
   477	                <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
   478	                {t('pack.modals.create.creating')}
   479	              </>
   480	            ) : (
   481	              <>
   482	                <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
   483	                {t('pack.modals.create.title')}
   484	              </>
   485	            )}
   486	          </Button>
   487	        </div>
   488	      </div>
   489	    </div>
   490	  )
   491	}
   492	
   493	export default CreatePackModal

     1	/**
     2	 * usePackData Hook
     3	 *
     4	 * Centralized data management for pack detail page.
     5	 * Handles all pack queries and mutations.
     6	 */
     7	
     8	import { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     9	import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'
    10	import { toast } from '@/stores/toastStore'
    11	import type {
    12	  PackDetail,
    13	  PackBackupStatusResponse,
    14	} from '../types'
    15	import { QUERY_KEYS } from '../constants'
    16	
    17	// =============================================================================
    18	// Types
    19	// =============================================================================
    20	
    21	export interface UsePackDataOptions {
    22	  /**
    23	   * Pack name to load
    24	   */
    25	  packName: string
    26	
    27	  /**
    28	   * Callback after successful deletion
    29	   */
    30	  onDeleteSuccess?: () => void
    31	}
    32	
    33	export interface UsePackDataReturn {
    34	  // Queries
    35	  pack: PackDetail | undefined
    36	  isLoading: boolean
    37	  error: Error | null
    38	  backupStatus: PackBackupStatusResponse | undefined
    39	  isBackupStatusLoading: boolean
    40	
    41	  // Mutations
    42	  deletePack: () => void
    43	  isDeleting: boolean
    44	
    45	  usePack: () => void
    46	  isUsingPack: boolean
    47	
    48	  updatePack: (data: { user_tags: string[] }) => void
    49	  isUpdatingPack: boolean
    50	
    51	  updateParameters: (data: Record<string, unknown>) => void
    52	  isUpdatingParameters: boolean
    53	
    54	  resolveBaseModel: (data: {
    55	    model_path?: string
    56	    download_url?: string
    57	    source?: string
    58	    file_name?: string
    59	    size_kb?: number
    60	  }) => void
    61	  isResolvingBaseModel: boolean
    62	
    63	  resolvePack: () => void
    64	  isResolvingPack: boolean
    65	
    66	  generateWorkflow: () => void
    67	  isGeneratingWorkflow: boolean
    68	
    69	  createSymlink: (filename: string) => void
    70	  isCreatingSymlink: boolean
    71	
    72	  removeSymlink: (filename: string) => void
    73	  isRemovingSymlink: boolean
    74	
    75	  deleteWorkflow: (filename: string) => void
    76	  isDeletingWorkflow: boolean
    77	
    78	  uploadWorkflow: (data: { file: File; name: string; description?: string }) => void
    79	  isUploadingWorkflow: boolean
    80	
    81	  deleteResource: (depId: string, deleteDependency?: boolean) => void
    82	  isDeletingResource: boolean
    83	
    84	  setAsBaseModel: (depId: string) => void
    85	  isSettingBaseModel: boolean
    86	
    87	  pullPack: () => void
    88	  isPullingPack: boolean
    89	
    90	  pushPack: (cleanup: boolean) => void
    91	  isPushingPack: boolean
    92	
    93	  // Preview & Description Mutations (Phase 6)
    94	  updateDescription: (description: string) => void
    95	  isUpdatingDescription: boolean
    96	
    97	  // Batch update - preferred method for EditPreviewsModal
    98	  batchUpdatePreviews: (data: {
    99	    files?: File[]
   100	    order?: string[]
   101	    coverFilename?: string
   102	    deleted?: string[]
   103	  }) => Promise<unknown>
   104	  isBatchUpdatingPreviews: boolean
   105	
   106	  // Individual mutations (kept for backwards compatibility)
   107	  uploadPreview: (data: { file: File; position?: number; nsfw?: boolean }) => void
   108	  uploadPreviewAsync: (data: { file: File; position?: number; nsfw?: boolean }) => Promise<unknown>
   109	  isUploadingPreview: boolean
   110	
   111	  deletePreview: (filename: string) => void
   112	  deletePreviewAsync: (filename: string) => Promise<unknown>
   113	  isDeletingPreview: boolean
   114	
   115	  reorderPreviews: (order: string[]) => void
   116	  reorderPreviewsAsync: (order: string[]) => Promise<unknown>
   117	  isReorderingPreviews: boolean
   118	
   119	  setCoverPreview: (filename: string) => void
   120	  setCoverPreviewAsync: (filename: string) => Promise<unknown>
   121	  isSettingCover: boolean
   122	
   123	  // Refetch
   124	  refetch: () => void
   125	  refetchBackupStatus: () => void
   126	}
   127	
   128	// =============================================================================
   129	// Hook Implementation
   130	// =============================================================================
   131	
   132	export function usePackData({
   133	  packName,
   134	  onDeleteSuccess,
   135	}: UsePackDataOptions): UsePackDataReturn {
   136	  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
   137	  const navigate = useNavigate()
   138	
   139	  // =========================================================================
   140	  // Pack Detail Query
   141	  // =========================================================================
   142	
   143	  const {
   144	    data: pack,
   145	    isLoading,
   146	    error,
   147	    refetch,
   148	  } = useQuery<PackDetail, Error>({
   149	    queryKey: QUERY_KEYS.pack(packName),
   150	    queryFn: async () => {
   151	      const res = await fetch(`/api/packs/${encodeURIComponent(packName)}`)
   152	      if (!res.ok) {
   153	        const errText = await res.text()
   154	        throw new Error(`Failed to fetch pack: ${res.status} - ${errText}`)
   155	      }
   156	      return res.json()
   157	    },
   158	    enabled: !!packName,
   159	  })
   160	
   161	  // =========================================================================
   162	  // Backup Status Query
   163	  // =========================================================================
   164	
   165	  const {
   166	    data: backupStatus,
   167	    isLoading: isBackupStatusLoading,
   168	    refetch: refetchBackupStatus,
   169	  } = useQuery<PackBackupStatusResponse>({
   170	    queryKey: QUERY_KEYS.packBackup(packName),
   171	    queryFn: async () => {
   172	      const res = await fetch(`/api/store/backup/pack-status/${encodeURIComponent(packName)}`)
   173	      if (!res.ok) {
   174	        return {
   175	          pack: packName,
   176	          backup_enabled: false,
   177	          backup_connected: false,
   178	          blobs: [],
   179	          summary: { total: 0, local_only: 0, backup_only: 0, both: 0, nowhere: 0, total_bytes: 0 },
   180	        }
   181	      }
   182	      return res.json()
   183	    },
   184	    enabled: !!packName,
   185	    staleTime: 30000,
   186	  })
   187	
   188	  // =========================================================================
   189	  // Delete Pack Mutation
   190	  // =========================================================================
   191	
   192	  const deleteMutation = useMutation({
   193	    mutationFn: async () => {
   194	      const res = await fetch(`/api/packs/${encodeURIComponent(packName)}`, { method: 'DELETE' })
   195	      if (!res.ok) {
   196	        const errText = await res.text()
   197	        throw new Error(`Failed to delete pack: ${errText}`)
   198	      }
   199	      return res.json()
   200	    },
   201	    onSuccess: () => {
   202	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['packs'] })
   203	      toast.success('Pack deleted')
   204	      onDeleteSuccess?.()
   205	      navigate('/')
   206	    },
   207	    onError: (error: Error) => {
   208	      toast.error(`Failed to delete pack: ${error.message}`)
   209	    },
   210	  })
   211	
   212	  // =========================================================================
   213	  // Use Pack Mutation
   214	  // =========================================================================
   215	
   216	  const usePackMutation = useMutation({
   217	    mutationFn: async () => {
   218	      const res = await fetch('/api/profiles/use', {
   219	        method: 'POST',
   220	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   240	    },
   241	  })
   242	
   243	  // =========================================================================
   244	  // Update Pack Mutation
   245	  // =========================================================================
   246	
   247	  const updatePackMutation = useMutation({
   248	    mutationFn: async (data: { user_tags: string[] }) => {
   249	      const res = await fetch(`/api/packs/${encodeURIComponent(packName)}`, {
   250	        method: 'PATCH',
   251	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   252	        body: JSON.stringify(data),
   253	      })
   254	      if (!res.ok) {
   255	        const errText = await res.text()
   256	        throw new Error(`Failed to update pack: ${errText}`)
   257	      }
   258	      return res.json()
   259	    },
   260	    onSuccess: () => {
   261	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: QUERY_KEYS.pack(packName) })
   262	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['packs'] })
   263	      toast.success('Pack updated')
   264	    },
   265	    onError: (error: Error) => {
   266	      toast.error(`Failed to update pack: ${error.message}`)
   267	    },
   268	  })
   269	
   270	  // =========================================================================
   271	  // Update Parameters Mutation
   272	  // =========================================================================
   273	
   274	  const updateParametersMutation = useMutation({
   275	    mutationFn: async (data: Record<string, unknown>) => {
   276	      const res = await fetch(`/api/packs/${encodeURIComponent(packName)}/parameters`, {
   277	        method: 'PATCH',
   278	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   279	        body: JSON.stringify(data),
   280	      })
   281	      if (!res.ok) {
   282	        const errText = await res.text()
   283	        throw new Error(`Failed to update parameters: ${errText}`)
   284	      }
   285	      return res.json()
   286	    },
   287	    onSuccess: () => {
   288	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: QUERY_KEYS.pack(packName) })
   289	      toast.success('Parameters updated')
   290	    },
   291	    onError: (error: Error) => {
   292	      toast.error(`Failed to update parameters: ${error.message}`)
   293	    },
   294	  })
   295	
   296	  // =========================================================================
   297	  // Resolve Base Model Mutation
   298	  // =========================================================================
   299	
   300	  const resolveBaseModelMutation = useMutation({
   301	    mutationFn: async (data: {
   302	      model_path?: string
   303	      download_url?: string
   304	      source?: string
   305	      file_name?: string
   306	      size_kb?: number
   307	    }) => {
   308	      const res = await fetch(`/api/packs/${encodeURIComponent(packName)}/resolve-base-model`, {
   309	        method: 'POST',
   310	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   311	        body: JSON.stringify({ pack_name: packName, ...data }),
   312	      })
   313	      if (!res.ok) {
   314	        const errText = await res.text()
   315	        throw new Error(`Failed to resolve base model: ${errText}`)
   316	      }
   317	      return res.json()
   318	    },
   319	    onSuccess: () => {
   320	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: QUERY_KEYS.pack(packName) })
   321	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['packs'] })
   322	      toast.success('Base model resolved')
   323	    },
   324	    onError: (error: Error) => {
   325	      toast.error(`Failed to resolve base model: ${error.message}`)
   326	    },
   327	  })
   328	
   329	  // =========================================================================
   330	  // Resolve Pack Mutation
   331	  // =========================================================================
   332	
   333	  const resolvePackMutation = useMutation({
   334	    mutationFn: async () => {
   335	      const res = await fetch(`/api/packs/${encodeURIComponent(packName)}/resolve`, {
   336	        method: 'POST',
   337	      })
   338	      if (!res.ok) {
   339	        const errText = await res.text()
   340	        throw new Error(`Failed to resolve: ${errText}`)
   341	      }
   342	      return res.json()
   343	    },
   344	    onSuccess: () => {
   345	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: QUERY_KEYS.pack(packName) })
   346	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: QUERY_KEYS.packBackup(packName) })
   347	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['packs'] })
   348	      toast.success('Dependencies resolved')
   349	    },
   350	    onError: (error: Error) => {
   351	      toast.error(`Failed to resolve: ${error.message}`)
   352	    },
   353	  })
   354	
   355	  // =========================================================================
   356	  // Workflow Mutations
   357	  // =========================================================================
   358	
   359	  const generateWorkflowMutation = useMutation({
   360	    mutationFn: async () => {
   361	      const res = await fetch(`/api/packs/${encodeURIComponent(packName)}/generate-workflow`, {
   362	        method: 'POST',
   363	      })
   364	      if (!res.ok) {
   365	        const errText = await res.text()
   366	        throw new Error(`Failed to generate workflow: ${errText}`)
   367	      }
   368	      return res.json()
   369	    },
   370	    onSuccess: () => {
   371	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: QUERY_KEYS.pack(packName) })
   372	      toast.success('Workflow generated')
   373	    },
   374	    onError: (error: Error) => {
   375	      toast.error(`Failed to generate workflow: ${error.message}`)
   376	    },
   377	  })
   378	
   379	  const createSymlinkMutation = useMutation({
   380	    mutationFn: async (filename: string) => {
   560	    },
   561	    onSuccess: (data) => {
   562	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: QUERY_KEYS.packBackup(packName) })
   563	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: QUERY_KEYS.pack(packName) })
   564	      if (data.cleanup) {
   565	        toast.success(`Backed up ${data.blobs_synced} blob${data.blobs_synced !== 1 ? 's' : ''} and freed local space`)
   566	      } else {
   567	        toast.success(`Backed up ${data.blobs_synced} blob${data.blobs_synced !== 1 ? 's' : ''}`)
   568	      }
   569	    },
   570	    onError: (error: Error) => {
   571	      toast.error(`Push failed: ${error.message}`)
   572	    },
   573	  })
   574	
   575	  // =========================================================================
   576	  // Preview & Description Mutations (Phase 6)
   577	  // =========================================================================
   578	
   579	  const updateDescriptionMutation = useMutation({
   580	    mutationFn: async (description: string) => {
   581	      const res = await fetch(`/api/packs/${encodeURIComponent(packName)}`, {
   582	        method: 'PATCH',
   583	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   584	        body: JSON.stringify({ description }),
   585	      })
   586	      if (!res.ok) {
   587	        const errText = await res.text()
   588	        throw new Error(`Failed to update description: ${errText}`)
   589	      }
   590	      return res.json()
   591	    },
   592	    onSuccess: () => {
   593	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: QUERY_KEYS.pack(packName) })
   594	      toast.success('Description updated')
   595	    },
   596	    onError: (error: Error) => {
   597	      toast.error(`Failed to update description: ${error.message}`)
   598	    },
   599	  })
   600	
   601	  const batchUpdatePreviewsMutation = useMutation({
   602	    mutationFn: async (data: {
   603	      files?: File[]
   604	      order?: string[]
   605	      coverFilename?: string
   606	      deleted?: string[]
   607	    }) => {
   608	      const formData = new FormData()
   609	
   610	      // Add files
   611	      if (data.files?.length) {
   612	        for (const file of data.files) {
   613	          formData.append('files', file)
   614	        }
   615	      }
   616	
   617	      // Add order as JSON
   618	      if (data.order?.length) {
   619	        formData.append('order', JSON.stringify(data.order))
   620	      }
   621	
   622	      // Add cover filename
   623	      if (data.coverFilename) {
   624	        formData.append('cover_filename', data.coverFilename)
   625	      }
   626	
   627	      // Add deleted as JSON
   628	      if (data.deleted?.length) {
   629	        formData.append('deleted', JSON.stringify(data.deleted))
   630	      }
   631	
   632	      const res = await fetch(`/api/packs/${encodeURIComponent(packName)}/previews`, {
   633	        method: 'PATCH',
   634	        body: formData,
   635	      })
   636	      if (!res.ok) {
   637	        const errText = await res.text()
   638	        throw new Error(`Failed to update previews: ${errText}`)
   639	      }
   640	      return res.json()
   641	    },
   642	    onSuccess: () => {
   643	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: QUERY_KEYS.pack(packName) })
   644	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['packs'] })
   645	      toast.success('Previews updated')
   646	    },
   647	    onError: (error: Error) => {
   648	      toast.error(`Failed to update previews: ${error.message}`)
   649	    },
   650	  })
   651	
   652	  const uploadPreviewMutation = useMutation({
   653	    mutationFn: async (data: { file: File; position?: number; nsfw?: boolean }) => {
   654	      const formData = new FormData()
   655	      formData.append('file', data.file)
   656	      formData.append('position', String(data.position ?? -1))
   657	      formData.append('nsfw', String(data.nsfw ?? false))
   658	
   659	      const res = await fetch(`/api/packs/${encodeURIComponent(packName)}/previews/upload`, {
   660	        method: 'POST',
   661	        body: formData,
   662	      })
   663	      if (!res.ok) {
   664	        const errText = await res.text()
   665	        throw new Error(`Failed to upload preview: ${errText}`)
   666	      }
   667	      return res.json()
   668	    },
   669	    onSuccess: () => {
   670	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: QUERY_KEYS.pack(packName) })
   671	      toast.success('Preview uploaded')
   672	    },
   673	    onError: (error: Error) => {
   674	      toast.error(`Failed to upload preview: ${error.message}`)
   675	    },
   676	  })
   677	
   678	  const deletePreviewMutation = useMutation({
   679	    mutationFn: async (filename: string) => {
   680	      const res = await fetch(
   681	        `/api/packs/${encodeURIComponent(packName)}/previews/${encodeURIComponent(filename)}`,
   682	        { method: 'DELETE' }
   683	      )
   684	      if (!res.ok) {
   685	        const errText = await res.text()
   686	        throw new Error(`Failed to delete preview: ${errText}`)
   687	      }
   688	      return res.json()
   689	    },
   690	    onSuccess: () => {
   691	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: QUERY_KEYS.pack(packName) })
   692	      toast.success('Preview deleted')
   693	    },
   694	    onError: (error: Error) => {
   695	      toast.error(`Failed to delete preview: ${error.message}`)
   696	    },
   697	  })
   698	
   699	  const reorderPreviewsMutation = useMutation({
   700	    mutationFn: async (order: string[]) => {
   701	      const res = await fetch(`/api/packs/${encodeURIComponent(packName)}/previews/order`, {
   702	        method: 'PATCH',
   703	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   704	        body: JSON.stringify({ order }),
   705	      })
   706	      if (!res.ok) {
   707	        const errText = await res.text()
   708	        throw new Error(`Failed to reorder previews: ${errText}`)
   709	      }
   710	      return res.json()
   711	    },
   712	    onSuccess: () => {
   713	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: QUERY_KEYS.pack(packName) })
   714	      toast.success('Preview order updated')
   715	    },
   716	    onError: (error: Error) => {
   717	      toast.error(`Failed to reorder previews: ${error.message}`)
   718	    },
   719	  })
   720	
   721	  const setCoverPreviewMutation = useMutation({
   722	    mutationFn: async (filename: string) => {
   723	      const res = await fetch(
   724	        `/api/packs/${encodeURIComponent(packName)}/previews/${encodeURIComponent(filename)}/cover`,
   725	        { method: 'PATCH' }
   726	      )
   727	      if (!res.ok) {
   728	        const errText = await res.text()
   729	        throw new Error(`Failed to set cover: ${errText}`)
   730	      }
   731	      return res.json()
   732	    },
   733	    onSuccess: () => {
   734	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: QUERY_KEYS.pack(packName) })
   735	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['packs'] })
   736	      toast.success('Cover image updated')
   737	    },
   738	    onError: (error: Error) => {
   739	      toast.error(`Failed to set cover: ${error.message}`)
   740	    },
   741	  })
   742	
   743	  // =========================================================================
   744	  // Return
   745	  // =========================================================================
   746	
   747	  return {
   748	    // Queries
   749	    pack,
   750	    isLoading,
   751	    error,
   752	    backupStatus,
   753	    isBackupStatusLoading,
   754	
   755	    // Mutations
   756	    deletePack: () => deleteMutation.mutate(),
   757	    isDeleting: deleteMutation.isPending,
   758	
   759	    usePack: () => usePackMutation.mutate(),
   760	    isUsingPack: usePackMutation.isPending,
   761	
   762	    updatePack: (data) => updatePackMutation.mutate(data),
   763	    isUpdatingPack: updatePackMutation.isPending,
   764	
   765	    updateParameters: (data) => updateParametersMutation.mutate(data),
   766	    isUpdatingParameters: updateParametersMutation.isPending,
   767	
   768	    resolveBaseModel: (data) => resolveBaseModelMutation.mutate(data),
   769	    isResolvingBaseModel: resolveBaseModelMutation.isPending,
   770	
   771	    resolvePack: () => resolvePackMutation.mutate(),
   772	    isResolvingPack: resolvePackMutation.isPending,
   773	
   774	    generateWorkflow: () => generateWorkflowMutation.mutate(),
   775	    isGeneratingWorkflow: generateWorkflowMutation.isPending,
   776	
   777	    createSymlink: (filename) => createSymlinkMutation.mutate(filename),
   778	    isCreatingSymlink: createSymlinkMutation.isPending,
   779	
   780	    removeSymlink: (filename) => removeSymlinkMutation.mutate(filename),
   781	    isRemovingSymlink: removeSymlinkMutation.isPending,
   782	
   783	    deleteWorkflow: (filename) => deleteWorkflowMutation.mutate(filename),
   784	    isDeletingWorkflow: deleteWorkflowMutation.isPending,
   785	
   786	    uploadWorkflow: (data) => uploadWorkflowMutation.mutate(data),
   787	    isUploadingWorkflow: uploadWorkflowMutation.isPending,
   788	
   789	    deleteResource: (depId, deleteDependency) =>
   790	      deleteResourceMutation.mutate({ depId, deleteDependency }),
   791	    isDeletingResource: deleteResourceMutation.isPending,
   792	
   793	    setAsBaseModel: (depId) => setAsBaseModelMutation.mutate(depId),
   794	    isSettingBaseModel: setAsBaseModelMutation.isPending,
   795	
   796	    pullPack: () => pullPackMutation.mutate(),
   797	    isPullingPack: pullPackMutation.isPending,
   798	
   799	    pushPack: (cleanup) => pushPackMutation.mutate(cleanup),
   800	    isPushingPack: pushPackMutation.isPending,
   801	
   802	    // Preview & Description (Phase 6)
   803	    updateDescription: (description) => updateDescriptionMutation.mutate(description),
   804	    isUpdatingDescription: updateDescriptionMutation.isPending,
   805	
   806	    batchUpdatePreviews: (data) => batchUpdatePreviewsMutation.mutateAsync(data),
   807	    isBatchUpdatingPreviews: batchUpdatePreviewsMutation.isPending,
   808	
   809	    uploadPreview: (data) => uploadPreviewMutation.mutate(data),
   810	    uploadPreviewAsync: (data) => uploadPreviewMutation.mutateAsync(data),
   811	    isUploadingPreview: uploadPreviewMutation.isPending,
   812	
   813	    deletePreview: (filename) => deletePreviewMutation.mutate(filename),
   814	    deletePreviewAsync: (filename) => deletePreviewMutation.mutateAsync(filename),
   815	    isDeletingPreview: deletePreviewMutation.isPending,
   816	
   817	    reorderPreviews: (order) => reorderPreviewsMutation.mutate(order),
   818	    reorderPreviewsAsync: (order) => reorderPreviewsMutation.mutateAsync(order),
   819	    isReorderingPreviews: reorderPreviewsMutation.isPending,
   820

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/**
     2	 * PackDependenciesSection
     3	 *
     4	 * Displays pack dependencies with download tracking and management.
     5	 *
     6	 * ⚠️ KRITICKÉ FUNKCE - VŠECHNY ZACHOVÁNY:
     7	 *
     8	 * STATUS ICONS:
     9	 * - downloading (synapse pulse)
    10	 * - installed (green check)
    11	 * - backup-only (sky cloud)
    12	 * - unresolved (amber warning)
    13	 * - pending/ready (blue package)
    14	 *
    15	 * ASSET INFO (VŠECHNA DATA):
    16	 * - name, version_name
    17	 * - asset_type, source, base_model_hint, size
    18	 * - description
    19	 * - source_info (model_name, model_id, creator, repo_id)
    20	 * - filename, sha256, url, local_path
    21	 *
    22	 * AKCE:
    23	 * - Download All (pending assets)
    24	 * - Restore from Backup
    25	 * - Download single asset
    26	 * - Select Model (base model resolver)
    27	 * - Resolve (unresolved deps)
    28	 * - Change base model
    29	 * - Re-download
    30	 * - Delete resource
    31	 *
    32	 * DOWNLOAD PROGRESS:
    33	 * - Progress bar
    34	 * - downloaded_bytes / total_bytes
    35	 * - speed_bps
    36	 * - ETA
    37	 */
    38	
    39	import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'
    40	import { Loader2, Download, Check, Cloud, AlertTriangle, Package,
    41	  DownloadCloud, ArrowLeftRight, RotateCcw, Trash2, HardDrive,
    42	  Gauge, Timer, FolderOpen, Globe } from 'lucide-react'
    43	import { clsx } from 'clsx'
    44	import { Card } from '@/components/ui/Card'
    45	import { Button } from '@/components/ui/Button'
    46	import { ProgressBar } from '@/components/ui/ProgressBar'
    47	import type { AssetInfo, DownloadProgress } from '../types'
    48	import type { PackBackupStatusResponse } from '../types'
    49	import { ANIMATION_PRESETS } from '../constants'
    50	import { formatBytes, formatSpeed, formatEta, formatSize } from '../utils'
    51	
    52	// =============================================================================
    53	// Types
    54	// =============================================================================
    55	
    56	export interface PackDependenciesSectionProps {
    57	  /**
    58	   * Assets/dependencies to display
    59	   */
    60	  assets: AssetInfo[]
    61	
    62	  /**
    63	   * Backup status for blob lookup
    64	   */
    65	  backupStatus?: PackBackupStatusResponse
    66	
    67	  /**
    68	   * Set of assets currently being downloaded (for immediate UI feedback)
    69	   */
    70	  downloadingAssets: Set<string>
    71	
    72	  /**
    73	   * Get download progress for specific asset
    74	   */
    75	  getAssetDownload: (assetName: string) => DownloadProgress | undefined
    76	
    77	  /**
    78	   * Handlers for various actions
    79	   */
    80	  onDownloadAll: () => void
    81	  onDownloadAsset: (asset: AssetInfo) => void
    82	  onRestoreFromBackup: (asset: AssetInfo) => Promise<void>
    83	  onDeleteResource: (assetName: string) => void
    84	  onOpenBaseModelResolver: () => void
    85	  onResolvePack: () => void
    86	  onSetAsBaseModel?: (asset: AssetInfo) => void
    87	
    88	  /**
    89	   * Loading states
    90	   */
    91	  isDownloadAllPending?: boolean
    92	  isResolvePending?: boolean
    93	  isDeletePending?: boolean
    94	
    95	  /**
    96	   * Animation delay
    97	   */
    98	  animationDelay?: number
    99	}
   100	
   101	// =============================================================================
   102	// Helper Components
   103	// =============================================================================
   104	
   105	interface StatusIconProps {
   106	  isDownloading: boolean
   107	  isInstalled: boolean
   108	  isBackupOnly: boolean
   109	  needsResolve: boolean
   110	}
   111	
   112	function StatusIcon({ isDownloading, isInstalled, isBackupOnly, needsResolve }: StatusIconProps) {
   113	  const { t } = useTranslation()
   114	  if (isDownloading) {
   115	    return (
   116	      <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-synapse/30 flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
   117	        <Download className="w-5 h-5 text-synapse animate-pulse" />
   118	      </div>
   119	    )
   120	  }
   121	  if (isInstalled) {
   122	    return (
   123	      <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-green-500/30 flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
   124	        <Check className="w-5 h-5 text-green-400" />
   125	      </div>
   126	    )
   127	  }
   128	  if (isBackupOnly) {
   129	    return (
   130	      <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-sky-500/30 flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0" title={t('pack.dependencies.availableOnBackup')}>
   131	        <Cloud className="w-5 h-5 text-sky-400" />
   132	      </div>
   133	    )
   134	  }
   135	  if (needsResolve) {
   136	    return (
   137	      <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-amber-500/30 flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
   138	        <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-400" />
   139	      </div>
   140	    )
   141	  }
   142	  return (
   143	    <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-blue-500/20 flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
   144	      <Package className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-400" />
   145	    </div>
   146	  )
   147	}
   148	
   149	interface DownloadProgressDisplayProps {
   150	  download: DownloadProgress
   151	}
   152	
   153	function DownloadProgressDisplay({ download }: DownloadProgressDisplayProps) {
   154	  const { t } = useTranslation()
   155	  return (
   156	    <div className="mt-3 space-y-2">
   157	      <ProgressBar progress={download.progress} showLabel={true} />
   158	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-text-muted">
   159	        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   160	          <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
   161	            <HardDrive className="w-3 h-3" />
   162	            {formatBytes(download.downloaded_bytes)} / {formatBytes(download.total_bytes)}
   163	          </span>
   164	          <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
   165	            <Gauge className="w-3 h-3" />
   166	            {formatSpeed(download.speed_bps)}
   167	          </span>
   168	        </div>
   169	        <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
   170	          <Timer className="w-3 h-3" />
   171	          {t('pack.dependencies.eta')} {formatEta(download.eta_seconds)}
   172	        </span>
   173	      </div>
   174	    </div>
   175	  )
   176	}
   177	
   178	interface AssetDetailsProps {
   179	  asset: AssetInfo
   180	  isInstalled: boolean
   181	  isBackupOnly: boolean
   182	  isDownloading: boolean
   183	}
   184	
   185	function AssetDetails({ asset, isInstalled, isBackupOnly, isDownloading }: AssetDetailsProps) {
   186	  const { t } = useTranslation()
   187	  return (
   188	    <div className="mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-white/10 text-xs space-y-1.5">
   189	      {/* File name */}
   190	      {asset.filename && (
   191	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-text-muted">
   192	          <span className="font-medium text-text-secondary w-16">{t('pack.dependencies.detail.file')}</span>
   193	          <code className="bg-slate-mid/50 px-2 py-0.5 rounded flex-1 truncate">{asset.filename}</code>
   194	        </div>
   195	      )}
   196	
   197	      {/* Version */}
   198	      {asset.version_name && (
   199	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-text-muted">
   200	          <span className="font-medium text-text-secondary w-16">{t('pack.dependencies.detail.version')}</span>
   201	          <span className="text-synapse">{asset.version_name}</span>
   202	        </div>
   203	      )}
   204	
   205	      {/* Source info */}
   206	      {asset.source_info && (
   207	        <>
   208	          {asset.source_info.model_name && (
   209	            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-text-muted">
   210	              <span className="font-medium text-text-secondary w-16">{t('pack.dependencies.detail.model')}</span>
   211	              <span>{asset.source_info.model_name}</span>
   212	              {asset.source_info.model_id && (
   213	                <span className="text-text-muted/60">(#{asset.source_info.model_id})</span>
   214	              )}
   215	            </div>
   216	          )}
   217	          {asset.source_info.creator && (
   218	            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-text-muted">
   219	              <span className="font-medium text-text-secondary w-16">{t('pack.dependencies.detail.creator')}</span>
   220	              <span className="text-blue-400">{asset.source_info.creator}</span>
   221	            </div>
   222	          )}
   223	          {asset.source_info.repo_id && (
   224	            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-text-muted">
   225	              <span className="font-medium text-text-secondary w-16">{t('pack.dependencies.detail.repo')}</span>
   226	              <span>{asset.source_info.repo_id}</span>
   227	            </div>
   228	          )}
   229	        </>
   230	      )}
   231	
   232	      {/* Trigger words */}
   233	      {asset.trigger_words && asset.trigger_words.length > 0 && (
   234	        <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
   235	          <span className="font-medium text-text-secondary w-16 pt-0.5">{t('pack.dependencies.detail.triggers', 'Triggers')}</span>
   236	          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1">
   237	            {asset.trigger_words.map((w, i) => (
   238	              <button
   239	                key={i}
   240	                className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300 rounded text-xs hover:bg-purple-500/30 transition-colors"
   241	                onClick={() => navigator.clipboard.writeText(w)}
   242	                title={t('pack.dependencies.detail.copyTrigger', 'Copy to clipboard')}
   243	              >
   244	                {w}
   245	              </button>
   246	            ))}
   247	          </div>
   248	        </div>
   249	      )}
   250	
   251	      {/* Strategy */}
   252	      {asset.strategy && (
   253	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-text-muted">
   254	          <span className="font-medium text-text-secondary w-16">{t('pack.dependencies.detail.strategy', 'Strategy')}</span>
   255	          <span className="text-text-muted/80">{t(`pack.dependencies.detail.strategies.${asset.strategy}`, asset.strategy)}</span>
   256	        </div>
   257	      )}
   258	
   259	      {/* Size */}
   260	      {asset.size && (
   261	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-text-muted">
   262	          <span className="font-medium text-text-secondary w-16">{t('pack.dependencies.detail.size')}</span>
   263	          <span>{formatBytes(asset.size)}</span>
   264	        </div>
   265	      )}
   266	
   267	      {/* SHA256 */}
   268	      {asset.sha256 && (
   269	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-text-muted">
   270	          <span className="font-medium text-text-secondary w-16">{t('pack.dependencies.detail.sha256')}</span>
   271	          <code className="truncate flex-1 text-green-400/70" title={asset.sha256}>
   272	            {asset.sha256.substring(0, 16)}...
   273	          </code>
   274	        </div>
   275	      )}
   276	
   277	      {/* Download URL */}
   278	      {asset.url && !isInstalled && (
   279	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-text-muted">
   280	          <span className="font-medium text-text-secondary w-16">{t('pack.dependencies.detail.url')}</span>
   281	          <a
   282	            href={asset.url}
   283	            target="_blank"
   284	            rel="noopener noreferrer"
   285	            className="truncate flex-1 text-blue-400 hover:underline"
   286	            title={asset.url}
   287	          >
   288	            {asset.url.length > 60 ? asset.url.substring(0, 60) + '...' : asset.url}
   289	          </a>
   290	        </div>
   291	      )}
   292	
   293	      {/* Local path */}
   294	      {asset.local_path && (
   295	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-text-muted">
   296	          <FolderOpen className="w-3 h-3 text-text-secondary" />
   297	          <span className="font-medium text-text-secondary">{t('pack.dependencies.detail.path')}</span>
   298	          <code className="truncate flex-1" title={asset.local_path}>{asset.local_path}</code>
   299	        </div>
   300	      )}
   301	
   302	      {/* Status messages */}
   303	      {!asset.local_path && isBackupOnly && (
   304	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sky-400">
   305	          <Cloud className="w-3 h-3" />
   306	          <span>{t('pack.dependencies.backupRestore')}</span>
   307	        </div>
   308	      )}
   309	      {!asset.local_path && asset.url && !isDownloading && !isBackupOnly && (
   310	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-text-muted">
   311	          <Globe className="w-3 h-3" />
   312	          <span className="truncate flex-1" title={asset.url}>{t('pack.dependencies.readyToDownload')}</span>
   313	        </div>
   314	      )}
   315	    </div>
   316	  )
   317	}

   320	// Asset Row Component

     1	/**
     2	 * PackDepsSection - Pack-to-pack dependencies management
     3	 *
     4	 * Extracted from CustomPlugin.tsx and redesigned with:
     5	 * - Rich cards with status-colored borders (matching AssetRow style)
     6	 * - Expandable details with trigger words, asset summary
     7	 * - Dependency tree visualization
     8	 * - Full CRUD support (add/remove via PluginContext)
     9	 */
    10	
    11	import { useState } from 'react'
    12	import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'
    13	import { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'
    14	import {
    15	  Package,
    16	  Plus,
    17	  Layers,
    18	  Search,
    19	  ChevronDown,
    20	  ChevronRight,
    21	  ExternalLink,
    22	  Unlink,
    23	  Check,
    24	  AlertTriangle,
    25	  Copy,
    26	  GitBranch,
    27	  Loader2,
    28	} from 'lucide-react'
    29	import { clsx } from 'clsx'
    30	import { Button } from '@/components/ui/Button'
    31	import { Card } from '@/components/ui/Card'
    32	import type { PackDependencyRef } from '../types'
    33	import type { PluginContext, PackDependencyStatus } from '../plugins/types'
    34	import { AddPackDependencyModal } from '../modals/AddPackDependencyModal'
    35	import { ANIMATION_PRESETS } from '../constants'

    37	// =============================================================================
    38	// Pack Dep Card
    39	// =============================================================================
    40	
    41	interface PackDepCardProps {
    42	  dep: PackDependencyStatus
    43	  isEditing: boolean
    44	  onRemove: () => void
    45	  onNavigate: () => void
    46	}
    47	
    48	function PackDepCard({ dep, isEditing, onRemove, onNavigate }: PackDepCardProps) {
    49	  const { t } = useTranslation()
    50	  const [detailsOpen, setDetailsOpen] = useState(false)
    51	
    52	  // Determine status state
    53	  const isInstalled = dep.installed
    54	  const allReady = isInstalled && dep.all_installed && !dep.has_unresolved
    55	  const partialReady = isInstalled && (!dep.all_installed || dep.has_unresolved)
    56	  const isMissing = !isInstalled
    57	
    58	  // Status colors matching AssetRow pattern
    59	  const cardClass = allReady
    60	    ? 'bg-green-900/30 border-green-500/50'
    61	    : partialReady
    62	      ? 'bg-amber-900/30 border-amber-500/50'
    63	      : isMissing
    64	        ? 'bg-red-900/20 border-red-500/30'
    65	        : 'bg-blue-900/20 border-blue-500/30'
    66	
    67	  // Status icon
    68	  const StatusIcon = () => {
    69	    if (allReady) return <Check className="w-4 h-4 text-green-400" />
    70	    if (partialReady) return <AlertTriangle className="w-4 h-4 text-amber-400" />
    71	    return <Unlink className="w-4 h-4 text-red-400" />
    72	  }
    73	
    74	  const hasDetails = (dep.trigger_words && dep.trigger_words.length > 0) ||
    75	    dep.description ||
    76	    (dep.asset_count && dep.asset_count > 0)
    77	
    78	  return (
    79	    <div className={clsx('p-4 rounded-xl border transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-lg', cardClass)}>
    80	      {/* Main row */}
    81	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
    82	        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 flex-1 min-w-0">
    83	          {/* Status icon */}
    84	          <div className={clsx(
    85	            'w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0',
    86	            allReady ? 'bg-green-500/20' : partialReady ? 'bg-amber-500/20' : 'bg-red-500/20'
    87	          )}>
    88	            <StatusIcon />
    89	          </div>
    90	
    91	          {/* Info */}
    92	          <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
    93	            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    94	              <button
    95	                onClick={onNavigate}
    96	                className="font-medium text-text-primary hover:text-synapse transition-colors text-left truncate"
    97	              >
    98	                {dep.pack_name}
    99	              </button>
   100	              {dep.current_version && (
   101	                <span className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-slate-mid/50 text-text-muted rounded text-xs flex-shrink-0">
   102	                  v{dep.current_version}
   103	                </span>
   104	              )}
   105	              {dep.required && (
   106	                <span className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-300 rounded text-xs flex-shrink-0">
   107	                  {t('pack.packDependencies.status.required', 'Required')}
   108	                </span>
   109	              )}
   110	              {!dep.required && (
   111	                <span className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-slate-mid/30 text-text-muted rounded text-xs flex-shrink-0">
   112	                  {t('pack.dependencies.optional', 'Optional')}
   113	                </span>
   114	              )}
   115	            </div>
   116	            {/* Metadata line */}
   117	            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-text-muted mt-0.5">
   118	              {dep.pack_type && (
   119	                <span className="uppercase font-medium">{dep.pack_type}</span>
   120	              )}
   121	              {dep.asset_count != null && dep.asset_count > 0 && (
   122	                <>
   123	                  {dep.pack_type && <span>·</span>}
   124	                  <span>{t('pack.packDependencies.assetSummary', '{{count}} assets', { count: dep.asset_count })}</span>
   125	                </>
   126	              )}
   127	              {dep.base_model && (
   128	                <>
   129	                  <span>·</span>
   130	                  <span className="text-amber-400 font-medium">{dep.base_model}</span>
   131	                </>
   132	              )}
   133	              {isInstalled && allReady && (
   134	                <>
   135	                  <span>·</span>
   136	                  <span className="text-green-400">{t('pack.packDependencies.allInstalled', 'All installed')}</span>
   137	                </>
   138	              )}
   139	              {isInstalled && dep.has_unresolved && (
   140	                <>
   141	                  <span>·</span>
   142	                  <span className="text-amber-400">{t('pack.packDependencies.someUnresolved', 'Some unresolved')}</span>
   143	                </>
   144	              )}
   145	            </div>
   146	            {/* Description */}
   147	            {dep.description && !detailsOpen && (
   148	              <p className="text-xs text-text-muted/70 mt-1 truncate">{dep.description}</p>
   149	            )}
   150	          </div>
   151	        </div>
   152	
   153	        {/* Actions */}
   154	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-shrink-0">
   155	          {hasDetails && (
   156	            <button
   157	              onClick={() => setDetailsOpen(!detailsOpen)}
   158	              className="p-1.5 text-text-muted hover:text-text-primary transition-colors"
   159	              title={detailsOpen ? 'Collapse' : 'Expand'}
   160	            >
   161	              {detailsOpen
   162	                ? <ChevronDown className="w-4 h-4" />
   163	                : <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
   164	              }
   165	            </button>
   166	          )}
   167	          <button
   168	            onClick={onNavigate}
   169	            className="p-2 bg-slate-mid/50 text-text-muted rounded-lg hover:text-synapse hover:bg-slate-mid/80 transition-all duration-200"
   170	            title={t('pack.packDependencies.navigate', 'Go to pack')}
   171	          >
   172	            <ExternalLink className="w-4 h-4" />
   173	          </button>
   174	          {!isInstalled && (
   175	            <Button
   176	              variant="primary"
   177	              size="sm"
   178	              onClick={onNavigate}
   179	            >
   180	              <Package className="w-4 h-4" />
   181	              {t('pack.plugins.custom.find')}
   182	            </Button>
   183	          )}
   184	          {isEditing && (
   185	            <button
   186	              onClick={onRemove}
   187	              className="p-2 bg-red-500/20 text-red-400 rounded-lg hover:bg-red-500/30 transition-all duration-200"
   188	              title={t('common.remove')}
   189	            >
   190	              <Unlink className="w-4 h-4" />
   191	            </button>
   192	          )}
   193	        </div>
   194	      </div>
   195	
   196	      {/* Expandable details */}
   197	      {detailsOpen && (
   198	        <div className="mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-white/10 space-y-2">
   199	          {/* Description */}
   200	          {dep.description && (
   201	            <p className="text-sm text-text-muted">{dep.description}</p>
   202	          )}
   203	
   204	          {/* Trigger words */}
   205	          {dep.trigger_words && dep.trigger_words.length > 0 && (
   206	            <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
   207	              <span className="text-xs text-text-secondary font-medium w-16 pt-1 flex-shrink-0">
   208	                {t('pack.packDependencies.triggerWords', 'Triggers')}
   209	              </span>
   210	              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1">
   211	                {dep.trigger_words.map((w, i) => (
   212	                  <button
   213	                    key={i}
   214	                    className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300 rounded text-xs hover:bg-purple-500/30 transition-colors flex items-center gap-1"
   215	                    onClick={() => navigator.clipboard.writeText(w)}
   216	                    title={t('pack.dependencies.detail.copyTrigger', 'Copy to clipboard')}
   217	                  >
   218	                    {w}
   219	                    <Copy className="w-2.5 h-2.5 opacity-50" />
   220	                  </button>
   221	                ))}
   222	              </div>
   223	            </div>
   224	          )}
   225	
   226	          {/* Asset count and status */}
   227	          {dep.asset_count != null && dep.asset_count > 0 && (
   228	            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-text-muted">
   229	              <Package className="w-3 h-3" />
   230	              <span>{t('pack.packDependencies.assetSummary', '{{count}} assets', { count: dep.asset_count })}</span>
   231	              {dep.all_installed && <span className="text-green-400">✓</span>}
   232	            </div>
   233	          )}
   234	        </div>
   235	      )}
   236	    </div>
   237	  )
   238	}

   241	// Dependency Tree
   242	// =============================================================================
   243	
   244	interface TreeNodeData {
   245	  pack_name: string
   246	  installed: boolean
   247	  version?: string | null
   248	  pack_type?: string | null
   249	  description?: string | null
   250	  asset_count: number
   251	  trigger_words: string[]
   252	  children: TreeNodeData[]
   253	  circular: boolean
   254	  depth: number
   255	}
   256	
   257	interface DependencyTreeProps {
   258	  packName: string
   259	}
