   415	export function PackDepsSection({ context }: PackDepsSectionProps) {
   416	  const { t } = useTranslation()
   417	  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
   418	  const { pack, isEditing } = context
   419	  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(true)
   420	  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('')
   421	  const [showAddModal, setShowAddModal] = useState(false)
   422	
   423	  const packDependencies: PackDependencyRef[] = pack.pack?.pack_dependencies ?? []
   424	
   425	  // Batch status query with enriched fields
   426	  const { data: dependencyStatuses = [] } = useQuery<PackDependencyStatus[]>({
   427	    queryKey: ['pack-dependencies-status', pack.name],
   428	    queryFn: async () => {
   429	      const res = await fetch(`/api/packs/${encodeURIComponent(pack.name)}/pack-dependencies/status`)
   430	      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch status')
   431	      const data = await res.json()
   432	      return data.map((s: Record<string, unknown>) => ({
   433	        pack_name: s.pack_name as string,
   434	        required: s.required as boolean,
   435	        installed: s.installed as boolean,
   436	        current_version: s.version as string | undefined,
   437	        version_match: s.installed as boolean,
   438	        pack_type: s.pack_type as string | undefined,
   439	        description: s.description as string | undefined,
   440	        asset_count: s.asset_count as number | undefined,
   441	        trigger_words: s.trigger_words as string[] | undefined,
   442	        base_model: s.base_model as string | undefined,
   443	        has_unresolved: s.has_unresolved as boolean | undefined,
   444	        all_installed: s.all_installed as boolean | undefined,
   445	      }))
   446	    },
   447	    enabled: packDependencies.length > 0,
   448	    staleTime: 30000,
   449	  })
   450	
   451	  // Add mutation
   452	  const addMutation = useMutation({
   453	    mutationFn: async ({ packName, required }: { packName: string; required: boolean }) => {
   454	      const res = await fetch(`/api/packs/${encodeURIComponent(pack.name)}/pack-dependencies`, {
   455	        method: 'POST',
   456	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   457	        body: JSON.stringify({ pack_name: packName, required }),
   458	      })
   459	      if (!res.ok) {
   460	        const err = await res.text()
   461	        throw new Error(err)
   462	      }
   463	      return res.json()
   464	    },
   465	    onSuccess: () => {
   466	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['pack', pack.name] })
   467	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['pack-dependencies-status', pack.name] })
   468	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['dependency-tree', pack.name] })
   469	      context.toast.success(t('pack.plugins.custom.depAdded', 'Dependency added'))
   470	      setShowAddModal(false)
   471	    },
   472	    onError: (err: Error) => {
   473	      context.toast.error(err.message)
   474	    },
   475	  })
   476	
   477	  // Remove mutation
   478	  const removeMutation = useMutation({
   479	    mutationFn: async (depPackName: string) => {
   480	      const res = await fetch(
   481	        `/api/packs/${encodeURIComponent(pack.name)}/pack-dependencies/${encodeURIComponent(depPackName)}`,
   482	        { method: 'DELETE' }
   483	      )
   484	      if (!res.ok) {
   485	        const err = await res.text()
   486	        throw new Error(err)
   487	      }
   488	      return res.json()
   489	    },
   490	    onSuccess: () => {
   491	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['pack', pack.name] })
   492	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['pack-dependencies-status', pack.name] })
   493	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['dependency-tree', pack.name] })
   494	      context.toast.success(t('pack.plugins.custom.depRemoved', 'Dependency removed'))
   495	    },
   496	    onError: (err: Error) => {
   497	      context.toast.error(err.message)
   498	    },
   499	  })
   500	
   501	  // Filter
   502	  const filteredDependencies = dependencyStatuses.filter(dep =>
   503	    dep.pack_name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
   504	  )
   505	
   506	  const existingDepNames = packDependencies.map(d => d.pack_name)
   507	  const installedCount = dependencyStatuses.filter(d => d.installed).length
   508	  const missingCount = dependencyStatuses.filter(d => !d.installed).length
   509	
   510	  // Empty state
   511	  if (packDependencies.length === 0) {
   512	    return (
   513	      <>
   514	        <Card className={clsx('p-4', ANIMATION_PRESETS.fadeIn)}>
   515	          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   516	            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   517	              <div className="p-2 bg-slate-mid/50 rounded-lg">
   518	                <Layers className="w-5 h-5 text-text-muted" />
   519	              </div>
   520	              <div>
   521	                <h3 className="font-medium text-text-primary">{t('pack.plugins.custom.packDependencies')}</h3>
   522	                <p className="text-sm text-text-muted">
   523	                  {t('pack.plugins.custom.noDeps')}
   524	                </p>
   525	              </div>
   526	            </div>
   527	
   528	            {isEditing && (
   529	              <Button
   530	                variant="secondary"
   531	                size="sm"
   532	                onClick={() => setShowAddModal(true)}
   533	              >
   534	                <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
   535	                {t('common.add')}
   536	              </Button>
   537	            )}
   538	          </div>
   539	        </Card>
   540	
   541	        <AddPackDependencyModal
   542	          isOpen={showAddModal}
   543	          currentPackName={pack.name}
   544	          existingDependencies={existingDepNames}
   545	          onAdd={(packName, required) => addMutation.mutate({ packName, required })}
   546	          onClose={() => setShowAddModal(false)}
   547	          isAdding={addMutation.isPending}
   548	        />
   549	      </>
   550	    )
   551	  }
   552	
   553	  return (
   554	    <>
   555	      <Card className={clsx('overflow-hidden', ANIMATION_PRESETS.fadeIn)}>
   556	        {/* Header */}
   557	        <div
   558	          className="p-4 flex items-center justify-between cursor-pointer hover:bg-slate-mid/30 transition-colors"
   559	          onClick={() => setExpanded(!expanded)}
   560	        >
   561	          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   562	            <div className={clsx(
   563	              'p-2 rounded-lg',
   564	              missingCount > 0 ? 'bg-amber-500/20' : 'bg-synapse/20'
   565	            )}>
   566	              <Layers className={clsx(
   567	                'w-5 h-5',
   568	                missingCount > 0 ? 'text-amber-400' : 'text-synapse'
   569	              )} />
   570	            </div>
   571	            <div>
   572	              <h3 className="font-medium text-text-primary">{t('pack.plugins.custom.packDependencies')}</h3>
   573	              <p className="text-sm text-text-muted">
   574	                {t('pack.plugins.custom.installedCount', { count: installedCount })}
   575	                {missingCount > 0 && (
   576	                  <span className="text-amber-400 ml-1">
   577	                    · {t('pack.plugins.custom.missingCount', { count: missingCount })}
   578	                  </span>
   579	                )}
   580	              </p>
   581	            </div>
   582	          </div>
   583	
   584	          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   585	            {isEditing && (
   586	              <Button
   587	                variant="secondary"
   588	                size="sm"
   589	                onClick={(e) => {
   590	                  e.stopPropagation()
   591	                  setShowAddModal(true)
   592	                }}
   593	              >
   594	                <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
   595	                {t('common.add')}
   596	              </Button>
   597	            )}
   598	            {expanded ? (
   599	              <ChevronDown className="w-5 h-5 text-text-muted" />
   600	            ) : (
   601	              <ChevronRight className="w-5 h-5 text-text-muted" />
   602	            )}
   603	          </div>
   604	        </div>
   605	
   606	        {/* Content */}
   607	        {expanded && (
   608	          <div className="border-t border-slate-mid">
   609	            {/* Search */}
   610	            {packDependencies.length > 3 && (
   611	              <div className="p-3 border-b border-slate-mid">
   612	                <div className="relative">
   613	                  <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-text-muted" />
   614	                  <input
   615	                    type="text"
   616	                    value={searchQuery}
   617	                    onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
   618	                    placeholder={t('pack.plugins.custom.searchPlaceholder')}
   619	                    className={clsx(
   620	                      'w-full pl-9 pr-4 py-2 rounded-lg',
   621	                      'bg-slate-dark border border-slate-mid',
   622	                      'text-text-primary placeholder:text-text-muted',
   623	                      'focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-synapse/50'
   624	                    )}
   625	                  />
   626	                </div>
   627	              </div>
   628	            )}
   629	
   630	            {/* Card-based dependency list */}
   631	            <div className="p-4 space-y-3 max-h-[600px] overflow-y-auto">
   632	              {filteredDependencies.map((dep) => (
   633	                <PackDepCard
   634	                  key={dep.pack_name}
   635	                  dep={dep}
   636	                  isEditing={isEditing}
   637	                  onRemove={() => {
   638	                    if (confirm(t('pack.plugins.custom.confirmRemove', {
   639	                      name: dep.pack_name,
   640	                      defaultValue: `Remove pack dependency "${dep.pack_name}"?`,
   641	                    }))) {
   642	                      removeMutation.mutate(dep.pack_name)
   643	                    }
   644	                  }}
   645	                  onNavigate={() => {
   646	                    window.location.href = `/pack/${encodeURIComponent(dep.pack_name)}`
   647	                  }}
   648	                />
   649	              ))}
   650	
   651	              {filteredDependencies.length === 0 && searchQuery && (
   652	                <div className="p-4 text-center text-text-muted">
   653	                  {t('pack.plugins.custom.noMatch', { query: searchQuery })}
   654	                </div>
   655	              )}
   656	            </div>
   657	
   658	            {/* Dependency tree */}
   659	            {packDependencies.length > 0 && (
   660	              <div className="px-4 pb-4">
   661	                <DependencyTree packName={pack.name} />
   662	              </div>
   663	            )}
   664	          </div>
   665	        )}
   666	      </Card>
   667	
   668	      <AddPackDependencyModal
   669	        isOpen={showAddModal}
   670	        currentPackName={pack.name}
   671	        existingDependencies={existingDepNames}
   672	        onAdd={(packName, required) => addMutation.mutate({ packName, required })}
   673	        onClose={() => setShowAddModal(false)}
   674	        isAdding={addMutation.isPending}
   675	      />
   676	    </>
   677	  )
   678	}
   679	
   680	export default PackDepsSection

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/**
     2	 * AddPackDependencyModal
     3	 *
     4	 * Simple modal for adding pack-to-pack dependencies.
     5	 * Shows searchable list of available packs, with required/optional toggle.
     6	 */
     7	
     8	import { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react'
     9	import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'
    10	import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
    11	import { X, Loader2, Package, Search, Plus } from 'lucide-react'
    12	import { clsx } from 'clsx'
    13	import { Button } from '@/components/ui/Button'
    14	import { ANIMATION_PRESETS } from '../constants'
    15	
    16	// =============================================================================
    17	// Types
    18	// =============================================================================
    19	
    20	interface PackSummary {
    21	  name: string
    22	  version?: string
    23	  pack_type?: string
    24	  description?: string
    25	}
    26	
    27	export interface AddPackDependencyModalProps {
    28	  isOpen: boolean
    29	  currentPackName: string
    30	  existingDependencies: string[]
    31	  onAdd: (packName: string, required: boolean) => void
    32	  onClose: () => void
    33	  isAdding?: boolean
    34	}
    35	
    36	// =============================================================================
    37	// Main Component
    38	// =============================================================================
    39	
    40	export function AddPackDependencyModal({
    41	  isOpen,
    42	  currentPackName,
    43	  existingDependencies,
    44	  onAdd,
    45	  onClose,
    46	  isAdding = false,
    47	}: AddPackDependencyModalProps) {
    48	  const { t } = useTranslation()
    49	  const [search, setSearch] = useState('')
    50	  const [selectedPack, setSelectedPack] = useState<string | null>(null)
    51	  const [required, setRequired] = useState(true)
    52	
    53	  // Reset form when modal opens
    54	  useEffect(() => {
    55	    if (isOpen) {
    56	      setSearch('')
    57	      setSelectedPack(null)
    58	      setRequired(true)
    59	    }
    60	  }, [isOpen])
    61	
    62	  // Fetch available packs
    63	  const { data: allPacks = [], isLoading } = useQuery<PackSummary[]>({
    64	    queryKey: ['packs'],
    65	    queryFn: async () => {
    66	      const res = await fetch('/api/packs/')
    67	      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch packs')
    68	      const data = await res.json()
    69	      return data.packs || data || []
    70	    },
    71	    enabled: isOpen,
    72	    staleTime: 30000,
    73	  })
    74	
    75	  // Filter out current pack and already-added packs
    76	  const availablePacks = useMemo(() => {
    77	    const excluded = new Set([currentPackName, ...existingDependencies])
    78	    return allPacks
    79	      .filter((p) => !excluded.has(p.name))
    80	      .filter((p) => {
    81	        if (!search) return true
    82	        const q = search.toLowerCase()
    83	        return p.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
    84	          p.description?.toLowerCase().includes(q)
    85	      })
    86	  }, [allPacks, currentPackName, existingDependencies, search])
    87	
    88	  const handleAdd = () => {
    89	    if (selectedPack) {
    90	      onAdd(selectedPack, required)
    91	    }
    92	  }
    93	
    94	  if (!isOpen) return null
    95	
    96	  return (
    97	    <div
    98	      className={clsx(
    99	        "fixed inset-0 bg-black/70 z-50",
   100	        "flex items-center justify-center p-4",
   101	        ANIMATION_PRESETS.fadeIn
   102	      )}
   103	      onClick={(e) => {
   104	        if (e.target === e.currentTarget) onClose()
   105	      }}
   106	    >
   107	      <div
   108	        className={clsx(
   109	          "bg-slate-deep rounded-2xl p-6 max-w-lg w-full max-h-[80vh] flex flex-col",
   110	          "border border-slate-mid/50",
   111	          "shadow-2xl",
   112	          ANIMATION_PRESETS.scaleIn
   113	        )}
   114	        onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
   115	      >
   116	        {/* Header */}
   117	        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
   118	          <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-text-primary flex items-center gap-2">
   119	            <Package className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-400" />
   120	            {t('pack.packDependencies.add', 'Add Pack Dependency')}
   121	          </h3>
   122	          <button
   123	            onClick={onClose}
   124	            className="p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-mid transition-colors duration-200"
   125	          >
   126	            <X className="w-5 h-5 text-text-muted" />
   127	          </button>
   128	        </div>
   129	
   130	        {/* Search */}
   131	        <div className="relative mb-4">
   132	          <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-text-muted" />
   133	          <input
   134	            type="text"
   135	            value={search}
   136	            onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}
   137	            placeholder={t('pack.packDependencies.searchPlaceholder', 'Search packs...')}
   138	            className={clsx(
   139	              "w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl",
   140	              "bg-slate-dark border border-slate-mid/50",
   141	              "text-text-primary text-sm placeholder:text-text-muted",
   142	              "focus:border-synapse/50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-synapse/30",
   143	              "transition-colors duration-200"
   144	            )}
   145	            autoFocus
   146	          />
   147	        </div>
   148	
   149	        {/* Pack list */}
   150	        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto min-h-0 space-y-1 mb-4">
   151	          {isLoading ? (
   152	            <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-8">
   153	              <Loader2 className="w-6 h-6 text-synapse animate-spin" />
   154	            </div>
   155	          ) : availablePacks.length === 0 ? (
   156	            <div className="text-center py-8 text-text-muted text-sm">
   157	              {search
   158	                ? t('pack.packDependencies.noMatch', 'No packs match "{{query}}"', { query: search })
   159	                : t('pack.packDependencies.noPacks', 'No packs available')
   160	              }
   161	            </div>
   162	          ) : (
   163	            availablePacks.map((pack) => (
   164	              <button
   165	                key={pack.name}
   166	                onClick={() => setSelectedPack(pack.name === selectedPack ? null : pack.name)}
   167	                className={clsx(
   168	                  "w-full text-left p-3 rounded-xl border transition-all duration-200",
   169	                  pack.name === selectedPack
   170	                    ? "bg-synapse/10 border-synapse/50"
   171	                    : "bg-slate-dark/50 border-transparent hover:border-slate-mid/50 hover:bg-slate-dark"
   172	                )}
   173	              >
   174	                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   175	                  <Package className={clsx(
   176	                    "w-4 h-4",
   177	                    pack.name === selectedPack ? "text-synapse" : "text-text-muted"
   178	                  )} />
   179	                  <span className={clsx(
   180	                    "font-medium text-sm",
   181	                    pack.name === selectedPack ? "text-synapse" : "text-text-primary"
   182	                  )}>
   183	                    {pack.name}
   184	                  </span>
   185	                  {pack.version && (
   186	                    <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">v{pack.version}</span>
   187	                  )}
   188	                  {pack.pack_type && (
   189	                    <span className="text-xs px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-slate-mid/50 text-text-muted rounded">
   190	                      {pack.pack_type}
   191	                    </span>
   192	                  )}
   193	                </div>
   194	                {pack.description && (
   195	                  <p className="text-xs text-text-muted mt-1 truncate pl-6">
   196	                    {pack.description}
   197	                  </p>
   198	                )}
   199	              </button>
   200	            ))
   201	          )}
   202	        </div>
   203	
   204	        {/* Required toggle */}
   205	        {selectedPack && (
   206	          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4 p-3 bg-slate-dark/50 rounded-xl">
   207	            <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
   208	              <input
   209	                type="checkbox"
   210	                checked={required}
   211	                onChange={(e) => setRequired(e.target.checked)}
   212	                className="rounded border-slate-mid text-synapse focus:ring-synapse/30"
   213	              />
   214	              <span className="text-sm text-text-secondary">
   215	                {t('pack.packDependencies.required', 'Required dependency')}
   216	              </span>
   217	            </label>
   218	          </div>
   219	        )}
   220	
   221	        {/* Footer */}
   222	        <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3 pt-3 border-t border-slate-mid/30">
   223	          <Button
   224	            variant="ghost"
   225	            onClick={onClose}
   226	            disabled={isAdding}
   227	          >
   228	            {t('common.cancel', 'Cancel')}
   229	          </Button>
   230	          <Button
   231	            onClick={handleAdd}
   232	            disabled={!selectedPack || isAdding}
   233	          >
   234	            {isAdding ? (
   235	              <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
   236	            ) : (
   237	              <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
   238	            )}
   239	            {t('pack.packDependencies.addButton', 'Add')}
   240	          </Button>
   241	        </div>
   242	      </div>
   243	    </div>
   244	  )
   245	}
   246	
   247	export default AddPackDependencyModal

 succeeded in 0ms:
   320	// Asset Row Component
   321	// =============================================================================
   322	
   323	interface AssetRowProps {
   324	  asset: AssetInfo
   325	  isSuggested: boolean
   326	  backupStatus?: PackBackupStatusResponse
   327	  downloadingAssets: Set<string>
   328	  getAssetDownload: (assetName: string) => DownloadProgress | undefined
   329	  onDownloadAsset: (asset: AssetInfo) => void
   330	  onRestoreFromBackup: (asset: AssetInfo) => Promise<void>
   331	  onDeleteResource: (assetName: string) => void
   332	  onOpenBaseModelResolver: () => void
   333	  onResolvePack: () => void
   334	  onSetAsBaseModel?: (asset: AssetInfo) => void
   335	  isResolvePending?: boolean
   336	  isDeletePending?: boolean
   337	}
   338	
   339	function AssetRow({
   340	  asset,
   341	  isSuggested,
   342	  backupStatus,
   343	  downloadingAssets,
   344	  getAssetDownload,
   345	  onDownloadAsset,
   346	  onRestoreFromBackup,
   347	  onDeleteResource,
   348	  onOpenBaseModelResolver,
   349	  onResolvePack,
   350	  onSetAsBaseModel,
   351	  isResolvePending = false,
   352	  isDeletePending = false,
   353	}: AssetRowProps) {
   354	  const { t } = useTranslation()
   355	
   356	  // Determine asset state
   357	  const isBaseModel = asset.is_base_model ?? false
   358	
   359	  const assetDownload = getAssetDownload(asset.name)
   360	  const isDownloading = assetDownload?.status === 'downloading' || downloadingAssets.has(asset.name)
   361	  const isInstalled = asset.installed || !!asset.local_path
   362	  const canDownload = !!asset.url && !isInstalled && !isDownloading
   363	  const needsResolve = asset.status === 'unresolved'
   364	  const readyToDownload = !!asset.url && !isInstalled
   365	
   366	  // Check backup status
   367	  const backupBlob = asset.sha256
   368	    ? backupStatus?.blobs?.find(b => b.sha256 === asset.sha256)
   369	    : undefined
   370	  const isOnBackup = backupBlob && typeof backupBlob === 'object' && backupBlob.on_backup
   371	  const isBackupOnly = isOnBackup && !isInstalled
   372	
   373	  // Can this asset be set as base model? Only checkpoints that aren't already base model
   374	  const canSetAsBaseModel = onSetAsBaseModel && !isBaseModel &&
   375	    (asset.asset_type === 'checkpoint' || asset.asset_type === 'base_model')
   376	
   377	  return (
   378	    <div
   379	      className={clsx(
   380	        "p-4 rounded-xl border transition-all duration-200",
   381	        // Suggested deps use softer styling
   382	        isSuggested
   383	          ? isInstalled
   384	            ? "bg-green-900/20 border-green-500/30"
   385	            : "bg-slate-dark/50 border-slate-mid/30"
   386	          : // Required deps use full-intensity status styling
   387	            isDownloading
   388	              ? "bg-synapse/10 border-synapse/50"
   389	              : isInstalled
   390	                ? "bg-green-900/30 border-green-500/50"
   391	                : isBackupOnly
   392	                  ? "bg-sky-900/30 border-sky-500/50"
   393	                  : needsResolve
   394	                    ? "bg-amber-900/30 border-amber-500/50"
   395	                    : readyToDownload
   396	                      ? "bg-blue-900/20 border-blue-500/30"
   397	                      : "bg-slate-dark border-slate-mid",
   398	        "hover:shadow-lg"
   399	      )}
   400	    >
   401	      {/* Main row */}
   402	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   403	        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 flex-1 min-w-0">
   404	          {/* Status icon - suggested unresolved deps show package icon instead of warning */}
   405	          <StatusIcon
   406	            isDownloading={isDownloading}
   407	            isInstalled={isInstalled}
   408	            isBackupOnly={!!isBackupOnly}
   409	            needsResolve={!isSuggested && needsResolve}
   410	          />
   411	
   412	          {/* Asset info */}
   413	          <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
   414	            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   415	              <p className={clsx(
   416	                "font-medium truncate",
   417	                isSuggested ? "text-text-secondary" : "text-text-primary"
   418	              )}>{asset.name}</p>
   419	              {asset.version_name && (
   420	                <span className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-slate-mid/50 text-text-muted rounded text-xs">
   421	                  v{asset.version_name}
   422	                </span>
   423	              )}
   424	              {isSuggested && (
   425	                <span className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-slate-mid/30 text-text-muted rounded text-xs">
   426	                  {t('pack.dependencies.optional', 'Optional')}
   427	                </span>
   428	              )}
   429	            </div>
   430	            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-text-muted">
   431	              <span className="uppercase font-medium">{asset.asset_type}</span>
   432	              <span>•</span>
   433	              <span>{asset.source}</span>
   434	              {asset.base_model_hint && (
   435	                <>
   436	                  <span>•</span>
   437	                  <span className="text-amber-400 font-medium">{asset.base_model_hint}</span>
   438	                </>
   439	              )}
   440	              {asset.size && (
   441	                <>
   442	                  <span>•</span>
   443	                  <span>{formatSize(asset.size)}</span>
   444	                </>
   445	              )}
   446	              {asset.update_policy === 'follow_latest' && (
   447	                <>
   448	                  <span>•</span>
   449	                  <span className="text-blue-400">{t('pack.dependencies.detail.followLatest', 'Auto-update')}</span>
   450	                </>
   451	              )}
   452	            </div>
   453	            {/* Description */}
   454	            {asset.description && (
   455	              <p className="text-xs text-amber-400/80 mt-1 italic">
   456	                {asset.description}
   457	              </p>
   458	            )}
   459	          </div>
   460	        </div>
   461	
   462	        {/* Actions */}
   463	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-shrink-0">
   464	          {/* Restore from Backup */}
   465	          {isBackupOnly && asset.sha256 && (
   466	            <button
   467	              onClick={() => onRestoreFromBackup(asset)}
   468	              className="p-2 bg-sky-500 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-sky-400 transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-105"
   469	              title={t('pack.dependencies.restoreFromBackup')}
   470	            >
   471	              <Cloud className="w-4 h-4" />
   472	            </button>
   473	          )}
   474	
   475	          {/* Download button */}
   476	          {canDownload && !isDownloading && !isBackupOnly && (
   477	            <button
   478	              onClick={() => onDownloadAsset(asset)}
   479	              className="p-2 bg-synapse text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-synapse/80 transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-105"
   480	              title={t('pack.dependencies.downloadAsset')}
   481	            >
   482	              <Download className="w-4 h-4" />
   483	            </button>
   484	          )}
   485	
   486	          {/* Downloading spinner */}
   487	          {isDownloading && !assetDownload && (
   488	            <Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 text-synapse animate-spin" />
   489	          )}
   490	
   491	          {/* Select Model (base model) */}
   492	          {isBaseModel && !isInstalled && !canDownload && (
   493	            <button
   494	              onClick={onOpenBaseModelResolver}
   495	              className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-amber-500/30 text-amber-300 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium hover:bg-amber-500/40 transition-all duration-200"
   496	            >
   497	              {t('pack.dependencies.selectModel')}
   498	            </button>
   499	          )}
   500	
   501	          {/* Set as base model (for checkpoints that aren't already base model) */}
   502	          {canSetAsBaseModel && isInstalled && (
   503	            <button
   504	              onClick={() => onSetAsBaseModel(asset)}
   505	              className="p-2 bg-slate-mid text-text-muted rounded-lg hover:text-amber-400 hover:bg-slate-mid/80 transition-all duration-200"
   506	              title={t('pack.dependencies.setAsBaseModel', 'Set as base model')}
   507	            >
   508	              <ArrowLeftRight className="w-4 h-4" />
   509	            </button>
   510	          )}
   511	
   512	          {/* Resolve button */}
   513	          {!isBaseModel && needsResolve && !isSuggested && !isResolvePending && (
   514	            <button
   515	              onClick={onResolvePack}
   516	              className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-amber-500/30 text-amber-300 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium hover:bg-amber-500/40 transition-all duration-200"
   517	              title={t('pack.dependencies.reResolve')}
   518	            >
   519	              {t('pack.dependencies.resolve')}
   520	            </button>
   521	          )}
   522	          {!isBaseModel && needsResolve && !isSuggested && isResolvePending && (
   523	            <Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-400 animate-spin" />
   524	          )}
   525	
   526	          {/* Change base model */}
   527	          {isBaseModel && isInstalled && !needsResolve && (
   528	            <button
   529	              onClick={onOpenBaseModelResolver}
   530	              className="p-2 bg-slate-mid text-text-muted rounded-lg hover:text-amber-400 hover:bg-slate-mid/80 transition-all duration-200"
   531	              title={t('pack.dependencies.changeBaseModel')}
   532	            >
   533	              <ArrowLeftRight className="w-4 h-4" />
   534	            </button>
   535	          )}
   536	
   537	          {/* Re-download */}
   538	          {isInstalled && (
   539	            <button
   540	              onClick={() => {
   541	                if (confirm(t('pack.dependencies.confirmRedownload', { name: asset.filename || asset.name }))) {
   542	                  onDownloadAsset(asset)
   543	                }
   544	              }}
   545	              className="p-2 bg-slate-mid text-text-muted rounded-lg hover:text-synapse hover:bg-slate-mid/80 transition-all duration-200"
   546	              title={t('pack.dependencies.reDownloadTitle')}
   547	            >
   548	              <RotateCcw className="w-4 h-4" />
   549	            </button>
   550	          )}
   551	
   552	          {/* Delete */}
   553	          {isInstalled && (
   554	            <button
   555	              onClick={() => {
   556	                const deleteChoice = confirm(t('pack.dependencies.confirmDelete', { name: asset.filename || asset.name }))
   557	                if (deleteChoice) {
   558	                  onDeleteResource(asset.name)
   559	                }
   560	              }}
   561	              disabled={isDeletePending}
   562	              className="p-2 bg-red-500/20 text-red-400 rounded-lg hover:bg-red-500/30 transition-all duration-200"
   563	              title={t('pack.dependencies.deleteFile')}
   564	            >
   565	              {isDeletePending ? (
   566	                <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
   567	              ) : (
   568	                <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
   569	              )}
   570	            </button>
   571	          )}
   572	        </div>
   573	      </div>
   574	
   575	      {/* Download progress */}
   576	      {assetDownload && assetDownload.status === 'downloading' && (
   577	        <DownloadProgressDisplay download={assetDownload} />
   578	      )}
   579	
   580	      {/* Asset details */}
   581	      <AssetDetails
   582	        asset={asset}
   583	        isInstalled={isInstalled}
   584	        isBackupOnly={!!isBackupOnly}
   585	        isDownloading={isDownloading}
   586	      />
   587	    </div>
   588	  )
   589	}
   590	
   591	// =============================================================================
   592	// Main Component
   593	// =============================================================================
   594	
   595	export function PackDependenciesSection({
   596	  assets,
   597	  backupStatus,
   598	  downloadingAssets,
   599	  getAssetDownload,
   600	  onDownloadAll,
   601	  onDownloadAsset,
   602	  onRestoreFromBackup,
   603	  onDeleteResource,
   604	  onOpenBaseModelResolver,
   605	  onResolvePack,
   606	  onSetAsBaseModel,
   607	  isDownloadAllPending = false,
   608	  isResolvePending = false,
   609	  isDeletePending = false,
   610	  animationDelay = 0,
   611	}: PackDependenciesSectionProps) {
   612	  const { t } = useTranslation()
   613	
   614	  // Split assets into required and suggested
   615	  // required=false means "suggested" (e.g. base model from import)
   616	  // required=true or undefined means "required" (backward compatible)
   617	  const requiredAssets = assets?.filter(a => a.required !== false) ?? []
   618	  const suggestedAssets = assets?.filter(a => a.required === false) ?? []
   619	
   620	  // Check if any asset can be downloaded

   628	    <Card className="p-4">
   629	      {/* Header */}

   647	                <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
   648	              ) : (
   649	                <DownloadCloud className="w-4 h-4" />
   650	              )}
   651	              {t('pack.dependencies.downloadAll')}
   652	            </Button>
   653	          )}
   654	        </div>
   655	      </div>

   693	                <AssetRow
   694	                  key={`sug-${idx}`}
   695	                  asset={asset}
   696	                  isSuggested={true}
   697	                  backupStatus={backupStatus}
   698	                  downloadingAssets={downloadingAssets}
   699	                  getAssetDownload={getAssetDownload}
   700	                  onDownloadAsset={onDownloadAsset}
   701	                  onRestoreFromBackup={onRestoreFromBackup}
   702	                  onDeleteResource={onDeleteResource}
   703	                  onOpenBaseModelResolver={onOpenBaseModelResolver}
   704	                  onResolvePack={onResolvePack}
   705	                  onSetAsBaseModel={onSetAsBaseModel}
   706	                  isResolvePending={isResolvePending}
   707	                  isDeletePending={isDeletePending}
   708	                />

   717	        </div>

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/**
     2	 * PackHeader Section
     3	 *
     4	 * Displays pack identity: name, version, badges, and primary actions.
     5	 *
     6	 * FUNKCE ZACHOVÁNY:
     7	 * - Use Pack button (aktivace work profile)
     8	 * - Delete button
     9	 * - Source link handled by plugin (CivitaiPlugin adds "Civitai" button)
    10	 * - Model type badge
    11	 * - Base model badge
    12	 * - Version display
    13	 *
    14	 * VIZUÁLNĚ VYLEPŠENO:
    15	 * - Premium hover efekty
    16	 * - Animace při načtení
    17	 * - Lepší badge styling
    18	 *
    19	 * PHASE 2 - EDIT MODE:
    20	 * - Edit button toggle
    21	 * - Save/Discard buttons in edit mode
    22	 * - Unsaved changes indicator
    23	 */
    24	
    25	import { useState } from 'react'
    26	import { createPortal } from 'react-dom'
    27	import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'
    28	import { Loader2, Trash2, Zap, Sparkles, Pencil, Save, X, AlertCircle, AlertTriangle } from 'lucide-react'
    29	import { clsx } from 'clsx'
    30	import { Button } from '@/components/ui/Button'
    31	import type { PackDetail } from '../types'
    32	import { ANIMATION_PRESETS } from '../constants'
    33	
    34	// =============================================================================
    35	// Types
    36	// =============================================================================
    37	
    38	export interface PackHeaderProps {
    39	  /**
    40	   * Pack data to display
    41	   */
    42	  pack: PackDetail
    43	
    44	  /**
    45	   * Handler for "Use Pack" action
    46	   */
    47	  onUsePack: () => void
    48	
    49	  /**
    50	   * Handler for delete action
    51	   */
    52	  onDelete: () => void
    53	
    54	  /**
    55	   * Whether use pack mutation is pending
    56	   */
    57	  isUsingPack?: boolean
    58	
    59	  /**
    60	   * Whether delete mutation is pending
    61	   */
    62	  isDeleting?: boolean
    63	
    64	  /**
    65	   * Animation delay for staggered entrance
    66	   */
    67	  animationDelay?: number
    68	
    69	  // === Edit Mode Props ===
    70	
    71	  /**
    72	   * Whether edit mode is active
    73	   */
    74	  isEditing?: boolean
    75	
    76	  /**
    77	   * Whether there are unsaved changes
    78	   */
    79	  hasUnsavedChanges?: boolean
    80	
    81	  /**
    82	   * Whether save is in progress
    83	   */
    84	  isSaving?: boolean
    85	
    86	  /**
    87	   * Handler to start edit mode
    88	   */
    89	  onStartEdit?: () => void
    90	
    91	  /**
    92	   * Handler to save changes
    93	   */
    94	  onSaveChanges?: () => void
    95	
    96	  /**
    97	   * Handler to discard changes
    98	   */
    99	  onDiscardChanges?: () => void
   100	
   101	  // === Plugin Props ===
   102	
   103	  /**
   104	   * Additional actions from plugin (rendered after Edit button)
   105	   */
   106	  pluginActions?: React.ReactNode
   107	}
   108	
   109	// =============================================================================
   110	// Sub-components
   111	// =============================================================================
   112	
   113	interface BadgeProps {
   114	  children: React.ReactNode
   115	  variant?: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'muted'
   116	  className?: string
   117	}
   118	
   119	function Badge({ children, variant = 'muted', className }: BadgeProps) {
   120	  const variantClasses = {
   121	    primary: 'bg-synapse/20 text-synapse border-synapse/30',
   122	    secondary: 'bg-pulse/20 text-pulse border-pulse/30',
   123	    muted: 'bg-slate-mid/50 text-text-secondary border-slate-mid',
   124	  }
   125	
   126	  return (
   127	    <span
   128	      className={clsx(
   129	        'px-3 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium border',
   130	        'transition-all duration-200',
   131	        'hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-sm',
   132	        variantClasses[variant],
   133	        className
   134	      )}
   135	    >
   136	      {children}
   137	    </span>
   138	  )
   139	}
   140	
   141	// =============================================================================
   142	// Component
   143	// =============================================================================
   144	
   145	export function PackHeader({
   146	  pack,
   147	  onUsePack,
   148	  onDelete,
   149	  isUsingPack = false,
   150	  isDeleting = false,
   151	  animationDelay = 0,
   152	  // Edit mode props
   153	  isEditing = false,
   154	  hasUnsavedChanges = false,
   155	  isSaving = false,
   156	  onStartEdit,
   157	  onSaveChanges,
   158	  onDiscardChanges,
   159	  // Plugin props
   160	  pluginActions,
   161	}: PackHeaderProps) {
   162	  const { t } = useTranslation()
   163	
   164	  // State for delete confirmation dialog
   165	  const [showDeleteConfirm, setShowDeleteConfirm] = useState(false)
   166	
   167	  const handleDeleteClick = () => {
   168	    setShowDeleteConfirm(true)
   169	  }
   170	
   171	  const handleConfirmDelete = () => {
   172	    setShowDeleteConfirm(false)
   173	    onDelete()
   174	  }
   175	
   176	  const handleCancelDelete = () => {
   177	    setShowDeleteConfirm(false)
   178	  }
   179	
   180	  return (
   181	    <div
   182	      className={clsx(
   183	        'flex items-start justify-between gap-6',
   184	        ANIMATION_PRESETS.fadeIn
   185	      )}
   186	      style={{ animationDelay: `${animationDelay}ms`, animationFillMode: 'both' }}
   187	    >
   188	      {/* Left: Pack Identity */}
   189	      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   190	        {/* Pack Name with subtle animation */}
   191	        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   192	          <h1 className={clsx(
   193	            'text-2xl font-bold text-text-primary truncate',
   194	            'transition-colors duration-200',
   195	            'hover:text-synapse'
   196	          )}>
   197	            {pack.name}
   198	          </h1>
   199	
   200	          {/* Edit Mode Indicator */}
   201	          {isEditing && (
   202	            <span className={clsx(
   203	              'px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium',
   204	              'bg-synapse/20 text-synapse border border-synapse/30',
   205	              'animate-pulse'
   206	            )}>
   207	              {t('pack.header.editing')}
   208	            </span>
   209	          )}
   210	
   211	          {/* Unsaved Changes Warning */}
   212	          {hasUnsavedChanges && !isEditing && (
   213	            <span className={clsx(
   214	              'flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium',
   215	              'bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400 border border-amber-500/30'
   216	            )}>
   217	              <AlertCircle className="w-3 h-3" />
   218	              {t('pack.header.unsaved')}
   219	            </span>
   220	          )}
   221	        </div>
   222	
   223	        {/* Badges Row */}
   224	        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mt-3 flex-wrap">
   225	          {/* Model Type Badge (LoRA, Checkpoint, etc.) */}
   226	          {pack.model_info?.model_type && (
   227	            <Badge variant="primary">
   228	              <span className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   229	                <Sparkles className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
   230	                {pack.model_info.model_type}
   231	              </span>
   232	            </Badge>
   233	          )}
   234	
   235	          {/* Base Model Badge */}
   236	          {pack.model_info?.base_model && (
   237	            <Badge variant="secondary">
   238	              {pack.model_info.base_model}
   239	            </Badge>
   240	          )}
   241	
   242	          {/* Version */}
   243	          <Badge variant="muted">
   244	            v{pack.version}
   245	          </Badge>
   246	        </div>
   247	      </div>
   248	
   249	      {/* Right: Action Buttons */}
   250	      <div className="flex gap-2 flex-shrink-0">
   251	        {isEditing ? (
   252	          // Edit Mode Actions
   253	          <>
   254	            {/* Save Button */}
   255	            <Button
   256	              variant="primary"
   257	              onClick={onSaveChanges}
   258	              disabled={isSaving || !hasUnsavedChanges}
   259	              className={clsx(
   260	                'transition-all duration-200',
   261	                !isSaving && hasUnsavedChanges && 'hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-synapse/20 hover:scale-105'
   262	              )}
   263	            >
   264	              {isSaving ? (
   265	                <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
   266	              ) : (
   267	                <Save className="w-4 h-4" />
   268	              )}
   269	              {t('pack.actions.save')}
   270	            </Button>
   271	
   272	            {/* Discard Button */}
   273	            <Button
   274	              variant="secondary"
   275	              onClick={onDiscardChanges}
   276	              disabled={isSaving}
   277	              className={clsx(
   278	                'transition-all duration-200',
   279	                !isSaving && 'hover:scale-105'
   280	              )}
   281	            >
   282	              <X className="w-4 h-4" />
   283	              {t('common.cancel')}
   284	            </Button>
   285	          </>
   286	        ) : (
   287	          // Normal Mode Actions
   288	          <>
   289	            {/* Edit Button */}
   290	            {onStartEdit && (
   291	              <Button
   292	                variant="secondary"
   293	                onClick={onStartEdit}
   294	                className="transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-105 hover:bg-synapse/20 hover:text-synapse"
   295	              >
   296	                <Pencil className="w-4 h-4" />
   297	                {t('pack.actions.edit')}
   298	              </Button>
   299	            )}
   300	
   301	            {/* Plugin Actions (e.g., Check Updates for Civitai, Console for Install) */}
   302	            {pluginActions}
   303	
   304	            {/* Use Pack - Primary CTA */}
   305	            <Button
   306	              variant="primary"
   307	              onClick={onUsePack}
   308	              disabled={isUsingPack}
   309	              className={clsx(
   310	                'transition-all duration-200',
   311	                !isUsingPack && 'hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-synapse/20 hover:scale-105'
   312	              )}
   313	            >
   314	              {isUsingPack ? (
   315	                <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
   316	              ) : (
   317	                <Zap className="w-4 h-4" />
   318	              )}
   319	              {t('pack.actions.use')}
   320	            </Button>
   321	
   322	            {/* Delete Button */}
   323	            <Button
   324	              variant="secondary"
   325	              onClick={handleDeleteClick}
   326	              disabled={isDeleting}
   327	              className={clsx(
   328	                'text-red-400 transition-all duration-200',
   329	                !isDeleting && 'hover:bg-red-500/20 hover:scale-105 hover:text-red-300'
   330	              )}
   331	            >
   332	              {isDeleting ? (
   333	                <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
   334	              ) : (
   335	                <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
   336	              )}
   337	            </Button>
   338	          </>
   339	        )}
   340	      </div>
   341	
   342	      {/* Delete Confirmation Dialog */}
   343	      {showDeleteConfirm && createPortal(
   344	        <div
   345	          className="fixed inset-0 z-[9999] flex items-center justify-center"
   346	          onClick={handleCancelDelete}
   347	        >
   348	          {/* Backdrop */}
   349	          <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-sm" />
   350	
   351	          {/* Dialog */}
   352	          <div
   353	            className={clsx(
   354	              "relative z-10 w-full max-w-md mx-4",
   355	              "bg-slate-dark border border-red-500/30 rounded-xl shadow-2xl",
   356	              "animate-in fade-in zoom-in-95 duration-200"
   357	            )}
   358	            onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
   359	          >
   360	            {/* Header */}
   361	            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 border-b border-slate-mid/50">
   362	              <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-red-500/20">
   363	                <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-400" />
   364	              </div>
   365	              <div>
   366	                <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-text-primary">{t('pack.modals.delete.title')}</h3>
   367	                <p className="text-sm text-text-muted">{t('pack.modals.delete.warning')}</p>
   368	              </div>
   369	            </div>
   370	
   371	            {/* Content */}
   372	            <div className="p-4">
   373	              <p className="text-text-secondary">
   374	                {t('pack.header.deleteConfirm', { name: pack.name })}
   375	              </p>
   376	              <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-text-muted">
   377	                {t('pack.header.deleteWarning')}
   378	              </p>
   379	            </div>
   380	
   381	            {/* Actions */}
   382	            <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3 p-4 border-t border-slate-mid/50">
   383	              <Button
   384	                variant="secondary"
   385	                onClick={handleCancelDelete}
   386	              >
   387	                {t('common.cancel')}
   388	              </Button>
   389	              <Button
   390	                variant="primary"
   391	                onClick={handleConfirmDelete}
   392	                disabled={isDeleting}
   393	                className="bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-500 border-red-500"
   394	              >
   395	                {isDeleting ? (
   396	                  <>
   397	                    <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
   398	                    {t('pack.header.deleting')}
   399	                  </>
   400	                ) : (
   401	                  <>
   402	                    <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
   403	                    {t('pack.modals.delete.title')}
   404	                  </>
   405	                )}
   406	              </Button>
   407	            </div>
   408	          </div>
   409	        </div>,
   410	        document.body
   411	      )}
   412	    </div>
   413	  )
   414	}
   415	
   416	export default PackHeader

/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba apps/web/src/components/modules/pack-detail/sections/PackInfoSection.tsx | sed -n '300,365p'" in /home/box/git/github/synapse
 succeeded in 0ms:
   300	    </div>
   301	  )
   302	}
   303	
   304	// =============================================================================
   305	// Main Component
   306	// =============================================================================
   307	
   308	export function PackInfoSection({ pack, onEditDescription, animationDelay = 0 }: PackInfoSectionProps) {
   309	  const hasTriggerWords = pack.model_info?.trigger_words && pack.model_info.trigger_words.length > 0
   310	  const hasModelInfo = !!pack.model_info
   311	  const hasDescription = !!pack.description
   312	
   313	  // Return null if no content
   314	  if (!hasTriggerWords && !hasModelInfo && !hasDescription) {
   315	    return null
   316	  }
   317	
   318	  // Stagger delays for each card
   319	  const delays = {
   320	    triggerWords: animationDelay,
   321	    modelInfo: animationDelay + 50,
   322	    description: animationDelay + 100,
   323	  }
   324	
   325	  return (
   326	    <div className="space-y-4">
   327	      {/* Trigger Words */}
   328	      {hasTriggerWords && (
   329	        <TriggerWordsCard
   330	          triggerWords={pack.model_info!.trigger_words}
   331	          animationDelay={delays.triggerWords}
   332	        />
   333	      )}
   334	
   335	      {/* Model Info */}
   336	      {hasModelInfo && (
   337	        <ModelInfoCard
   338	          modelInfo={pack.model_info!}
   339	          animationDelay={delays.modelInfo}
   340	        />
   341	      )}
   342	
   343	      {/* Description */}
   344	      {hasDescription && (
   345	        <DescriptionCard
   346	          description={pack.description!}
   347	          animationDelay={delays.description}
   348	          onEdit={onEditDescription}
   349	        />
   350	      )}
   351	    </div>
   352	  )
   353	}
   354	
   355	export default PackInfoSection

   248	export function PackWorkflowsSection({
   249	  workflows,
   250	  packName,

   252	  onCreateSymlink,

   254	  onDeleteWorkflow,

   257	  isCreateSymlinkPending,
   258	  isRemoveSymlinkPending,
   259	  isDeletePending,
   260	  isGeneratePending,
   261	  animationDelay = 0,
   262	}: PackWorkflowsSectionProps) {
   263	  const { t } = useTranslation()
   264	
   265	  return (
   266	    <div
   267	      className={ANIMATION_PRESETS.sectionEnter}
   268	      style={{ animationDelay: `${animationDelay}ms`, animationFillMode: 'both' }}
   269	    >
   270	      <Card className="p-4">
   271	        {/* Header */}
   272	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
   273	        <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-text-primary flex items-center gap-2">
   274	          <FileJson className="w-4 h-4 text-synapse" />
   275	          {t('pack.workflows.comfyuiWorkflows')}
   276	          <span className="text-text-muted font-normal">({workflows?.length || 0})</span>
   277	        </h3>
   278	
   279	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   280	          {/* Upload button */}
   281	          <Button
   282	            size="sm"
   283	            variant="secondary"
   284	            onClick={onOpenUploadModal}
   285	            className="transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-105"
   286	          >
   287	            <Upload className="w-4 h-4" />
   288	            {t('pack.workflows.upload')}
   289	          </Button>
   290	
   291	          {/* Generate Default button */}
   292	          <div className="relative group">
   293	            <Button
   294	              size="sm"
   295	              variant="primary"
   296	              disabled={needsBaseModel || isGeneratePending}
   297	              onClick={onGenerateWorkflow}
   298	              className={clsx(
   299	                "transition-all duration-200",
   300	                !needsBaseModel && !isGeneratePending && "hover:scale-105",
   301	                needsBaseModel && "opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed"
   302	              )}
   303	            >
   304	              {isGeneratePending ? (
   305	                <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
   306	              ) : (
   307	                <Play className="w-4 h-4" />
   308	              )}
   309	              {t('pack.workflows.generate')}
   310	            </Button>
   311	            {needsBaseModel && (
   312	              <div className={clsx(
   313	                "absolute bottom-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 mb-2",
   314	                "px-3 py-2 rounded-lg",
   315	                "bg-slate-dark border border-amber-500/50",
   316	                "text-xs text-amber-400 whitespace-nowrap",
   317	                "opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100",
   318	                "transition-opacity pointer-events-none",
   319	                "z-10"
   320	              )}>
   321	                {t('pack.workflows.resolveFirst')}
   322	              </div>
   323	            )}
   324	          </div>
   325	        </div>
   326	      </div>
   327	
   328	      {/* Workflows List */}
   329	      {workflows?.length > 0 ? (
   330	        <div className="space-y-2">
   331	          {workflows.map((workflow, idx) => (
   332	            <WorkflowCard
   333	              key={idx}
   334	              workflow={workflow}
   335	              packName={packName}
   336	              onCreateSymlink={onCreateSymlink}
   337	              onRemoveSymlink={onRemoveSymlink}
   338	              onDeleteWorkflow={onDeleteWorkflow}
   339	              isCreateSymlinkPending={isCreateSymlinkPending}

   341	              isDeletePending={isDeletePending}
   342	            />
   343	          ))}
   344	        </div>
   345	      ) : (
   346	        <div className="text-center py-8 text-text-muted">
   347	          <FileJson className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto mb-3 opacity-50" />
   348	          <p className="text-sm">{t('pack.workflows.noWorkflows')}</p>
   349	          <p className="text-xs mt-1">
   350	            {t('pack.workflows.emptyHint')}
   351	          </p>
   352	        </div>

   354	      </Card>

   357	}

     1	/**
     2	 * BaseModelResolverModal
     3	 *
     4	 * Complex modal for resolving base model dependencies.
     5	 * Supports three sources: Local (ComfyUI), Civitai, HuggingFace.
     6	 *
     7	 * FUNKCE ZACHOVÁNY:
     8	 * - Tab navigation (local/civitai/huggingface)
     9	 * - Smart base model hint detection
    10	 * - Local model filtering
    11	 * - Remote search with method info
    12	 * - HuggingFace file selection
    13	 * - Model selection and resolution
    14	 *
    15	 * VIZUÁLNĚ VYLEPŠENO:
    16	 * - Premium modal design
    17	 * - Enhanced tab styling
    18	 * - Better result cards
    19	 * - Improved loading states
    20	 */
    21	
    22	import { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react'
    23	import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'
    24	import {
    25	  X,
    26	  Loader2,
    27	  Check,
    28	  Search,
    29	  HardDrive,
    30	  Globe,
    31	  Database,

    36	} from 'lucide-react'

    39	import type {

    45	} from '../types'
    46	import { ANIMATION_PRESETS } from '../constants'
    47	import { formatSize } from '../utils'
    48	
    49	// =============================================================================
    50	// Types
    51	// =============================================================================
    52	
    53	export interface BaseModelResolverModalProps {
    54	  /**
    55	   * Whether modal is open
    56	   */
    57	  isOpen: boolean
    58	
    59	  /**
    60	   * Pack description for base model hint extraction
    61	   */
    62	  packDescription?: string
    63	
    64	  /**
    65	   * Local models from ComfyUI
    66	   */
    67	  localModels: LocalModel[]
    68	
    69	  /**
    70	   * Whether local models are loading
    71	   */
    72	  isLoadingLocalModels?: boolean
    73	
    74	  /**
    75	   * Search results from remote sources
    76	   */
    77	  searchResponse?: BaseModelSearchResponse
    78	
    79	  /**
    80	   * Whether search is in progress
    81	   */
    82	  isSearching?: boolean
    83	
    84	  /**
    85	   * Handler for search action
    86	   */
    87	  onSearch: (query: string, source: 'civitai' | 'huggingface') => void
    88	
    89	  /**
    90	   * Handler for fetching HuggingFace files
    91	   */
    92	  onFetchHfFiles: (repoId: string) => Promise<HuggingFaceFile[]>
    93	
    94	  /**
    95	   * Handler for resolve action
    96	   */
    97	  onResolve: (data: {
    98	    model_path?: string
    99	    download_url?: string
   100	    source?: string
   101	    file_name?: string
   102	    size_kb?: number
   103	  }) => void
   104	
   105	  /**
   106	   * Handler for close/cancel
   107	   */
   108	  onClose: () => void
   109	
   110	  /**
   111	   * Whether resolve is in progress
   112	   */
   113	  isResolving?: boolean
   114	}
   115	
   116	// =============================================================================
   117	// Helper Functions
   118	// =============================================================================
   119	
   120	/**
   121	 * Extract base model hint from description
   122	 */
   123	function extractBaseModelHint(description?: string): string | null {
   124	  if (!description) return null
   125	
   126	  const patterns = [
   127	    /trained on\s+([A-Za-z0-9\s\-_.]+)/i,
   128	    /base model[:\s]+([A-Za-z0-9\s\-_.]+)/i,
   129	    /requires?\s+([A-Za-z0-9\s\-_.]+)\s+(?:checkpoint|model)/i,
   130	    /for\s+([A-Za-z0-9\s\-_.]+)\s+(?:checkpoint|model)/i,
   131	    /(Illustrious|Pony|SDXL|SD\s*1\.5|SD\s*2\.1|Flux|AuraFlow)/i,
   132	  ]
   133	
   134	  for (const pattern of patterns) {
   135	    const match = description.match(pattern)
   136	    if (match) return match[1].trim()
   137	  }
   138	
   139	  return null
   140	}
   141	
   142	// =============================================================================
   143	// Sub-components
   144	// =============================================================================
   145	
   146	interface TabButtonProps {
   147	  tab: ResolverTab
   148	  currentTab: ResolverTab
   149	  onClick: () => void
   150	  icon: React.ReactNode
   151	  label: string
   152	}
   153	
   154	function TabButton({ tab, currentTab, onClick, icon, label }: TabButtonProps) {
   155	  const isActive = tab === currentTab
   156	
   157	  return (
   158	    <button
   159	      onClick={onClick}
   160	      className={clsx(
   161	        "flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-3 px-4",
   162	        "transition-all duration-200 font-medium",
   163	        isActive
   164	          ? "text-synapse border-b-2 border-synapse bg-synapse/10"
   165	          : "text-text-muted hover:text-text-primary hover:bg-slate-mid/30"
   166	      )}
   167	    >
   168	      {icon}
   169	      {label}
   170	    </button>
   171	  )
   172	}
   173	
   174	interface LocalModelCardProps {
   175	  model: LocalModel
   176	  isSelected: boolean
   177	  onSelect: () => void
   178	}
   179	
   180	function LocalModelCard({ model, isSelected, onSelect }: LocalModelCardProps) {
   181	  return (
   182	    <button
   183	      onClick={onSelect}
   184	      className={clsx(
   185	        "w-full text-left p-4 rounded-xl",
   186	        "transition-all duration-200",
   187	        "flex items-center gap-3",
   188	        isSelected
   189	          ? "bg-synapse/20 border-2 border-synapse"
   190	          : "bg-slate-dark border border-slate-mid hover:border-slate-mid/80"
   191	      )}
   192	    >
   193	      <Package className={clsx(
   194	        "w-6 h-6 flex-shrink-0",
   195	        isSelected ? "text-synapse" : "text-text-muted"
   196	      )} />
   197	      <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
   198	        <p className="text-text-primary font-medium truncate">{model.name}</p>
   199	        <p className="text-xs text-text-muted truncate">{model.path}</p>
   200	        {model.size && (
   201	          <p className="text-xs text-text-muted mt-0.5">{formatSize(model.size)}</p>
   202	        )}
   203	      </div>
   204	      {isSelected && (
   205	        <Check className="w-5 h-5 text-synapse flex-shrink-0" />
   206	      )}
   207	    </button>
   208	  )
   209	}
   210	
   211	interface RemoteModelCardProps {
   212	  model: BaseModelResult
   213	  isSelected: boolean
   214	  onSelect: () => void
   215	}
   216	
   217	function RemoteModelCard({ model, isSelected, onSelect }: RemoteModelCardProps) {
   218	  const { t } = useTranslation()
   219	
   220	  return (
   221	    <button
   222	      onClick={onSelect}
   223	      className={clsx(
   224	        "w-full text-left p-4 rounded-xl",
   225	        "transition-all duration-200",
   226	        isSelected
   227	          ? "bg-synapse/20 border-2 border-synapse"
   228	          : "bg-slate-dark border border-slate-mid hover:border-slate-mid/80"
   229	      )}
   230	    >
   231	      <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
   232	        <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
   233	          <p className="text-text-primary font-medium">{model.model_name}</p>
   234	          {model.version_name && (
   235	            <p className="text-sm text-synapse">{model.version_name}</p>
   236	          )}
   237	          {model.creator && (
   238	            <p className="text-xs text-text-muted">{t('pack.modals.baseModel.byAuthor', { author: model.creator })}</p>
   239	          )}
   240	          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2 flex-wrap">
   241	            {model.base_model && (
   242	              <span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-pulse/20 text-pulse text-xs rounded">
   243	                {model.base_model}
   244	              </span>
   245	            )}
   246	            {model.size_gb && (
   247	              <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
   248	                {model.size_gb.toFixed(1)} GB
   249	              </span>
   250	            )}
   251	            <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
   252	              {t('pack.modals.baseModel.downloadCount', { count: model.download_count })}
   253	            </span>
   254	          </div>
   255	          <p className="text-xs text-text-muted mt-1 font-mono truncate">
   256	            {model.file_name}
   257	          </p>
   258	        </div>
   259	        {isSelected && (
   260	          <Check className="w-5 h-5 text-synapse flex-shrink-0" />
   261	        )}
   262	      </div>
   263	    </button>
   264	  )
   265	}
   266	
   267	interface HuggingFaceModelCardProps {
   268	  model: BaseModelResult
   269	  isExpanded: boolean
   270	  isSelected: boolean
   271	  files: HuggingFaceFile[]
   272	  isLoadingFiles: boolean
   273	  selectedFile?: HuggingFaceFile
   274	  onToggleExpand: () => void
   275	  onSelectFile: (file: HuggingFaceFile) => void
   276	}
   277	
   278	function HuggingFaceModelCard({
   279	  model,
   280	  isExpanded,
   281	  isSelected,
   282	  files,
   283	  isLoadingFiles,
   284	  selectedFile,
   285	  onToggleExpand,
   286	  onSelectFile,
   287	}: HuggingFaceModelCardProps) {
   288	  const { t } = useTranslation()
   289	
   290	  return (
   291	    <div
   292	      className={clsx(
   293	        "rounded-xl overflow-hidden",
   294	        "transition-all duration-200",
   295	        isSelected
   296	          ? "bg-synapse/20 border-2 border-synapse"
   297	          : "bg-slate-dark border border-slate-mid"
   298	      )}
   299	    >
   300	      {/* Header */}
   301	      <button
   302	        onClick={onToggleExpand}
   303	        className="w-full text-left p-4 flex items-center justify-between"
   304	      >
   305	        <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
   306	          <p className="text-text-primary font-medium">{model.model_name}</p>
   307	          {model.creator && (
   308	            <p className="text-xs text-text-muted">{t('pack.modals.baseModel.byAuthor', { author: model.creator })}</p>
   309	          )}
   310	          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
   311	            <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
   312	              {t('pack.modals.baseModel.downloadCount', { count: model.download_count })}
   313	            </span>
   314	          </div>
   315	        </div>
   316	        {isExpanded ? (
   317	          <ChevronDown className="w-5 h-5 text-text-muted" />
   318	        ) : (
   319	          <ChevronRight className="w-5 h-5 text-text-muted" />
   320	        )}
   321	      </button>
   322	
   323	      {/* Expanded Files List */}
   324	      {isExpanded && (
   325	        <div className="border-t border-slate-mid p-3 space-y-2">
   326	          {isLoadingFiles ? (
   327	            <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-4">
   328	              <Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin text-synapse" />
   329	            </div>
   330	          ) : files.length === 0 ? (
   331	            <p className="text-sm text-text-muted text-center py-4">
   332	              {t('pack.modals.baseModel.noCompatibleFiles')}
   333	            </p>
   334	          ) : (
   335	            files.map((file) => (
   336	              <button
   337	                key={file.filename}
   338	                onClick={() => onSelectFile(file)}
   339	                className={clsx(
   340	                  "w-full text-left p-3 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-3",
   341	                  "transition-all duration-200",
   342	                  selectedFile?.filename === file.filename
   343	                    ? "bg-synapse/30 border border-synapse"
   344	                    : "bg-obsidian/50 border border-transparent hover:border-slate-mid"
   345	                )}
   346	              >
   347	                <Package className="w-4 h-4 text-text-muted flex-shrink-0" />
   348	                <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
   349	                  <p className="text-sm text-text-primary truncate">{file.filename}</p>
   350	                  <p className="text-xs text-text-muted">
   351	                    {file.size_gb?.toFixed(2) ?? formatSize(file.size_bytes)} GB
   352	                  </p>
   353	                </div>
   354	                {file.is_recommended && (
   355	                  <span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 text-xs rounded">
   356	                    {t('pack.modals.baseModel.recommended')}
   357	                  </span>
   358	                )}
   359	                {selectedFile?.filename === file.filename && (
   360	                  <Check className="w-4 h-4 text-synapse flex-shrink-0" />
