     1	/**
     2	 * EditDependenciesModal
     3	 *
     4	 * Modal for managing pack dependencies.
     5	 *
     6	 * Features:
     7	 * - List all dependencies with details
     8	 * - Add new dependency (search Civitai/HuggingFace/Local)
     9	 * - Remove dependency
    10	 * - Edit dependency constraints
    11	 * - Support for 8+ dependencies
    12	 */
    13	
    14	import { useState, useMemo } from 'react'
    15	import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'
    16	import {
    17	  X,
    18	  Loader2,
    19	  Plus,
    20	  Trash2,
    21	  Search,
    22	  Package,
    23	  ExternalLink,
    24	  ChevronDown,
    25	  ChevronUp,
    26	  Filter,
    27	} from 'lucide-react'
    28	import { clsx } from 'clsx'
    29	import { Button } from '@/components/ui/Button'
    30	import type { AssetInfo, AssetType } from '../types'
    31	import { ANIMATION_PRESETS, ASSET_TYPE_ICONS } from '../constants'
    32	
    33	// =============================================================================
    34	// Types
    35	// =============================================================================
    36	
    37	export interface EditDependenciesModalProps {
    38	  /**
    39	   * Whether modal is open
    40	   */
    41	  isOpen: boolean
    42	
    43	  /**
    44	   * Current dependencies
    45	   */
    46	  dependencies: AssetInfo[]
    47	
    48	  /**
    49	   * Handler for saving changes
    50	   */
    51	  onSave: (data: {
    52	    dependencies: AssetInfo[]
    53	    removed: string[]
    54	    added: AssetInfo[]
    55	  }) => void
    56	
    57	  /**
    58	   * Handler for close/cancel
    59	   */
    60	  onClose: () => void
    61	
    62	  /**
    63	   * Handler for searching dependencies
    64	   */
    65	  onSearch?: (query: string, source: 'civitai' | 'huggingface' | 'local') => Promise<AssetInfo[]>
    66	
    67	  /**
    68	   * Whether saving is in progress
    69	   */
    70	  isSaving?: boolean
    71	}
    72	
    73	// =============================================================================
    74	// Dependency Item Component
    75	// =============================================================================
    76	
    77	interface DependencyItemProps {
    78	  dependency: AssetInfo
    79	  isExpanded: boolean
    80	  isMarkedForRemoval: boolean
    81	  onToggleExpand: () => void
    82	  onRemove: () => void
    83	  onRestore: () => void
    84	}
    85	
    86	function DependencyItem({
    87	  dependency,
    88	  isExpanded,
    89	  isMarkedForRemoval,
    90	  onToggleExpand,
    91	  onRemove,
    92	  onRestore,
    93	}: DependencyItemProps) {
    94	  const { t } = useTranslation()
    95	  const icon = ASSET_TYPE_ICONS[dependency.asset_type as keyof typeof ASSET_TYPE_ICONS] || ASSET_TYPE_ICONS.other
    96	
    97	  // Format size
    98	  const formatSize = (bytes?: number) => {
    99	    if (!bytes) return t('pack.modals.editDeps.unknownSize')
   100	    if (bytes >= 1024 * 1024 * 1024) return `${(bytes / 1024 / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1)} GB`
   101	    if (bytes >= 1024 * 1024) return `${(bytes / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1)} MB`
   102	    return `${(bytes / 1024).toFixed(1)} KB`
   103	  }
   104	
   105	  return (
   106	    <div
   107	      className={clsx(
   108	        'rounded-xl border transition-all duration-200',
   109	        isMarkedForRemoval
   110	          ? 'bg-red-500/10 border-red-500/30 opacity-60'
   111	          : 'bg-slate-dark/50 border-slate-mid hover:border-slate-light'
   112	      )}
   113	    >
   114	      {/* Main row */}
   115	      <div
   116	        className={clsx(
   117	          'flex items-center gap-4 p-4 cursor-pointer',
   118	          'transition-colors duration-200'
   119	        )}
   120	        onClick={onToggleExpand}
   121	      >
   122	        {/* Icon */}
   123	        <div className={clsx(
   124	          'p-2 rounded-lg',
   125	          'bg-synapse/20 text-synapse'
   126	        )}>
   127	          <span className="text-lg">{icon}</span>
   128	        </div>
   129	
   130	        {/* Info */}
   131	        <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   132	          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   133	            <span className={clsx(
   134	              'font-medium',
   135	              isMarkedForRemoval ? 'line-through text-text-muted' : 'text-text-primary'
   136	            )}>
   137	              {dependency.name}
   138	            </span>
   139	            <span className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs bg-slate-mid text-text-muted">
   140	              {dependency.asset_type}
   400	  dependencies: initialDependencies,
   401	  onSave,
   402	  onClose,
   403	  onSearch,
   404	  isSaving = false,
   405	}: EditDependenciesModalProps) {
   406	  const { t } = useTranslation()
   407	  const [dependencies, setDependencies] = useState<AssetInfo[]>(initialDependencies)
   408	  const [removedNames, setRemovedNames] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set())
   409	  const [addedDependencies, setAddedDependencies] = useState<AssetInfo[]>([])
   410	  const [expandedIndex, setExpandedIndex] = useState<number | null>(null)
   411	  const [filterType, setFilterType] = useState<AssetType | 'all'>('all')
   412	  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('')
   413	
   414	  // Filter and search dependencies
   415	  const filteredDependencies = useMemo(() => {
   416	    return dependencies.filter((dep) => {
   417	      // Type filter
   418	      if (filterType !== 'all' && dep.asset_type !== filterType) return false
   419	
   420	      // Search filter
   421	      if (searchQuery) {
   422	        const query = searchQuery.toLowerCase()
   423	        return (
   424	          dep.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
   425	          dep.asset_type.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
   426	          dep.source.toLowerCase().includes(query)
   427	        )
   428	      }
   429	
   430	      return true
   431	    })
   432	  }, [dependencies, filterType, searchQuery])
   433	
   434	  // Get unique types for filter
   435	  const availableTypes = useMemo(() => {
   436	    const types = new Set(dependencies.map((d) => d.asset_type))
   437	    return Array.from(types)
   438	  }, [dependencies])
   439	
   440	  // Handle remove
   441	  const handleRemove = (name: string) => {
   442	    setRemovedNames(new Set([...removedNames, name]))
   443	  }
   444	
   445	  // Handle restore
   446	  const handleRestore = (name: string) => {
   447	    const newRemoved = new Set(removedNames)
   448	    newRemoved.delete(name)
   449	    setRemovedNames(newRemoved)
   450	  }
   451	
   452	  // Handle add
   453	  const handleAdd = (dependency: AssetInfo) => {
   454	    if (dependencies.some((d) => d.name === dependency.name)) {
   455	      // Already exists, just restore if removed
   456	      handleRestore(dependency.name)
   457	      return
   458	    }
   459	    setDependencies([...dependencies, dependency])
   460	    setAddedDependencies([...addedDependencies, dependency])
   461	  }
   462	
   463	  // Handle save
   464	  const handleSave = () => {
   465	    const finalDeps = dependencies.filter((d) => !removedNames.has(d.name))
   466	    onSave({
   467	      dependencies: finalDeps,
   468	      removed: Array.from(removedNames),
   469	      added: addedDependencies,
   470	    })
   471	  }
   472	
   473	  // Check if there are changes
   474	  const hasChanges = removedNames.size > 0 || addedDependencies.length > 0
   475	
   476	  if (!isOpen) return null
   477	
   478	  return (
   479	    <div
   480	      className={clsx(
   481	        "fixed inset-0 bg-black/70 z-50",
   482	        "flex items-center justify-center p-4",
   483	        ANIMATION_PRESETS.fadeIn
   484	      )}
   485	      onClick={(e) => {
   486	        if (e.target === e.currentTarget) onClose()
   487	      }}
   488	    >
   489	      <div
   490	        className={clsx(
   491	          "bg-slate-deep rounded-2xl max-w-3xl w-full max-h-[90vh]",
   492	          "border border-slate-mid/50",
   493	          "shadow-2xl flex flex-col",
   494	          ANIMATION_PRESETS.scaleIn
   495	        )}
   496	        onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
   497	      >
   498	        {/* Header */}
   499	        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-6 border-b border-slate-mid/50">
   500	          <div>
   501	            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-text-primary">
   502	              {t('pack.modals.editDeps.title')}
   503	            </h3>
   504	            <p className="text-sm text-text-muted mt-1">
   505	              {dependencies.length} {t('pack.modals.editDeps.depsCount')} • {removedNames.size} {t('pack.modals.editDeps.markedForRemoval')}
   506	            </p>
   507	          </div>
   508	          <button
   509	            onClick={onClose}
   510	            className={clsx(
   511	              "p-2 rounded-lg",
   512	              "hover:bg-slate-mid transition-colors duration-200"
   513	            )}
   514	          >
   515	            <X className="w-5 h-5 text-text-muted" />
   516	          </button>
   517	        </div>
   518	
   519	        {/* Filters */}
   520	        <div className="flex items-center gap-4 px-6 py-3 border-b border-slate-mid/30">
   521	          {/* Search */}
   522	          <div className="relative flex-1">
   523	            <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-text-muted" />
   524	            <input
   525	              type="text"
   526	              value={searchQuery}
   527	              onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
   528	              placeholder={t('pack.modals.editDeps.filterPlaceholder')}
   529	              className={clsx(
   530	                'w-full pl-9 pr-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-sm',
   531	                'bg-slate-dark border border-slate-mid',
   532	                'text-text-primary placeholder:text-text-muted',
   533	                'focus:outline-none focus:border-synapse',
   534	                'transition-colors duration-200'
   535	              )}
   536	            />
   537	          </div>
   538	
   539	          {/* Type filter */}
   540	          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   541	            <Filter className="w-4 h-4 text-text-muted" />
   542	            <select
   543	              value={filterType}
   544	              onChange={(e) => setFilterType(e.target.value as AssetType | 'all')}
   545	              className={clsx(
   546	                'px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-sm',
   547	                'bg-slate-dark border border-slate-mid',
   548	                'text-text-secondary',
   549	                'focus:outline-none focus:border-synapse'
   550	              )}
   551	            >
   552	              <option value="all">{t('pack.modals.editDeps.allTypes')}</option>
   553	              {availableTypes.map((type) => (
   554	                <option key={type} value={type}>
   555	                  {type}
   556	                </option>
   557	              ))}
   558	            </select>
   559	          </div>
   560	        </div>
   561	
   562	        {/* Content */}
   563	        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6">
   564	          {/* Dependencies list */}
   565	          {filteredDependencies.length > 0 ? (
   566	            <div className="space-y-3 mb-6">
   567	              {filteredDependencies.map((dep, index) => (
   568	                <DependencyItem
   569	                  key={dep.name}
   570	                  dependency={dep}
   571	                  isExpanded={expandedIndex === index}
   572	                  isMarkedForRemoval={removedNames.has(dep.name)}
   573	                  onToggleExpand={() => setExpandedIndex(expandedIndex === index ? null : index)}
   574	                  onRemove={() => handleRemove(dep.name)}
   575	                  onRestore={() => handleRestore(dep.name)}
   576	                />
   577	              ))}
   578	            </div>
   579	          ) : (
   580	            <div className="text-center py-8 text-text-muted mb-6">
   581	              {searchQuery || filterType !== 'all'
   582	                ? t('pack.modals.editDeps.noMatch')
   583	                : t('pack.modals.editDeps.noDeps')}
   584	            </div>
   585	          )}
   586	
   587	          {/* Add dependency panel */}
   588	          <AddDependencyPanel onAdd={handleAdd} onSearch={onSearch} />
   589	        </div>

   253	
   254	function AddDependencyPanel({ onAdd, onSearch }: AddDependencyPanelProps) {
   255	  const { t } = useTranslation()
   256	  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('')
   257	  const [searchSource, setSearchSource] = useState<'civitai' | 'huggingface' | 'local'>('civitai')
   258	  const [isSearching, setIsSearching] = useState(false)
   259	  const [searchResults, setSearchResults] = useState<AssetInfo[]>([])
   260	  const [showResults, setShowResults] = useState(false)
   261	
   262	  const handleSearch = async () => {
   263	    if (!searchQuery.trim() || !onSearch) return
   264	
   265	    setIsSearching(true)
   266	    setShowResults(true)
   267	
   268	    try {
   269	      const results = await onSearch(searchQuery, searchSource)
   270	      setSearchResults(results)
   271	    } catch (error) {
   272	      console.error('Search failed:', error)
   273	      setSearchResults([])
   274	    } finally {
   275	      setIsSearching(false)
   276	    }
   277	  }
   278	
   279	  return (
   280	    <div className="border border-dashed border-slate-mid rounded-xl p-4">
   281	      <h4 className="text-sm font-medium text-text-primary mb-3">
   282	        {t('pack.modals.editDeps.addDep')}
   283	      </h4>
   284	
   285	      {/* Source tabs */}
   286	      <div className="flex gap-2 mb-3">
   287	        {(['civitai', 'huggingface', 'local'] as const).map((source) => (
   288	          <button
   289	            key={source}
   290	            onClick={() => setSearchSource(source)}
   291	            className={clsx(
   292	              'px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium capitalize',
   293	              'transition-colors duration-200',
   294	              searchSource === source
   295	                ? 'bg-synapse/20 text-synapse border border-synapse/30'
   296	                : 'bg-slate-mid/50 text-text-muted hover:text-text-secondary'
   297	            )}
   298	          >
   299	            {source}
   300	          </button>
   301	        ))}
   302	      </div>
   303	
   304	      {/* Search input */}
   305	      <div className="flex gap-2">
   306	        <div className="relative flex-1">
   307	          <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-text-muted" />
   308	          <input
   309	            type="text"
   310	            value={searchQuery}
   311	            onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
   312	            onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleSearch()}
   313	            placeholder={t('pack.modals.editDeps.searchPlaceholder', { provider: searchSource })}
   314	            className={clsx(
   315	              'w-full pl-9 pr-3 py-2 rounded-lg',
   316	              'bg-slate-dark border border-slate-mid',
   317	              'text-text-primary placeholder:text-text-muted',
   318	              'focus:outline-none focus:border-synapse focus:ring-1 focus:ring-synapse/30',
   319	              'transition-colors duration-200'
   320	            )}
   321	          />
   322	        </div>
   323	        <Button
   324	          variant="primary"
   325	          onClick={handleSearch}
   326	          disabled={!searchQuery.trim() || isSearching || !onSearch}
   327	        >
   328	          {isSearching ? (
   329	            <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
   330	          ) : (
   331	            <Search className="w-4 h-4" />
   332	          )}
   333	          Search
   334	        </Button>
   335	      </div>
   336	
   337	      {/* Search results */}
   338	      {showResults && (
   339	        <div className="mt-4 max-h-64 overflow-y-auto">
   340	          {isSearching ? (
   341	            <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-8 text-text-muted">
   342	              <Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin mr-2" />
   343	              {t('pack.modals.editDeps.searching')}
   344	            </div>
   345	          ) : searchResults.length > 0 ? (
   346	            <div className="space-y-2">
   347	              {searchResults.map((result, index) => (
   348	                <div
   349	                  key={index}
   350	                  className={clsx(
   351	                    'flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg',
   352	                    'bg-slate-dark/50 border border-slate-mid',
   353	                    'hover:border-synapse/50 cursor-pointer',
   354	                    'transition-colors duration-200'
   355	                  )}
   356	                  onClick={() => {
   357	                    onAdd(result)
   358	                    setShowResults(false)
   359	                    setSearchQuery('')
   360	                  }}
   361	                >
   362	                  <div className="p-1.5 rounded bg-synapse/20 text-synapse">
   363	                    <Package className="w-4 h-4" />
   364	                  </div>
   365	                  <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   366	                    <div className="font-medium text-text-primary truncate">
   367	                      {result.name}
   368	                    </div>
   369	                    <div className="text-xs text-text-muted">
   370	                      {result.asset_type} • {result.source}
   371	                    </div>
   372	                  </div>
   373	                  <Plus className="w-5 h-5 text-synapse" />
   374	                </div>
   375	              ))}
   376	            </div>
   377	          ) : (
   378	            <div className="text-center py-8 text-text-muted">
   379	              {t('pack.modals.editDeps.noResults')}
   380	            </div>
   381	          )}
   382	        </div>
   383	      )}
   384	
   385	      {!onSearch && (
   386	        <p className="text-xs text-text-muted mt-2">
   387	          {t('pack.modals.editDeps.notAvailable')}
   388	        </p>
   389	      )}
   390	    </div>
   391	  )
   392	}
   393	
   394	// =============================================================================
   395	// Main Component
   396	// =============================================================================
   397	
   398	export function EditDependenciesModal({
   590	
   591	        {/* Footer */}
   592	        <div className="flex justify-end gap-3 p-6 border-t border-slate-mid/50">
   593	          <Button variant="secondary" onClick={onClose}>
   594	            {t('common.cancel')}
   595	          </Button>
   596	          <Button
   597	            variant="primary"
   598	            disabled={!hasChanges || isSaving}
   599	            onClick={handleSave}
   600	          >
   601	            {isSaving ? (
   602	              <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
   603	            ) : null}
   604	            {t('pack.modals.editDeps.saveChanges')}
   605	          </Button>
   606	        </div>
   607	      </div>
   608	    </div>
   609	  )
   610	}
   611	
   612	export default EditDependenciesModal

     1	"""
     2	Tests for Phase 2: Pack Dependencies CRUD
     3	
     4	Tests:
     5	1. Pack model validator (unique names, no self-reference)
     6	2. API endpoints (GET status, POST add, DELETE remove)
     7	3. Edge cases (duplicates, not-found, self-reference)
     8	"""
     9	
    10	import pytest
    11	from pydantic import ValidationError
    12	
    13	from src.store.models import (
    14	    Pack,
    15	    PackDependencyRef,
    16	    PackSource,
    17	    ProviderName,
    18	)
    19	
    20	
    21	# =============================================================================
    22	# Pack Model Validator Tests
    23	# =============================================================================
    24	
    25	
    26	class TestPackDependencyValidator:
    27	    """Test validate_unique_pack_deps model validator on Pack."""
    28	
    29	    def _make_pack(self, name: str = "test-pack", pack_deps: list | None = None):
    30	        """Create a minimal Pack with pack_dependencies."""
    31	        return Pack(
    32	            schema="1.0",
    33	            name=name,
    34	            pack_type="lora",
    35	            source=PackSource(provider=ProviderName.CIVITAI, model_id=1),
    36	            pack_dependencies=pack_deps or [],
    37	        )
    38	
    39	    def test_empty_pack_dependencies(self):
    40	        """Pack with no pack dependencies is valid."""
    41	        pack = self._make_pack()
    42	        assert len(pack.pack_dependencies) == 0
    43	
    44	    def test_single_pack_dependency(self):
    45	        """Pack with one dependency is valid."""
    46	        pack = self._make_pack(pack_deps=[
    47	            PackDependencyRef(pack_name="base-model"),
    48	        ])
    49	        assert len(pack.pack_dependencies) == 1
    50	        assert pack.pack_dependencies[0].pack_name == "base-model"
    51	
    52	    def test_multiple_unique_deps(self):
    53	        """Pack with multiple unique dependencies is valid."""
    54	        pack = self._make_pack(pack_deps=[
    55	            PackDependencyRef(pack_name="dep-a"),
    56	            PackDependencyRef(pack_name="dep-b"),
    57	            PackDependencyRef(pack_name="dep-c"),
    58	        ])
    59	        assert len(pack.pack_dependencies) == 3
    60	
    61	    def test_duplicate_dep_names_raises(self):
    62	        """Duplicate pack dependency names should raise ValidationError."""
    63	        with pytest.raises(ValidationError, match="Pack dependency names must be unique"):
    64	            self._make_pack(pack_deps=[
    65	                PackDependencyRef(pack_name="dep-a"),
    66	                PackDependencyRef(pack_name="dep-a"),
    67	            ])
    68	
    69	    def test_self_reference_raises(self):
    70	        """Pack cannot depend on itself."""
    71	        with pytest.raises(ValidationError, match="Pack cannot depend on itself"):
    72	            self._make_pack(name="my-pack", pack_deps=[
    73	                PackDependencyRef(pack_name="my-pack"),
    74	            ])
    75	
    76	    def test_required_defaults_to_true(self):
    77	        """PackDependencyRef.required defaults to True."""
    78	        ref = PackDependencyRef(pack_name="some-dep")
    79	        assert ref.required is True
    80	
    81	    def test_required_can_be_false(self):
    82	        """PackDependencyRef.required can be set to False."""
    83	        ref = PackDependencyRef(pack_name="some-dep", required=False)
    84	        assert ref.required is False
    85	
    86	
    87	# =============================================================================
    88	# API Endpoint Tests (using Pack model directly)
    89	# =============================================================================
    90	
    91	
    92	class TestPackDependenciesCRUD:
    93	    """Test the pack dependencies CRUD logic (model-level, no HTTP)."""
    94	
    95	    def _make_pack(self, name: str = "main-pack", pack_deps: list | None = None):
    96	        """Create a Pack for CRUD testing."""
    97	        return Pack(
    98	            schema="1.0",
    99	            name=name,
   100	            pack_type="lora",
   101	            source=PackSource(provider=ProviderName.CIVITAI, model_id=1),
   102	            pack_dependencies=pack_deps or [],
   103	        )
   104	
   105	    def test_add_pack_dependency(self):
   106	        """Adding a new pack dependency appends to the list."""
   107	        pack = self._make_pack()
   108	        assert len(pack.pack_dependencies) == 0
   109	
   110	        new_ref = PackDependencyRef(pack_name="checkpoint-pack", required=True)
   111	        pack.pack_dependencies.append(new_ref)
   112	
   113	        assert len(pack.pack_dependencies) == 1
   114	        assert pack.pack_dependencies[0].pack_name == "checkpoint-pack"
   115	        assert pack.pack_dependencies[0].required is True
   116	
   117	    def test_add_multiple_dependencies(self):
   118	        """Adding multiple dependencies works."""
   119	        pack = self._make_pack()
   120	
   121	        pack.pack_dependencies.append(PackDependencyRef(pack_name="dep-a"))
   122	        pack.pack_dependencies.append(PackDependencyRef(pack_name="dep-b", required=False))
   123	
   124	        assert len(pack.pack_dependencies) == 2
   125	        assert pack.pack_dependencies[0].pack_name == "dep-a"
   126	        assert pack.pack_dependencies[1].required is False
   127	
   128	    def test_remove_pack_dependency(self):
   129	        """Removing a pack dependency by filtering."""
   130	        pack = self._make_pack(pack_deps=[
   131	            PackDependencyRef(pack_name="dep-a"),
   132	            PackDependencyRef(pack_name="dep-b"),
   133	            PackDependencyRef(pack_name="dep-c"),
   134	        ])
   135	        assert len(pack.pack_dependencies) == 3
   136	
   137	        # Remove dep-b (same logic as API endpoint)
   138	        dep_to_remove = "dep-b"
   139	        original_count = len(pack.pack_dependencies)
   140	        pack.pack_dependencies = [
   141	            ref for ref in pack.pack_dependencies if ref.pack_name != dep_to_remove
   142	        ]
   143	
   144	        assert len(pack.pack_dependencies) == 2
   145	        assert len(pack.pack_dependencies) < original_count
   146	        remaining_names = [ref.pack_name for ref in pack.pack_dependencies]
   147	        assert "dep-b" not in remaining_names
   148	        assert "dep-a" in remaining_names
   149	        assert "dep-c" in remaining_names
   150	
   151	    def test_remove_nonexistent_dependency(self):
   152	        """Removing a non-existent dependency doesn't change the list."""
   153	        pack = self._make_pack(pack_deps=[
   154	            PackDependencyRef(pack_name="dep-a"),
   155	        ])
   156	
   157	        original_count = len(pack.pack_dependencies)
   158	        pack.pack_dependencies = [
   159	            ref for ref in pack.pack_dependencies if ref.pack_name != "nonexistent"
   160	        ]
   161	
   162	        assert len(pack.pack_dependencies) == original_count  # unchanged
   163	
   164	    def test_self_reference_check(self):
   165	        """Adding self-reference is caught by validator when reconstructing."""
   166	        pack = self._make_pack(name="my-pack")
   167	
   168	        # Direct append bypasses validator, but re-validation should catch it
   169	        pack.pack_dependencies.append(PackDependencyRef(pack_name="my-pack"))
   170	
   171	        # When we reconstruct (as the API would do via save), it would fail
   172	        with pytest.raises(ValidationError, match="Pack cannot depend on itself"):
   173	            Pack.model_validate(pack.model_dump())
   174	
   175	    def test_duplicate_check(self):
   176	        """Adding duplicate is caught by validator when reconstructing."""
   177	        pack = self._make_pack()
   178	        pack.pack_dependencies.append(PackDependencyRef(pack_name="dep-a"))
   179	        pack.pack_dependencies.append(PackDependencyRef(pack_name="dep-a"))
   180	
   181	        with pytest.raises(ValidationError, match="Pack dependency names must be unique"):
   182	            Pack.model_validate(pack.model_dump())
   183	
   184	    def test_status_resolution_installed(self):
   185	        """Status resolution logic for installed packs."""
   186	        # Simulate the status-building logic from the API
   187	        ref = PackDependencyRef(pack_name="installed-pack", required=True)
   188	
   189	        # Simulate: pack found
   190	        status = {
   191	            "pack_name": ref.pack_name,
   192	            "required": ref.required,
   193	            "installed": True,
   194	            "version": "1.0.0",
   195	        }
   196	
   197	        assert status["installed"] is True
   198	        assert status["version"] == "1.0.0"
   199	        assert status["required"] is True
   200	
   201	    def test_status_resolution_missing(self):
   202	        """Status resolution logic for missing packs."""
   203	        ref = PackDependencyRef(pack_name="missing-pack", required=False)
   204	
   205	        # Simulate: pack not found (exception in get_pack)
   206	        status = {
   207	            "pack_name": ref.pack_name,
   208	            "required": ref.required,
   209	            "installed": False,
   210	            "version": None,
   211	        }
   212	
   213	        assert status["installed"] is False
   214	        assert status["version"] is None
   215	        assert status["required"] is False
   216	
   217	    def test_version_constraint_preserved(self):
   218	        """Version constraint is preserved in the ref."""
   219	        ref = PackDependencyRef(
   220	            pack_name="versioned-dep",
   221	            required=True,
   222	            version_constraint=">=1.0.0",
   223	        )
   224	        assert ref.version_constraint == ">=1.0.0"
   225	
   226	        pack = self._make_pack(pack_deps=[ref])
   227	        assert pack.pack_dependencies[0].version_constraint == ">=1.0.0"
   228

   230	# =============================================================================
   231	# Integration: Full store roundtrip

   234	
   235	class TestPackDependenciesRoundtrip:
   236	    """Test pack dependencies survive save/load cycle."""
   237	
   238	    def _make_service(self, tmp_path):
   239	        """Create a PackService with initialized store."""
   240	        from src.store.pack_service import PackService
   241	        from src.store.layout import StoreLayout
   242	        from src.store.blob_store import BlobStore
   243	
   244	        layout = StoreLayout(tmp_path)
   245	        layout.init_store()
   246	        blob_store = BlobStore(layout)
   247	        return PackService(layout, blob_store), layout
   248	
   249	    def test_save_load_pack_dependencies(self, tmp_path):
   250	        """Pack dependencies survive save/load roundtrip."""
   251	        service, layout = self._make_service(tmp_path)
   252	
   253	        # Create a pack with dependencies
   254	        pack = Pack(
   255	            schema="1.0",
   256	            name="roundtrip-test",
   257	            pack_type="lora",
   258	            source=PackSource(provider=ProviderName.LOCAL),
   259	            pack_dependencies=[
   260	                PackDependencyRef(pack_name="base-model", required=True),
   261	                PackDependencyRef(pack_name="optional-dep", required=False),
   262	            ],
   263	        )
   264	        layout.save_pack(pack)
   265	
   266	        # Reload
   267	        loaded = layout.load_pack("roundtrip-test")
   268	        assert len(loaded.pack_dependencies) == 2
   269	        assert loaded.pack_dependencies[0].pack_name == "base-model"
   270	        assert loaded.pack_dependencies[0].required is True
   271	        assert loaded.pack_dependencies[1].pack_name == "optional-dep"
   272	        assert loaded.pack_dependencies[1].required is False
   273	
   274	    def test_add_remove_roundtrip(self, tmp_path):
   275	        """Add then remove a dependency, verify it persists correctly."""
   276	        service, layout = self._make_service(tmp_path)
   277	
   278	        # Create empty pack
   279	        pack = Pack(
   280	            schema="1.0",

     1	"""
     2	Tests for Synapse Store v2 - View Builder and Profile Service
     3	
     4	Tests:
     5	- View building and symlinks
     6	- Profile management
     7	- Use/back workflow
     8	"""
     9	
    10	import hashlib
    11	import os
    12	import tempfile

    15	import pytest
    16	
    17	
    18	class TestViewBuilder:
    19	    """Tests for ViewBuilder class."""
    20	    
    21	    def test_compute_plan_empty_profile(self):
    22	        """Test computing plan for empty profile."""
    23	        from src.store import (
    24	            StoreLayout, BlobStore, ViewBuilder, 
    25	            Profile, AssetKind
    26	        )
    27	        
    28	        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmpdir:
    29	            layout = StoreLayout(Path(tmpdir))
    30	            layout.init_store()
    31	            blob_store = BlobStore(layout)
    32	            builder = ViewBuilder(layout, blob_store)
    33	            
    34	            profile = Profile(name="test")
    35	            
    36	            plan = builder.compute_plan("comfyui", profile, {})
    37	            
    38	            assert plan.ui == "comfyui"
    39	            assert plan.profile == "test"
    40	            assert len(plan.entries) == 0
    41	            assert len(plan.shadowed) == 0
    42	    
    43	    def test_compute_plan_with_pack(self):
    44	        """Test computing plan with a pack."""
    45	        from src.store import (
    46	            StoreLayout, BlobStore, ViewBuilder,
    47	            Profile, ProfilePackEntry, Pack, PackLock, PackSource,
    48	            PackDependency, DependencySelector, ExposeConfig,
    49	            ResolvedDependency, ResolvedArtifact, ArtifactProvider,
    50	            AssetKind, ProviderName, SelectorStrategy
    51	        )
    52	        
    53	        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmpdir:
    54	            layout = StoreLayout(Path(tmpdir))
    55	            layout.init_store()
    56	            blob_store = BlobStore(layout)
    57	            builder = ViewBuilder(layout, blob_store)
    58	            
    59	            # Create test blob
    60	            content = b"test model content"
    61	            sha256 = hashlib.sha256(content).hexdigest()
    62	            blob_path = blob_store.blob_path(sha256)
    63	            blob_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    64	            blob_path.write_bytes(content)
    65	            
    66	            # Create pack
    67	            pack = Pack(
    68	                name="TestPack",
    69	                pack_type=AssetKind.LORA,
    70	                source=PackSource(provider=ProviderName.CIVITAI, model_id=123),
    71	                dependencies=[
    72	                    PackDependency(
    73	                        id="main_lora",
    74	                        kind=AssetKind.LORA,
    75	                        selector=DependencySelector(strategy=SelectorStrategy.CIVITAI_FILE),
    76	                        expose=ExposeConfig(filename="test_lora.safetensors"),
    77	                    )
    78	                ],
    79	            )
    80	            
    81	            # Create lock
    82	            lock = PackLock(
    83	                pack="TestPack",
    84	                resolved=[
    85	                    ResolvedDependency(
    86	                        dependency_id="main_lora",
    87	                        artifact=ResolvedArtifact(
    88	                            kind=AssetKind.LORA,
    89	                            sha256=sha256,
    90	                            provider=ArtifactProvider(name=ProviderName.CIVITAI),
    91	                        ),
    92	                    )
    93	                ],
    94	            )
    95	            
    96	            # Create profile
    97	            profile = Profile(
    98	                name="test",
    99	                packs=[ProfilePackEntry(name="TestPack")],
   100	            )
   101	            
   102	            # Compute plan
   103	            plan = builder.compute_plan(
   104	                "comfyui",
   105	                profile,
   106	                {"TestPack": (pack, lock)},
   107	            )
   108	            
   109	            assert len(plan.entries) == 1
   110	            entry = plan.entries[0]
   111	            assert entry.pack_name == "TestPack"
   112	            assert entry.expose_filename == "test_lora.safetensors"
   113	            assert entry.sha256 == sha256
   114	            assert "loras" in entry.dst_relpath
   115	    
   116	    def test_last_wins_conflict_resolution(self):
   117	        """Test that later packs shadow earlier ones."""
   118	        from src.store import (
   119	            StoreLayout, BlobStore, ViewBuilder,
   120	            Profile, ProfilePackEntry, Pack, PackLock, PackSource,
   121	            PackDependency, DependencySelector, ExposeConfig,
   122	            ResolvedDependency, ResolvedArtifact, ArtifactProvider,
   123	            AssetKind, ProviderName, SelectorStrategy
   124	        )
   125	        
   126	        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmpdir:
   127	            layout = StoreLayout(Path(tmpdir))
   128	            layout.init_store()
   129	            blob_store = BlobStore(layout)
   130	            builder = ViewBuilder(layout, blob_store)
   131	            
   132	            # Create blobs
   133	            content1 = b"pack1 content"
   134	            content2 = b"pack2 content"
   135	            sha1 = hashlib.sha256(content1).hexdigest()
   136	            sha2 = hashlib.sha256(content2).hexdigest()
   137	            
   138	            for sha, content in [(sha1, content1), (sha2, content2)]:
   139	                path = blob_store.blob_path(sha)
   140	                path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   141	                path.write_bytes(content)
   142	            
   143	            # Same filename in both packs
   144	            filename = "shared_lora.safetensors"
   145	            
   146	            packs_data = {}
   147	            for i, sha in enumerate([sha1, sha2], 1):
   148	                pack = Pack(
   149	                    name=f"Pack{i}",
   150	                    pack_type=AssetKind.LORA,
   151	                    source=PackSource(provider=ProviderName.CIVITAI),
   152	                    dependencies=[
   153	                        PackDependency(
   154	                            id="main",
   155	                            kind=AssetKind.LORA,
   156	                            selector=DependencySelector(strategy=SelectorStrategy.CIVITAI_FILE),
   157	                            expose=ExposeConfig(filename=filename),
   158	                        )
   159	                    ],
   160	                )
   161	                lock = PackLock(
   162	                    pack=f"Pack{i}",
   163	                    resolved=[
   164	                        ResolvedDependency(
   165	                            dependency_id="main",
   166	                            artifact=ResolvedArtifact(
   167	                                kind=AssetKind.LORA,
   168	                                sha256=sha,
   169	                                provider=ArtifactProvider(name=ProviderName.CIVITAI),
   170	                            ),
   171	                        )
   172	                    ],
   173	                )
   174	                packs_data[f"Pack{i}"] = (pack, lock)
   175	            
   176	            # Profile with Pack1 first, Pack2 last
   177	            profile = Profile(
   178	                name="test",
   179	                packs=[
   180	                    ProfilePackEntry(name="Pack1"),
   181	                    ProfilePackEntry(name="Pack2"),
   182	                ],
   183	            )
   184	            
   185	            plan = builder.compute_plan("comfyui", profile, packs_data)
   186	            
   187	            # Should have one entry (Pack2 wins)
   188	            assert len(plan.entries) == 1
   189	            assert plan.entries[0].pack_name == "Pack2"
   190	            assert plan.entries[0].sha256 == sha2
   191	            
   192	            # Should have one shadowed entry
   193	            assert len(plan.shadowed) == 1
   194	            assert plan.shadowed[0].winner_pack == "Pack2"
   195	            assert plan.shadowed[0].loser_pack == "Pack1"
   196	    
   197	    def test_build_creates_symlinks(self):
   198	        """Test that build creates working symlinks."""
   199	        from src.store import (
   200	            StoreLayout, BlobStore, ViewBuilder,
   201	            Profile, ProfilePackEntry, Pack, PackLock, PackSource,
   202	            PackDependency, DependencySelector, ExposeConfig,

   204	            AssetKind, ProviderName, SelectorStrategy
   205	        )
   206	        
   207	        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmpdir:
   208	            layout = StoreLayout(Path(tmpdir))
   209	            layout.init_store()
   210	            blob_store = BlobStore(layout)
   211	            builder = ViewBuilder(layout, blob_store)
   212	            
   213	            # Create blob
   214	            content = b"lora content"
   215	            sha256 = hashlib.sha256(content).hexdigest()
   216	            blob_path = blob_store.blob_path(sha256)
   217	            blob_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   218	            blob_path.write_bytes(content)
   219	            
   220	            # Create pack and lock
   221	            pack = Pack(
   222	                name="TestPack",
   223	                pack_type=AssetKind.LORA,
   224	                source=PackSource(provider=ProviderName.CIVITAI),
   225	                dependencies=[
   226	                    PackDependency(
   227	                        id="main",
   228	                        kind=AssetKind.LORA,
   229	                        selector=DependencySelector(strategy=SelectorStrategy.CIVITAI_FILE),
   230	                        expose=ExposeConfig(filename="my_lora.safetensors"),
   231	                    )
   232	                ],
   233	            )
   234	            lock = PackLock(
   235	                pack="TestPack",
   236	                resolved=[
   237	                    ResolvedDependency(
   238	                        dependency_id="main",
   239	                        artifact=ResolvedArtifact(
   240	                            kind=AssetKind.LORA,
   241	                            sha256=sha256,
   242	                            provider=ArtifactProvider(name=ProviderName.CIVITAI),
   243	                        ),
   244	                    )
   245	                ],
   246	            )
   247	            
   248	            profile = Profile(
   249	                name="test",
   250	                packs=[ProfilePackEntry(name="TestPack")],
   251	            )
   252	            
   253	            # Build
   254	            report = builder.build("comfyui", profile, {"TestPack": (pack, lock)})
   255	            
   256	            assert report.entries_created == 1
   257	            assert len(report.errors) == 0
   258	            
   259	            # Check symlink exists
   260	            expected_link = layout.view_profile_path("comfyui", "test") / "models" / "loras" / "my_lora.safetensors"
   261	            assert expected_link.exists()
   262	            assert expected_link.is_symlink()
   263	            
   264	            # Check symlink points to blob
   265	            assert expected_link.resolve() == blob_path.resolve()
   266	            
   267	            # Check content is accessible
   268	            assert expected_link.read_bytes() == content

     1	/**
     2	 * Tests for Pack Plugin System
     3	 *
     4	 * Tests cover:
     5	 * - Plugin type definitions and interfaces
     6	 * - Plugin matching/priority logic
     7	 * - CivitaiPlugin behavior
     8	 * - CustomPlugin behavior
     9	 * - InstallPlugin behavior
    10	 * - usePackPlugin hook logic
    11	 */
    12	
    13	import { describe, it, expect, vi } from 'vitest'
    14	
    15	// ============================================================================
    16	// Test Types (mirroring actual types)
    17	// ============================================================================
    18	
    19	interface PackSourceInfo {
    20	  provider: 'civitai' | 'huggingface' | 'local' | 'url'
    21	  model_id?: number
    22	  version_id?: number
    23	  url?: string
    24	}
    25	
    26	interface PackDependencyRef {
    27	  pack_name: string
    28	  required?: boolean
    29	  version_constraint?: string
    30	}
    31	
    32	interface PackDetail {
    33	  name: string
    34	  version: string
    35	  description?: string
    36	  author?: string
    37	  tags: string[]
    38	  user_tags: string[]
    39	  source_url?: string
    40	  created_at?: string
    41	  installed: boolean
    42	  has_unresolved: boolean
    43	  all_installed: boolean
    44	  can_generate: boolean
    45	  assets: unknown[]
    46	  previews: unknown[]
    47	  workflows: unknown[]
    48	  custom_nodes: unknown[]
    49	  docs: Record<string, string>
    50	  parameters?: Record<string, unknown>
    51	  model_info?: {
    52	    model_type?: string
    53	    base_model?: string
    54	    trigger_words: string[]
    55	  }
    56	  pack?: {
    57	    schema?: string
    58	    name: string
    59	    pack_type: string
    60	    pack_category?: 'external' | 'custom' | 'install'
    61	    source: PackSourceInfo
    62	    pack_dependencies?: PackDependencyRef[]
    63	    base_model?: string
    64	    trigger_words?: string[]
    65	    [key: string]: unknown
    66	  }
    67	  lock?: Record<string, unknown>
    68	}
    69	
    70	interface ValidationResult {
    71	  valid: boolean
    72	  errors: Record<string, string>
    73	}
    74	
    75	interface PluginContext {
    76	  pack: PackDetail
    77	  isEditing: boolean
    78	  hasUnsavedChanges: boolean
    79	  openModal: (key: string) => void
    80	  closeModal: (key: string) => void
    81	  modals: Record<string, boolean>
    82	  refetch: () => void
    83	  toast: {
    84	    success: (message: string) => void
    85	    error: (message: string) => void
    86	    info: (message: string) => void
    87	  }
    88	}
    89	
    90	interface PluginFeatures {
    91	  canEditMetadata?: boolean
    92	  canEditPreviews?: boolean
    93	  canEditDependencies?: boolean
    94	  canEditWorkflows?: boolean

   211	describe('Plugin Matching Logic', () => {
   212	  // Plugin implementations for testing
   213	  const CivitaiPlugin: PackPlugin = {
   214	    id: 'civitai',
   215	    name: 'Civitai',
   216	    priority: 50,
   217	    appliesTo: (pack) => pack.pack?.source?.provider === 'civitai',
   218	    features: {
   219	      canEditMetadata: false,
   220	      canEditPreviews: false,
   221	      canCheckUpdates: true,
   222	      canDelete: true,
   223	    },
   224	  }
   225

   227	    id: 'custom',
   228	    name: 'Custom Pack',

   251	      canDelete: true,
   252	    },
   253	  }
   254	
   255	  const PLUGIN_REGISTRY = [InstallPlugin, CivitaiPlugin, CustomPlugin].sort(
   256	    (a, b) => (b.priority ?? 0) - (a.priority ?? 0)
   257	  )
   258	
   259	  function findPlugin(pack: PackDetail): PackPlugin | null {
   260	    for (const plugin of PLUGIN_REGISTRY) {
   261	      if (plugin.appliesTo(pack)) {
   262	        return plugin
   263	      }
   264	    }
   265	    return null
   266	  }
   267	
   268	  describe('Priority ordering', () => {
   269	    it('should sort plugins by priority (highest first)', () => {
   270	      expect(PLUGIN_REGISTRY[0].id).toBe('install')
   271	      expect(PLUGIN_REGISTRY[1].id).toBe('civitai')
   272	      expect(PLUGIN_REGISTRY[2].id).toBe('custom')
   273	    })
   274	
   275	    it('should have InstallPlugin with highest priority', () => {
   276	      expect(InstallPlugin.priority).toBe(100)
   277	    })
   278	
   279	    it('should have CivitaiPlugin with medium priority', () => {
   280	      expect(CivitaiPlugin.priority).toBe(50)

     9	class FakeCivitaiClient:
    10	    def __init__(self):
    11	        self.downloaded_previews = []
    12	
    13	    def parse_civitai_url(self, url: str):
    14	        """Parse Civitai URL to extract model_id and version_id."""
    15	        import re
    16	        # Extract model_id from URL like /models/123
    17	        model_match = re.search(r'/models/(\d+)', url)
    18	        model_id = int(model_match.group(1)) if model_match else 123
    19	
    20	        # Extract version_id from URL like ?modelVersionId=456
    21	        version_match = re.search(r'modelVersionId=(\d+)', url)
    22	        version_id = int(version_match.group(1)) if version_match else None
    23	
    24	        return model_id, version_id
    25

   120	def test_import_civitai_downloads_all_version_images_and_merges_meta(pack_service, mock_layout):
   121	    """Test that import fetches ALL images (mocked 20) and merges metadata into sidecars."""

   157	def test_import_is_idempotent_no_duplicate_previews(pack_service, mock_layout):
   158	    """Test that re-importing the same model does not duplicate preview files."""

   170

   172	        # Run twice

   184	def test_pack_previews_include_nsfw_and_meta(pack_service, mock_layout):
   185	    """Test that pack.previews includes correct nsfw flag and meta from Civitai API."""
   186	
   187	    mock_layout.save_pack = MagicMock()
   188	    mock_layout.save_pack_lock = MagicMock()
   189	    mock_layout.load_config = MagicMock()
   190	
   191	    # Mock requests.get to return fake image data
   192	    mock_response = MagicMock()
   193	    mock_response.raise_for_status = MagicMock()
   194	    mock_response.iter_content = MagicMock(return_value=[b'fake image data'])
   195	    mock_response.headers = {'content-length': '100'}
   196	
   197	    with patch('src.store.pack_service.requests.get', return_value=mock_response):
   198	        pack = pack_service.import_from_civitai("https://civitai.com/models/123?modelVersionId=100", max_previews=100)
   199	
   200	    # Check pack.previews has correct data (import_from_civitai returns Pack object)
   201	    previews = pack.previews
   202	    assert len(previews) == 20, f"Expected 20 previews in pack, found {len(previews)}"
   203	
   204	    # Check NSFW flags (every 3rd image should be NSFW: 0, 3, 6, 9, 12, 15, 18)
   205	    nsfw_count = sum(1 for p in previews if p.nsfw)
   206	    assert nsfw_count == 7, f"Expected 7 NSFW previews, found {nsfw_count}"
   207	
   208	    # Check meta is included
   209	    for i, preview in enumerate(previews):
   210	        assert preview.meta is not None, f"Preview {i} should have meta"
   211	        assert "prompt" in preview.meta, f"Preview {i} meta should have prompt"

   214	def test_no_api_comfyui_calls_exist_backend():
   215	    """Verify backend doesn't call /api/comfyui endpoints (v2 architecture compliance)."""
   216	    import os
   217	    import subprocess
   218	    
   219	    # Get project root
   220	    script_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))
   221	    src_dir = os.path.join(script_dir, "..", "..", "src")
   222	    
   223	    # Search for /api/comfyui in Python files
   224	    result = subprocess.run(
   225	        ["grep", "-r", "/api/comfyui", src_dir],
   226	        capture_output=True,
   227	        text=True
   228	    )
   229	    
   230	    # Should not find any matches in src/ (excluding test files)
   231	    matches = [line for line in result.stdout.strip().split('\n') if line and 'test' not in line.lower()]
   232	    assert len(matches) == 0, f"Found /api/comfyui calls in backend:\n{chr(10).join(matches)}"
   233

   261	def test_no_api_comfyui_calls_exist_frontend():
   262	    """Verify frontend uses correct /api/comfyui endpoints (v2 architecture).
   263	
   264	    NOTE: /api/comfyui/models/* endpoints ARE valid v2 endpoints for local model scanning.
   265	    This test verifies the endpoints are used correctly, not that they're absent.
   266	    """
   267	    import os
   268	    import subprocess
   269	    
   270	    script_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))
   271	    web_src = os.path.join(script_dir, "..", "..", "apps", "web", "src")
   272	    
   273	    if not os.path.exists(web_src):
   274	        pytest.skip("Frontend source not found")
   275	    
   276	    # Search for /api/comfyui in TypeScript/JavaScript files
   277	    result = subprocess.run(
   278	        ["grep", "-r", "/api/comfyui", web_src],
   279	        capture_output=True,
   280	        text=True
   281	    )
   282	    
   283	    matches = result.stdout.strip().split('\n')
   284	    matches = [m for m in matches if m]
   285	    
   286	    # Valid v2 ComfyUI endpoints (local model scanning)
   287	    valid_patterns = [
   288	        "/api/comfyui/models/checkpoints",
   289	        "/api/comfyui/models/loras",
   290	        "/api/comfyui/models/",
   291	        "/api/comfyui/status",
   292	        "/api/comfyui/folders",
   293	    ]
   294	    
   295	    # Filter out valid v2 endpoint calls
   296	    invalid_matches = []
   297	    for m in matches:
   298	        is_valid = any(pattern in m for pattern in valid_patterns)
   299	        if not is_valid and m:
   300	            invalid_matches.append(m)
   301	    
   302	    # All comfyui calls should be valid v2 endpoints
   303	    assert len(invalid_matches) == 0, f"Found invalid /api/comfyui calls:\n{chr(10).join(invalid_matches)}"
   304	
   305

   314	    """
   315	
   316	    def __init__(self):
   317	        self.downloaded_previews = []
   318	
   319	    def get_model(self, model_id):
   320	        """Return model with 3 versions, each with unique images."""

    28	def test_e2e_resolve_install_flow(pack_service, mock_layout, mock_blob_store):
    29	    """
    30	    Test 1: One E2E test in backend:
    31	    simulate pack needing base model -> call resolve endpoint -> then install
    32	    assert lock updated + blob present
    33	    """
    34	    # 1. Setup: Create a pack with a dependency
    35	    pack_name = "test_pack_workflow"
    36	    dep_id = "main_checkpoint"
    37	    
    38	    # Mock download to avoid network calls - inject mock resolver via registry
    39	    from src.store.models import ResolvedArtifact, ArtifactProvider, ArtifactDownload, ArtifactIntegrity
    40	    mock_resolver = MagicMock()
    41	    mock_resolver.resolve.return_value = ResolvedArtifact(
    42	        kind=AssetKind.CHECKPOINT,
    43	        sha256="test_sha256_hash_123",
    44	        size_bytes=1024,
    45	        provider=ArtifactProvider(name=ProviderName.URL),
    46	        download=ArtifactDownload(urls=["http://example.com/model.safetensors"]),
    47	        integrity=ArtifactIntegrity(sha256_verified=True)
    48	    )
    49	    pack_service._resolvers = {SelectorStrategy.URL_DOWNLOAD: mock_resolver}
    50	
    51	    with patch("src.store.pack_service.PackService._download_previews", return_value=[]):
    52	
    53	        pack = Pack(
    54	            name=pack_name,
    55	            pack_type=AssetKind.CHECKPOINT,
    56	            source=PackSource(provider=ProviderName.URL, url="http://example.com"),
    57	            dependencies=[
    58	                PackDependency(
    59	                    id=dep_id,
    60	                    kind=AssetKind.CHECKPOINT,
    61	                    required=True,
    62	                    selector=DependencySelector(
    63	                        strategy=SelectorStrategy.URL_DOWNLOAD,
    64	                        url="http://example.com/model.safetensors"
    65	                    ),
    66	                    update_policy=UpdatePolicy(),
    67	                    expose=ExposeConfig(filename="model.safetensors")
    68	                )
    69	            ]
    70	        )
    71	        mock_layout.save_pack(pack)
    72	        
    73	        # 2. Resolve
    74	        lock = pack_service.resolve_pack(pack_name)
    75	        
    76	        # Assert lock is updated and resolved
    77	        assert lock.pack == pack_name
    78	        assert len(lock.resolved) == 1
    79	        assert lock.resolved[0].dependency_id == dep_id
    80	        assert lock.resolved[0].artifact.sha256 == "test_sha256_hash_123"
    81	        
    82	        # 3. Install
    83	        # Mock blob store download
    84	        mock_blob_store.download = MagicMock(return_value="test_sha256_hash_123")
    85	        mock_blob_store.blob_exists = MagicMock(return_value=False)
    86	        
    87	        installed_hashes = pack_service.install_pack(pack_name)
    88	        
    89	        # 4. Assert blob present (simulated via mock check)
    90	        assert "test_sha256_hash_123" in installed_hashes
    91	        mock_blob_store.download.assert_called_once()

   491	describe('Plugin Validation', () => {
   492	  describe('CivitaiPlugin validation', () => {
   493	    const validateCivitai = (
   494	      _pack: PackDetail,
   495	      changes: Partial<PackDetail>
   496	    ): ValidationResult => {
   497	      const errors: Record<string, string> = {}
   498	
   499	      // Civitai packs have limited editability
   500	      if (changes.description !== undefined) {

    13	// ============================================================================
    14	// Test Types (mirroring PackDetailPage types)

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/// <reference types="node" />
     2	/**
     3	 * Pack Data Query Invalidation Tests
     4	 *
     5	 * Verifies that mutations in usePackData.ts which modify pack state
     6	 * visible on PacksPage correctly invalidate the ['packs'] query key.
     7	 *
     8	 * Background: PacksPage uses `useQuery({ queryKey: ['packs'] })` with
     9	 * a global staleTime of 60s. If a mutation on PackDetailPage changes
    10	 * pack state (e.g. resolves a dependency → has_unresolved changes)
    11	 * but doesn't invalidate ['packs'], the PacksPage will show stale
    12	 * data (e.g. "Needs Setup" badge) until the staleTime expires.
    13	 *
    14	 * This is a static analysis test — it reads the source file and
    15	 * verifies the invariant without React rendering.
    16	 */
    17	
    18	import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest'
    19	import { readFileSync } from 'fs'
    20	import { resolve } from 'path'
    21	
    22	// Read the source file
    23	const SOURCE_PATH = resolve(
    24	  __dirname,
    25	  '../components/modules/pack-detail/hooks/usePackData.ts'
    26	)
    27	const source = readFileSync(SOURCE_PATH, 'utf-8')
    28	
    29	/**
    30	 * Extract mutation blocks from usePackData.ts source.
    31	 *
    32	 * Each mutation follows this pattern:
    33	 *   const fooMutation = useMutation({
    34	 *     mutationFn: async (...) => { ... },
    35	 *     onSuccess: () => { ... },
    36	 *     onError: ...
    37	 *   })
    38	 *
    39	 * Returns a map of mutationName → onSuccess body text.
    40	 */
    41	function extractMutations(src: string): Map<string, string> {
    42	  const mutations = new Map<string, string>()
    43	
    44	  // Match: const <name>Mutation = useMutation({
    45	  const mutationStarts = [...src.matchAll(/const (\w+Mutation) = useMutation\(\{/g)]
    46	
    47	  for (let i = 0; i < mutationStarts.length; i++) {
    48	    const name = mutationStarts[i][1]
    49	    const startIdx = mutationStarts[i].index!
    50	
    51	    // Find the onSuccess block within this mutation
    52	    // We look from the mutation start to the next mutation (or EOF)
    53	    const endIdx = i + 1 < mutationStarts.length
    54	      ? mutationStarts[i + 1].index!
    55	      : src.length
    56	
    57	    const mutationBlock = src.slice(startIdx, endIdx)
    58	
    59	    // Extract onSuccess body
    60	    const successMatch = mutationBlock.match(/onSuccess:\s*\([^)]*\)\s*=>\s*\{([\s\S]*?)\},\s*onError/)
    61	    if (successMatch) {
    62	      mutations.set(name, successMatch[1])
    63	    }
    64	  }
    65	
    66	  return mutations
    67	}
    68	
    69	const mutations = extractMutations(source)
    70	
    71	// ============================================================================
    72	// Mutations that MUST invalidate ['packs'] because they change state
    73	// visible on PacksPage (has_unresolved, tags, thumbnail, pack existence)
    74	// ============================================================================
    75	
    76	const MUST_INVALIDATE_PACKS = [
    77	  // Changes pack existence on list
    78	  'deleteMutation',
    79	  // Changes user_tags shown on list cards
    80	  'updatePackMutation',
    81	  // Resolves base model → changes has_unresolved
    82	  'resolveBaseModelMutation',
    83	  // Resolves all deps → changes has_unresolved
    84	  'resolvePackMutation',
    85	  // Deletes resource → can change has_unresolved
    86	  'deleteResourceMutation',
    87	  // Changes dependency strategy → can affect resolution status
    88	  'setAsBaseModelMutation',
    89	  // Changes previews/thumbnail shown on list
    90	  'batchUpdatePreviewsMutation',
    91	  // Changes cover image shown on list
    92	  'setCoverPreviewMutation',
    93	]
    94	
    95	// ============================================================================
    96	// Mutations that DON'T need ['packs'] invalidation because they only
    97	// affect pack detail view, not the list
    98	// ============================================================================
    99	
   100	const NO_PACKS_INVALIDATION_NEEDED = [
   101	  // Only affects profile status, not pack list
   102	  'usePackMutation',
   103	  // Only affects parameters (not shown on list)
   104	  'updateParametersMutation',
   105	  // Workflow mutations — not visible on pack list
   106	  'generateWorkflowMutation',
   107	  'createSymlinkMutation',
   108	  'removeSymlinkMutation',
   109	  'deleteWorkflowMutation',
   110	  'uploadWorkflowMutation',
   111	  // Description not shown on list cards
   112	  'updateDescriptionMutation',
   113	  // Backup operations — not visible on list
   114	  'pullPackMutation',
   115	  'pushPackMutation',
   116	  // Individual preview upload — batchUpdate handles list invalidation
   117	  'uploadPreviewMutation',
   118	  // Individual preview delete — minor, batch handles it
   119	  'deletePreviewMutation',
   120	  // Reorder — doesn't change which preview is cover
   121	  'reorderPreviewsMutation',
   122	]
   123	
   124	// ============================================================================
   125	// Tests
   126	// ============================================================================
   127	
   128	describe('usePackData Query Invalidation', () => {
   129	  it('should find all expected mutations in source', () => {
   130	    const allExpected = [...MUST_INVALIDATE_PACKS, ...NO_PACKS_INVALIDATION_NEEDED]
   131	    const found = [...mutations.keys()]
   132	
   133	    for (const name of allExpected) {
   134	      expect(found, `Mutation "${name}" not found in usePackData.ts`).toContain(name)
   135	    }
   136	  })
   137	
   138	  it('should account for all mutations in source (no uncategorized)', () => {
   139	    const allCategorized = new Set([
   140	      ...MUST_INVALIDATE_PACKS,
   141	      ...NO_PACKS_INVALIDATION_NEEDED,
   142	    ])
   143	
   144	    for (const name of mutations.keys()) {
   145	      expect(
   146	        allCategorized.has(name),
   147	        `Mutation "${name}" exists in usePackData.ts but is not categorized ` +
   148	        `in the test. Add it to MUST_INVALIDATE_PACKS or NO_PACKS_INVALIDATION_NEEDED.`
   149	      ).toBe(true)
   150	    }
   151	  })
   152	
   153	  describe('mutations affecting PacksPage MUST invalidate [\'packs\']', () => {
   154	    for (const name of MUST_INVALIDATE_PACKS) {
   155	      it(`${name} should invalidate ['packs'] query`, () => {
   156	        const body = mutations.get(name)
   157	        expect(body, `Could not find onSuccess for ${name}`).toBeDefined()
   158	        expect(
   159	          body,
   160	          `${name}.onSuccess does NOT invalidate ['packs']. ` +
   161	          `PacksPage will show stale data (e.g. "Needs Setup" badge) after this mutation. ` +
   162	          `Add: queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['packs'] })`
   163	        ).toContain("['packs']")
   164	      })
   165	    }
   166	  })
   167	
   168	  describe('mutations NOT affecting PacksPage should not over-invalidate', () => {
   169	    // This is a softer check — it's OK if they DO invalidate,
   170	    // but we document which ones currently don't need to.
   171	    for (const name of NO_PACKS_INVALIDATION_NEEDED) {
   172	      it(`${name} is categorized as not needing ['packs'] invalidation`, () => {
   173	        // Just verify the mutation exists and is parseable
   174	        const body = mutations.get(name)
   175	        expect(body, `Could not find onSuccess for ${name}`).toBeDefined()
   176	      })
   177	    }
   178	  })
   179	})

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	"""
     2	Tests for DependencyResolver protocol and implementations.
     3	
     4	Verifies:
     5	- Each resolver implementation satisfies the DependencyResolver protocol
     6	- Registry dispatch in PackService works correctly
     7	- Resolver isolation (each resolver handles its own strategy)
     8	- Civitai, HuggingFace, URL, and Local file resolvers
     9	"""
    10	
    11	import pytest
    12	from pathlib import Path
    13	from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch
    14	
    15	from src.store.dependency_resolver import (
    16	    CivitaiFileResolver,
    17	    CivitaiLatestResolver,
    18	    BaseModelHintResolver,
    19	    DependencyResolver,
    20	    HuggingFaceResolver,
    21	    LocalFileResolver,
    22	    UrlResolver,
    23	)
    24	from src.store.models import (
    25	    AssetKind,
    26	    CivitaiSelector,
    27	    DependencySelector,
    28	    ExposeConfig,
    29	    HuggingFaceSelector,
    30	    PackDependency,
    31	    ProviderName,
    32	    SelectorConstraints,
    33	    SelectorStrategy,

    37	class TestDependencyResolverProtocol:
    38	    """Tests for DependencyResolver protocol compliance."""
    39	
    40	    def test_civitai_file_satisfies_protocol(self):
    41	        resolver = CivitaiFileResolver(MagicMock())
    42	        assert isinstance(resolver, DependencyResolver)
    43	
    44	    def test_civitai_latest_satisfies_protocol(self):
    45	        resolver = CivitaiLatestResolver(MagicMock())
    46	        assert isinstance(resolver, DependencyResolver)
    47	
    48	    def test_base_model_hint_satisfies_protocol(self):
    49	        resolver = BaseModelHintResolver(MagicMock(), MagicMock())
    50	        assert isinstance(resolver, DependencyResolver)
    51	
    52	    def test_huggingface_satisfies_protocol(self):
    53	        resolver = HuggingFaceResolver()
    54	        assert isinstance(resolver, DependencyResolver)
    55	
    56	    def test_url_satisfies_protocol(self):
    57	        resolver = UrlResolver()
    58	        assert isinstance(resolver, DependencyResolver)
    59	
    60	    def test_local_file_satisfies_protocol(self):
    61	        resolver = LocalFileResolver()
    62	        assert isinstance(resolver, DependencyResolver)
    63	
    64	
    65	class TestCivitaiFileResolver:
    66	    """Tests for CivitaiFileResolver."""
    67	
    68	    def _make_dep(self, version_id=100, file_id=1000):
    69	        return PackDependency(
    70	            id="model",
    71	            kind=AssetKind.CHECKPOINT,
    72	            selector=DependencySelector(
    73	                strategy=SelectorStrategy.CIVITAI_FILE,
    74	                civitai={"model_id": 123, "version_id": version_id, "file_id": file_id},
    75	            ),
    76	            expose=ExposeConfig(filename="model.safetensors"),
    77	        )
    78	
    79	    def test_resolves_pinned_file(self):
    80	        mock_civitai = MagicMock()
    81	        mock_civitai.get_model_version.return_value = {
    82	            "files": [{
    83	                "id": 1000, "primary": True, "name": "model.safetensors",
    84	                "hashes": {"SHA256": "ABCDEF"},
    85	                "sizeKB": 2048,
    86	                "downloadUrl": "https://civitai.com/api/download/models/100",
    87	            }],
    88	        }
    89	        resolver = CivitaiFileResolver(mock_civitai)
    90	        result = resolver.resolve(self._make_dep())
    91	
    92	        assert result is not None
    93	        assert result.sha256 == "abcdef"
    94	        assert result.provider.version_id == 100
    95	        assert result.provider.file_id == 1000
    96	        assert result.provider.name == ProviderName.CIVITAI
    97	
    98	    def test_returns_none_without_civitai_selector(self):
    99	        dep = PackDependency(
   100	            id="model",
   101	            kind=AssetKind.CHECKPOINT,
   102	            selector=DependencySelector(strategy=SelectorStrategy.CIVITAI_FILE),
   103	            expose=ExposeConfig(filename="model.safetensors"),
   104	        )
   105	        resolver = CivitaiFileResolver(MagicMock())
   106	        assert resolver.resolve(dep) is None
   107	
   108	    def test_returns_none_without_version_id(self):
   109	        dep = PackDependency(
   110	            id="model",
   111	            kind=AssetKind.CHECKPOINT,
   112	            selector=DependencySelector(
   113	                strategy=SelectorStrategy.CIVITAI_FILE,
   114	                civitai={"model_id": 123},
   115	            ),
   116	            expose=ExposeConfig(filename="model.safetensors"),
   117	        )
   118	        resolver = CivitaiFileResolver(MagicMock())
   119	        assert resolver.resolve(dep) is None
   120
