   122	class TestCivitaiLatestResolver:
   123	    """Tests for CivitaiLatestResolver."""
   124	
   125	    def _make_dep(self, model_id=123):
   126	        return PackDependency(
   127	            id="model",
   128	            kind=AssetKind.CHECKPOINT,
   129	            selector=DependencySelector(
   130	                strategy=SelectorStrategy.CIVITAI_MODEL_LATEST,
   131	                civitai={"model_id": model_id},
   132	                constraints=SelectorConstraints(primary_file_only=True),
   133	            ),
   134	            expose=ExposeConfig(filename="model.safetensors"),
   135	        )
   136	
   137	    def test_resolves_latest_version(self):
   138	        mock_civitai = MagicMock()
   139	        mock_civitai.get_model.return_value = {
   140	            "modelVersions": [{
   141	                "id": 200,
   142	                "files": [{
   143	                    "id": 2000, "primary": True, "name": "model.safetensors",
   144	                    "hashes": {"SHA256": "NEWHASH"},
   145	                    "sizeKB": 4096,
   146	                    "downloadUrl": "https://civitai.com/api/download/models/200",
   147	                }],
   148	            }],
   149	        }
   150	        resolver = CivitaiLatestResolver(mock_civitai)
   151	        result = resolver.resolve(self._make_dep())
   152	
   153	        assert result is not None
   154	        assert result.provider.version_id == 200
   155	        assert result.sha256 == "newhash"
   156	
   157	    def test_resolves_pinned_version_not_latest(self):
   158	        """Critical regression test: when version_id is pinned, resolver MUST
   159	        use get_model_version(version_id) and NOT blindly take versions[0].
   160	
   161	        This was the root cause of all bundle pack downloads failing —
   162	        multiple dependencies share the same model_id but have different
   163	        version_ids. The old code always took versions[0] (latest), which
   164	        could be gated/early-access, causing all downloads to fail.
   165	        """
   166	        mock_civitai = MagicMock()
   167	
   168	        # get_model returns LATEST as versions[0] (id=999, gated)
   169	        mock_civitai.get_model.return_value = {
   170	            "modelVersions": [
   171	                {
   172	                    "id": 999,
   173	                    "files": [{
   174	                        "id": 9000, "primary": True, "name": "latest.safetensors",
   175	                        "hashes": {"SHA256": "LATESTHASH"},
   176	                        "downloadUrl": "https://civitai.com/api/download/models/999",
   177	                    }],
   178	                },
   179	                {
   180	                    "id": 200,
   181	                    "files": [{
   182	                        "id": 2000, "primary": True, "name": "pinned.safetensors",
   183	                        "hashes": {"SHA256": "PINNEDHASH"},
   184	                        "downloadUrl": "https://civitai.com/api/download/models/200",
   185	                    }],
   186	                },
   187	            ],
   188	        }
   189	
   190	        # get_model_version returns the PINNED version data
   191	        mock_civitai.get_model_version.return_value = {
   192	            "id": 200,
   193	            "files": [{
   194	                "id": 2000, "primary": True, "name": "pinned.safetensors",
   195	                "hashes": {"SHA256": "PINNEDHASH"},
   196	                "downloadUrl": "https://civitai.com/api/download/models/200",
   197	            }],
   198	        }
   199	
   200	        # Dependency has version_id=200 pinned
   201	        dep = PackDependency(
   202	            id="lora_v2",
   203	            kind=AssetKind.LORA,
   204	            selector=DependencySelector(
   205	                strategy=SelectorStrategy.CIVITAI_MODEL_LATEST,
   206	                civitai={"model_id": 123, "version_id": 200},
   207	                constraints=SelectorConstraints(primary_file_only=True),
   208	            ),
   209	            expose=ExposeConfig(filename="pinned.safetensors"),
   210	        )
   211	
   212	        resolver = CivitaiLatestResolver(mock_civitai)
   213	        result = resolver.resolve(dep)
   214	
   215	        assert result is not None
   216	        # Must resolve to pinned version 200, NOT latest 999
   217	        assert result.provider.version_id == 200
   218	        assert result.sha256 == "pinnedhash"
   219	        assert "models/200" in result.download.urls[0]
   220	
   221	        # Must call get_model_version, NOT get_model
   222	        mock_civitai.get_model_version.assert_called_once_with(200)
   223	        mock_civitai.get_model.assert_not_called()
   224	
   225	    def test_multi_version_bundle_resolves_each_version(self):
   226	        """Simulate a bundle pack with 6 LoRAs from the same model but
   227	        different version_ids. Each must resolve to its own version.
   228	        """
   229	        mock_civitai = MagicMock()
   230	
   231	        version_ids = [100, 200, 300, 400, 500, 600]
   232	
   233	        def fake_get_model_version(vid):
   234	            return {
   235	                "id": vid,
   236	                "files": [{
   237	                    "id": vid * 10, "primary": True,
   238	                    "name": f"lora_v{vid}.safetensors",
   239	                    "hashes": {"SHA256": f"HASH{vid}"},
   240	                    "downloadUrl": f"https://civitai.com/api/download/models/{vid}",
   241	                }],
   242	            }
   243	
   244	        mock_civitai.get_model_version.side_effect = fake_get_model_version
   245	
   246	        resolver = CivitaiLatestResolver(mock_civitai)
   247	
   248	        for vid in version_ids:
   249	            dep = PackDependency(
   250	                id=f"lora_{vid}",
   251	                kind=AssetKind.LORA,
   252	                selector=DependencySelector(
   253	                    strategy=SelectorStrategy.CIVITAI_MODEL_LATEST,
   254	                    civitai={"model_id": 42, "version_id": vid},
   255	                ),
   256	                expose=ExposeConfig(filename=f"lora_{vid}.safetensors"),
   257	            )
   258	            result = resolver.resolve(dep)
   259	            assert result is not None
   260	            assert result.provider.version_id == vid
   261	            assert f"models/{vid}" in result.download.urls[0]
   262	            assert result.sha256 == f"hash{vid}"
   263	
   264	        # Should have called get_model_version 6 times, get_model 0 times
   265	        assert mock_civitai.get_model_version.call_count == 6
   266	        mock_civitai.get_model.assert_not_called()
   267	
   268	    def test_pinned_version_with_file_id(self):
   269	        """When both version_id and file_id are set, resolver should pick
   270	        the exact file matching file_id.
   271	        """
   272	        mock_civitai = MagicMock()
   273	        mock_civitai.get_model_version.return_value = {
   274	            "id": 200,
   275	            "files": [
   276	                {"id": 2001, "name": "pruned.safetensors", "hashes": {"SHA256": "PRUNED"}},
   277	                {"id": 2002, "name": "full.safetensors", "hashes": {"SHA256": "FULL"}},
   278	            ],
   279	        }
   280	
   281	        dep = PackDependency(
   282	            id="model",
   283	            kind=AssetKind.CHECKPOINT,
   284	            selector=DependencySelector(
   285	                strategy=SelectorStrategy.CIVITAI_MODEL_LATEST,
   286	                civitai={"model_id": 123, "version_id": 200, "file_id": 2002},
   287	            ),
   288	            expose=ExposeConfig(filename="full.safetensors"),
   289	        )
   290	
   291	        resolver = CivitaiLatestResolver(mock_civitai)
   292	        result = resolver.resolve(dep)
   293	
   294	        assert result is not None
   295	        assert result.provider.file_id == 2002
   296	        assert result.sha256 == "full"
   297	
   298	    def test_returns_none_for_empty_versions(self):
   299	        mock_civitai = MagicMock()
   300	        mock_civitai.get_model.return_value = {"modelVersions": []}
   301	        resolver = CivitaiLatestResolver(mock_civitai)
   302	        assert resolver.resolve(self._make_dep()) is None
   303	
   304	    def test_returns_none_without_civitai_selector(self):
   305	        dep = PackDependency(
   306	            id="model",
   307	            kind=AssetKind.CHECKPOINT,
   308	            selector=DependencySelector(strategy=SelectorStrategy.CIVITAI_MODEL_LATEST),
   309	            expose=ExposeConfig(filename="model.safetensors"),
   310	        )
   311	        resolver = CivitaiLatestResolver(MagicMock())
   312	        assert resolver.resolve(dep) is None
   313	
   314	
   315	class TestBaseModelHintResolver:
   316	    """Tests for BaseModelHintResolver constraint handling."""
   317	
   318	    def test_uses_select_file_with_constraints(self):
   319	        """BaseModelHintResolver should use _select_file() with constraints,
   320	        not just take files[0].
   321	        """
   322	        mock_civitai = MagicMock()
   323	        mock_civitai.get_model_version.return_value = {
   324	            "id": 300,
   325	            "files": [
   326	                {"id": 3001, "name": "model.ckpt", "primary": False, "hashes": {"SHA256": "CKPT"}},
   327	                {"id": 3002, "name": "model.safetensors", "primary": True, "hashes": {"SHA256": "SAFE"}},
   328	            ],
   329	        }
   330	
   331	        mock_layout = MagicMock()
   332	        mock_config = MagicMock()
   333	        mock_alias = MagicMock()
   334	        mock_alias.selector.civitai.model_id = 10
   335	        mock_alias.selector.civitai.version_id = 300
   336	        mock_alias.selector.civitai.file_id = None
   337	        mock_config.base_model_aliases.get.return_value = mock_alias
   338	        mock_layout.load_config.return_value = mock_config
   339	
   340	        dep = PackDependency(
   341	            id="base_checkpoint",
   342	            kind=AssetKind.CHECKPOINT,
   343	            selector=DependencySelector(
   344	                strategy=SelectorStrategy.BASE_MODEL_HINT,
   345	                base_model="SDXL",
   346	                constraints=SelectorConstraints(primary_file_only=True),
   347	            ),
   348	            expose=ExposeConfig(filename="sdxl.safetensors"),
   349	        )
   350	
   351	        resolver = BaseModelHintResolver(mock_civitai, mock_layout)
   352	        result = resolver.resolve(dep)
   353	
   354	        assert result is not None
   355	        # Should prefer primary file via _select_file, not just files[0]
   356	        assert result.provider.file_id == 3002
   357	        assert result.sha256 == "safe"
   358

   367	            selector=DependencySelector(

   369	                huggingface={"repo_id": "org/model", "filename": "model.safetensors"},
   370	            ),
   371	            expose=ExposeConfig(filename="model.safetensors"),
   372	        )
   373	        resolver = HuggingFaceResolver()

   380	        assert result.download.urls[0].endswith("/model.safetensors")

   382	    def test_resolves_hf_with_subfolder_and_revision(self):

   449	class TestLocalFileResolver:
   450	    """Tests for LocalFileResolver."""
   451	
   452	    def test_resolves_existing_file(self, tmp_path):
   453	        test_file = tmp_path / "model.safetensors"
   454	        test_file.write_bytes(b"fake model content")
   455	
   456	        dep = PackDependency(
   457	            id="model",

   459	            selector=DependencySelector(

   461	                local_path=str(test_file),
   462	            ),
   463	            expose=ExposeConfig(filename="model.safetensors"),
   464	        )

   467	
   468	        assert result is not None
   469	        assert result.provider.name == ProviderName.LOCAL
   470	        assert result.sha256 is not None
   471	        assert result.integrity.sha256_verified is True
   472	        assert result.size_bytes == len(b"fake model content")
   473

   498	class TestPackServiceResolverRegistry:
   499	    """Tests for PackService resolver dispatch via registry."""
   500	
   501	    def test_pack_service_uses_registry(self):
   502	        """PackService should dispatch to registered resolvers."""
   503	        from src.store.pack_service import PackService
   504	
   505	        mock_resolver = MagicMock()
   506	        mock_resolver.resolve.return_value = None
   507	
   508	        service = PackService(
   509	            layout=MagicMock(),
   510	            blob_store=MagicMock(),
   511	            resolvers={SelectorStrategy.URL_DOWNLOAD: mock_resolver},
   512	        )
   513	
   514	        dep = PackDependency(
   515	            id="test",
   516	            kind=AssetKind.LORA,
   517	            selector=DependencySelector(
   518	                strategy=SelectorStrategy.URL_DOWNLOAD,
   519	                url="https://example.com/model.bin",
   520	            ),
   521	            expose=ExposeConfig(filename="model.bin"),
   522	        )
   523	
   524	        result = service._resolve_dependency(MagicMock(), dep, None)
   525	        mock_resolver.resolve.assert_called_once_with(dep)
   526	
   527	    def test_pack_service_returns_none_for_unknown_strategy(self):
   528	        """Unknown strategy without resolver should return None."""
   529	        from src.store.pack_service import PackService
   530	
   531	        service = PackService(
   532	            layout=MagicMock(),
   533	            blob_store=MagicMock(),
   534	            resolvers={SelectorStrategy.URL_DOWNLOAD: MagicMock()},
   535	        )
   536	
   537	        dep = PackDependency(
   538	            id="test",
   539	            kind=AssetKind.LORA,
   540	            selector=DependencySelector(strategy=SelectorStrategy.HUGGINGFACE_FILE,
   541	                                        huggingface={"repo_id": "x/y", "filename": "z"}),
   542	            expose=ExposeConfig(filename="model.bin"),
   543	        )
   544	
   545	        result = service._resolve_dependency(MagicMock(), dep, None)
   546	        assert result is None
   547	
   548	    def test_pack_service_lazy_init_resolvers(self):
   549	        """PackService should lazily init default resolvers when none provided."""
   550	        from src.store.pack_service import PackService
   551	
   552	        mock_civitai = MagicMock()
   553	        mock_civitai.get_model_version.return_value = {
   554	            "files": [{
   555	                "id": 1, "name": "model.safetensors",
   556	                "hashes": {"SHA256": "abc"},
   557	                "downloadUrl": "https://civitai.com/api/download/models/100",
   558	            }],
   559	        }
   560	
   561	        service = PackService(
   562	            layout=MagicMock(),
   563	            blob_store=MagicMock(),
   564	            civitai_client=mock_civitai,
   565	        )
   566	
   567	        dep = PackDependency(
   568	            id="test",
   569	            kind=AssetKind.LORA,
   570	            selector=DependencySelector(
   571	                strategy=SelectorStrategy.CIVITAI_FILE,
   572	                civitai={"model_id": 1, "version_id": 100, "file_id": 1},
   573	            ),
   574	            expose=ExposeConfig(filename="model.safetensors"),
   575	        )
   576	
   577	        result = service._resolve_dependency(MagicMock(), dep, None)
   578	        assert result is not None
   579	        assert result.provider.name == ProviderName.CIVITAI

   250	
   251	### Existing Packs - MIGRATION NEEDED
   252	
   253	Všech 10 existujících packů:
   254	- ✅ Mají `source` field s provider/model_id/version_id/url
   255	- ✅ Mají `pack_type` (ne pack_subtype)
   256	- ⚠️ CHYBÍ `pack_category` → nastavit na `EXTERNAL` (všechny jsou z Civitai)
   257	- ⚠️ CHYBÍ `pack_dependencies` → nastavit na `[]` (prázdný list)
   258	
   259	---
   260	
   261	## Problem Statement
   262	
   263	### Current State
   264	- `PackDetailPage.tsx` má **3267 řádků** - neudržitelné
   265	- Všechna logika inline (queries, mutations, state, render)
   266	- Packs lze vytvářet pouze importem z Civitai
   267	- Omezené editační možnosti
   268	- Žádná podpora pro různé typy packů
   269	
   270	### Target State
   271	- Modulární architektura s komponenty < 300 řádků
   272	- Plná editovatelnost všech částí packu
   273	- 3+ typy packů (Custom, Civitai, Install)
   274	- Plugin systém pro type-specific chování
   275	- Připravenost na i18n
   276	- Premium UX s animacemi
   277	
   278	---
   279	
   280	## Pack Types
   281	
   282	### 1. Custom Pack 🎨
   283	**Source:** `provider = LOCAL`
   284	
   285	Plně uživatelsky tvořený pack - od prázdného nebo ze šablony.
   286	
   287	**Charakteristiky:**
   288	- Všechna pole editovatelná
   289	- Žádné external source tracking
   290	- Uživatel přidává dependencies ručně
   291	- Markdown description
   292	
   293	**Use cases:**
   294	- Osobní kolekce modelů
   295	- Experimentální sestavy
   296	- Kombinace z různých zdrojů
   297	
   298	### 2. Civitai Pack 🌐
   299	**Source:** `provider = CIVITAI`, `model_id`, `version_id`
   300	
   301	Importovaný z Civitai s tracking původu.
   302	
   303	**Charakteristiky:**
   304	- Base model resolver (existující)
   305	- Update checking via UpdateService
   306	- HTML description (read-only nebo raw edit)
   307	- Civitai metadata synchronizace
   308	
   309	**Use cases:**
   310	- Import LoRA/Checkpoint z Civitai
   311	- Sledování nových verzí
   312	- Automatické updates
   313	
   314	### 3. Install Pack 🔧 (FUTURE)
   315	**Source:** `provider = LOCAL`, `user_tags = ["install-pack"]`
   316	
   317	> ⚠️ NOTE: Install packs are a FUTURE feature. Currently not implemented.
   318	> Will use `user_tags` for identification since `pack_subtype` doesn't exist.
   319	
   320	Instalační pack pro UI prostředí.
   321	
   322	**Charakteristiky:**
   323	- Script-based (bash/python)
   324	- Commands: install, start, stop, verify, update
   325	- Console output viewer
   326	- Environment status monitoring
   327	- Méně focus na previews
   328	
   329	**Use cases:**
   330	- ComfyUI instalace a správa
   331	- Forge Neo setup
   332	- Custom UI environments
   333	
   334	---
   335	
   336	## Architecture Overview
   337	
   338	### Guiding Principles
   339	
   340	1. **Single Responsibility** - každá komponenta má jeden účel

     1	# PLAN: Pack Edit & Modularization
     2	
     3	**Version:** v2.4.0
     4	**Status:** ✅ COMPLETE (2026-02-03) - Future work přesunuto do nových PLAN souborů
     5	**Created:** 2026-01-30
     6	**Updated:** 2026-02-03
     7	**Branch:** `pack-edit`
     8	
     9	---
    10	
    11	## Executive Summary
    12	
    13	Toto je **MEGA komponenta** celé aplikace Synapse. PackDetailPage je srdcem správy AI modelů a musí být:
    14	- **Krásná** - pro náročné designéry, s animacemi a premium UX
    15	- **Modulární** - snadno rozšiřitelná o nové komponenty
    16	- **Editovatelná** - plná správa všech částí packu
    17	- **Připravená na budoucnost** - i18n, nové typy packů, pluginy
    18	
    19	---
    20	
    21	## 🏗️ PRINCIP: FUNKČNĚ ZACHOVAT, VIZUÁLNĚ VYLEPŠIT
    22	
    23	### Základní filosofie
    24	
    25	Toto je **kreativní projekt** pro premium UI. Nejsme omezeni na "pixel-perfect kopii".
    26	
    27	**DVĚ ROVINY:**
    28	
    29	1. **FUNKČNÍ ROVINA** 🔒 (zachovat)
    30	   - Algoritmy pro video přehrávání, paralelizaci, polling
    31	   - Download progress tracking, ETA výpočty, speed metriky
    32	   - Civitai import flow, URL transformace
    33	   - Všechny zobrazované informace (nepřijít o žádná data)
    34	   - Business logika, state management, mutations
    35	
    36	2. **VIZUÁLNÍ ROVINA** 🎨 (vylepšovat!)
    37	   - UI může být krásnější, modernější
    38	   - Animace mohou být bohatší, premium feel
    39	   - Layout může být lepší, přehlednější
    40	   - UX může být intuitivnější
    41	   - Připravit strukturu pro edit mode
    42	
    43	### 🎯 Cíl: Premium UI + Zero Regrese
    44	
    45	```
    46	FUNKČNĚ: Žádná feature nesmí zmizet nebo přestat fungovat
    47	VIZUÁLNĚ: Můžeme udělat UI geniální, animační a vizuální skvost
    48	```
    49	
    50	### 🔑 Co MUSÍME zachovat (funkčně):
    51	
    52	#### 1. Civitai Import Flow
    53	- Domain entity a datové struktury - **neměnit typy**
    54	- Transformace dat - zachovat logiku
    55	- Import wizard - zachovat flow
    56	
    57	#### 2. Dependencies - VŠECHNY informace
    58	Zobrazujeme mnoho dat - **žádné nesmí zmizet**:
    59	- type, name, version, size, status, provider
    60	- Download progress + speed + ETA
    61	- Source info (model_id, creator, repo_id)
    62	- SHA256, local_path, URL
    63	- Restore from backup functionality
    64	
    65	#### 3. Preview/Video algoritmy
    66	MediaPreview má komplexní logiku:
    67	- Video autoplay, hover prioritization
    68	- Thumbnail/video URL transformace pro Civitai
    69	- NSFW blur, aspect ratio handling
    70	- **Tyto algoritmy zachovat** - volat se správnými props
    71	
    72	#### 4. Backup/Restore
    73	- PackStorageStatus, Pull/Push dialogy
    74	- Blob-level restore functionality
    75	
    76	### ✅ CO MŮŽEME DĚLAT:
    77	
    78	1. **Vylepšit design** - krásnější karty, lepší spacing, modernější vzhled
    79	2. **Přidat animace** - enter/exit transitions, hover effects, micro-interactions
    80	3. **Reorganizovat layout** - lepší uspořádání, collapsible sekce

codex
The spec marks several Custom Pack pieces as complete, but the code path shows a split: storage models and some modals exist, while the active page often does not wire them into a usable flow. I’m pulling the endpoint and branch snippets now to make those gaps precise.

     1	"""
     2	Integration and Smoke Tests for Dependencies Rework (Phase 1 + Phase 2)
     3	
     4	Integration tests use real Store instances with tmp_path.
     5	Smoke tests verify API endpoint wiring via FastAPI TestClient.
     6	
     7	Phase 1: Base Model Fix
     8	- set-base-model endpoint integration
     9	- asset_info response includes required + is_base_model
    10	- base model import creates required=False
    11	
    12	Phase 2: Pack Dependencies CRUD
    13	- GET /pack-dependencies/status batch endpoint
    14	- POST /pack-dependencies add endpoint
    15	- DELETE /pack-dependencies/{name} remove endpoint
    16	- Validation (self-reference, duplicate)
    17	"""
    18	
    19	import json
    20	import pytest
    21	from pathlib import Path
    22	
    23	from src.store.models import (
    24	    AssetKind,
    25	    CivitaiSelector,
    26	    DependencySelector,
    27	    ExposeConfig,
    28	    Pack,
    29	    PackDependency,
    30	    PackDependencyRef,
    31	    PackSource,
    32	    ProviderName,
    33	    SelectorStrategy,
    34	    UpdatePolicy,
    35	    UpdatePolicyMode,
    36	)
    37	
    38	
    39	# =============================================================================
    40	# Helpers
    41	# =============================================================================
    42	
    43	
    44	def make_store(tmp_path):
    45	    """Create an initialized Store at tmp_path."""
    46	    from src.store import Store
    47	
    48	    store = Store(tmp_path / "store")
    49	    store.init()
    50	    return store
    51	
    52	
    53	def make_lora_pack(
    54	    name: str = "test-lora",
    55	    base_model: str = "SDXL",
    56	    with_base_dep: bool = True,
    57	    pack_deps: list[PackDependencyRef] | None = None,
    58	) -> Pack:
    59	    """Create a LoRA pack with optional base model dependency."""
    60	    deps = []
    61	    if with_base_dep:
    62	        deps.append(PackDependency(
    63	            id="base_checkpoint",
    64	            kind=AssetKind.CHECKPOINT,
    65	            required=False,
    66	            selector=DependencySelector(
    67	                strategy=SelectorStrategy.BASE_MODEL_HINT,
    68	                base_model=base_model,
    69	            ),
    70	            update_policy=UpdatePolicy(),
    71	            expose=ExposeConfig(filename="base.safetensors"),
    72	        ))
    73	    deps.append(PackDependency(
    74	        id="main_lora",
    75	        kind=AssetKind.LORA,
    76	        required=True,
    77	        selector=DependencySelector(
    78	            strategy=SelectorStrategy.CIVITAI_FILE,
    79	            civitai=CivitaiSelector(model_id=123, version_id=456, file_id=789),
    80	        ),
    81	        update_policy=UpdatePolicy(),
    82	        expose=ExposeConfig(filename="lora.safetensors"),
    83	    ))
    84	    return Pack(
    85	        schema="1.0",
    86	        name=name,
    87	        pack_type="lora",
    88	        source=PackSource(provider=ProviderName.CIVITAI, model_id=123),
    89	        dependencies=deps,
    90	        base_model=base_model,
    91	        pack_dependencies=pack_deps or [],
    92	    )
    93	
    94	
    95	def make_checkpoint_pack(name: str = "sdxl-checkpoint") -> Pack:
    96	    """Create a simple checkpoint pack."""
    97	    return Pack(
    98	        schema="1.0",
    99	        name=name,
   100	        pack_type="checkpoint",
   101	        source=PackSource(provider=ProviderName.LOCAL),
   102	        dependencies=[
   103	            PackDependency(
   104	                id="main_checkpoint",
   105	                kind=AssetKind.CHECKPOINT,
   106	                required=True,
   107	                selector=DependencySelector(
   108	                    strategy=SelectorStrategy.CIVITAI_FILE,
   109	                    civitai=CivitaiSelector(model_id=100, version_id=200, file_id=300),
   110	                ),
   111	                update_policy=UpdatePolicy(),
   112	                expose=ExposeConfig(filename="checkpoint.safetensors"),
   113	            ),
   114	        ],
   115	    )
   116	
   117	
   118	# =============================================================================
   119	# Phase 1: Integration Tests - Base Model Fix
   120	# =============================================================================
   121	
   122	
   123	class TestBaseModelIntegration:
   124	    """Integration tests for base model fix with real Store."""
   125	
   126	    def test_pack_with_base_model_hint_roundtrip(self, tmp_path):
   127	        """Base model hint dep with required=False survives save/load."""
   128	        store = make_store(tmp_path)
   129	        pack = make_lora_pack("roundtrip-lora")
   130	        store.layout.save_pack(pack)
   131	
   132	        loaded = store.get_pack("roundtrip-lora")
   133	        base_dep = loaded.get_dependency("base_checkpoint")
   134	        assert base_dep is not None
   135	        assert base_dep.required is False
   136	        assert base_dep.selector.strategy == SelectorStrategy.BASE_MODEL_HINT
   137	        assert base_dep.selector.base_model == "SDXL"
   138	
   139	    def test_set_base_model_removes_old_and_sets_new(self, tmp_path):
   140	        """set-base-model logic: remove old BASE_MODEL_HINT, set new one."""
   141	        store = make_store(tmp_path)
   142	
   143	        # Pack with base_checkpoint (BASE_MODEL_HINT) + main_lora + an extra checkpoint
   144	        pack = make_lora_pack("set-base-test")
   145	        extra_checkpoint = PackDependency(
   146	            id="my_checkpoint",
   147	            kind=AssetKind.CHECKPOINT,
   148	            required=True,
   149	            selector=DependencySelector(
   150	                strategy=SelectorStrategy.CIVITAI_FILE,
   151	                civitai=CivitaiSelector(model_id=999, version_id=888, file_id=777),
   152	            ),
   153	            update_policy=UpdatePolicy(),
   154	            expose=ExposeConfig(filename="my_checkpoint.safetensors"),
   155	        )
   156	        pack.dependencies.append(extra_checkpoint)
   157	        store.layout.save_pack(pack)
   158	
   159	        # Simulate set-base-model endpoint logic
   160	        loaded = store.get_pack("set-base-test")
   161	        target_dep = loaded.get_dependency("my_checkpoint")
   162	        assert target_dep is not None
   163	
   164	        # Remove old BASE_MODEL_HINT deps (except the target)
   165	        loaded.dependencies = [
   166	            d for d in loaded.dependencies
   167	            if d.id == "my_checkpoint" or d.selector.strategy != SelectorStrategy.BASE_MODEL_HINT
   168	        ]
   169	        # Set target as new base model
   170	        target_dep.selector.strategy = SelectorStrategy.BASE_MODEL_HINT
   171	        target_dep.selector.base_model = loaded.base_model
   172	        store.layout.save_pack(loaded)
   173	
   174	        # Verify
   175	        result = store.get_pack("set-base-test")
   176	        base_hints = [
   177	            d for d in result.dependencies
   178	            if d.selector.strategy == SelectorStrategy.BASE_MODEL_HINT
   179	        ]
   180	        assert len(base_hints) == 1
   181	        assert base_hints[0].id == "my_checkpoint"
   182	        assert base_hints[0].selector.base_model == "SDXL"
   183	        # Old base_checkpoint should be gone
   184	        assert result.get_dependency("base_checkpoint") is None
   185	
   186	    def test_asset_info_fields_from_dependencies(self, tmp_path):
   187	        """Verify required and is_base_model are derivable from pack deps."""
   188	        store = make_store(tmp_path)
   189	        pack = make_lora_pack("info-test")
   190	        store.layout.save_pack(pack)
   191	
   192	        loaded = store.get_pack("info-test")
   193	        for dep in loaded.dependencies:
   194	            asset_info = {
   195	                "name": dep.id,
   196	                "asset_type": dep.kind.value,
   197	                "required": dep.required,
   198	                "is_base_model": dep.selector.strategy == SelectorStrategy.BASE_MODEL_HINT,
   199	            }
   200	            if dep.id == "base_checkpoint":
   201	                assert asset_info["required"] is False
   202	                assert asset_info["is_base_model"] is True
   203	            elif dep.id == "main_lora":
   204	                assert asset_info["required"] is True
   205	                assert asset_info["is_base_model"] is False
   206	
   207	    def test_delete_base_model_dep(self, tmp_path):
   208	        """Deleting the base model dependency works (no restrictions)."""
   209	        store = make_store(tmp_path)
   210	        pack = make_lora_pack("delete-base-test")
   211	        store.layout.save_pack(pack)
   212	
   213	        loaded = store.get_pack("delete-base-test")
   214	        loaded.dependencies = [
   215	            d for d in loaded.dependencies if d.id != "base_checkpoint"
   216	        ]
   217	        store.layout.save_pack(loaded)
   218	
   219	        result = store.get_pack("delete-base-test")
   220	        assert result.get_dependency("base_checkpoint") is None

   221	        tree = _build_tree_via_store(store, "pack-a")

   227	
   228	    def test_single_child(self, tmp_path):
   229	        """Pack with one dependency produces one child."""
   230	        store = _make_store(tmp_path)
   231	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("pack-a", pack_deps=[PackDependencyRef(pack_name="pack-b")]))
   232	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("pack-b"))
   233	
   234	        tree = _build_tree_via_store(store, "pack-a")
   235	        assert len(tree["children"]) == 1
   236	        assert tree["children"][0]["pack_name"] == "pack-b"
   237	        assert tree["children"][0]["installed"] is True
   238	        assert tree["children"][0]["depth"] == 1
   239	
   240	    def test_missing_child(self, tmp_path):
   241	        """Pack depending on non-existent pack shows not installed."""
   242	        store = _make_store(tmp_path)
   243	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("pack-a", pack_deps=[PackDependencyRef(pack_name="missing")]))
   244	
   245	        tree = _build_tree_via_store(store, "pack-a")
   246	        assert len(tree["children"]) == 1
   247	        child = tree["children"][0]
   248	        assert child["pack_name"] == "missing"
   249	        assert child["installed"] is False
   250	        assert child["circular"] is False
   251	
   252	    def test_multiple_children(self, tmp_path):
   253	        """Pack with multiple dependencies."""
   254	        store = _make_store(tmp_path)
   255	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("pack-a", pack_deps=[
   256	            PackDependencyRef(pack_name="pack-b"),
   257	            PackDependencyRef(pack_name="pack-c"),
   258	        ]))
   259	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("pack-b"))
   260	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("pack-c"))
   261	
   262	        tree = _build_tree_via_store(store, "pack-a")
   263	        assert len(tree["children"]) == 2
   264	        names = [c["pack_name"] for c in tree["children"]]
   265	        assert "pack-b" in names
   266	        assert "pack-c" in names
   267	
   268	    def test_circular_a_b_a(self, tmp_path):
   269	        """Circular dependency A->B->A is detected."""
   270	        store = _make_store(tmp_path)
   271	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("pack-a", pack_deps=[PackDependencyRef(pack_name="pack-b")]))
   272	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("pack-b", pack_deps=[PackDependencyRef(pack_name="pack-a")]))
   273	
   274	        tree = _build_tree_via_store(store, "pack-a")
   275	        assert len(tree["children"]) == 1
   276	        child_b = tree["children"][0]
   277	        assert child_b["pack_name"] == "pack-b"
   278	        assert len(child_b["children"]) == 1
   279	        circular_a = child_b["children"][0]
   280	        assert circular_a["pack_name"] == "pack-a"
   281	        assert circular_a["circular"] is True
   282	
   283	    def test_circular_three_way(self, tmp_path):
   284	        """Three-way cycle A->B->C->A is detected."""
   285	        store = _make_store(tmp_path)
   286	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("a", pack_deps=[PackDependencyRef(pack_name="b")]))
   287	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("b", pack_deps=[PackDependencyRef(pack_name="c")]))
   288	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("c", pack_deps=[PackDependencyRef(pack_name="a")]))
   289	
   290	        tree = _build_tree_via_store(store, "a")
   291	        c_node = tree["children"][0]["children"][0]
   292	        assert c_node["pack_name"] == "c"
   293	        circular_a = c_node["children"][0]
   294	        assert circular_a["pack_name"] == "a"
   295	        assert circular_a["circular"] is True
   296	
   297	    def test_diamond_dependency(self, tmp_path):
   298	        """Diamond: A->B, A->C, B->D, C->D. D appears twice (not circular)."""
   299	        store = _make_store(tmp_path)
   300	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("a", pack_deps=[
   301	            PackDependencyRef(pack_name="b"),
   302	            PackDependencyRef(pack_name="c"),
   303	        ]))
   304	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("b", pack_deps=[PackDependencyRef(pack_name="d")]))
   305	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("c", pack_deps=[PackDependencyRef(pack_name="d")]))
   306	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("d"))
   307	
   308	        tree = _build_tree_via_store(store, "a")
   309	        # Both B and C should have D as child (not circular - per-branch visited)
   310	        b_node = next(c for c in tree["children"] if c["pack_name"] == "b")
   311	        c_node = next(c for c in tree["children"] if c["pack_name"] == "c")
   312	        assert len(b_node["children"]) == 1
   313	        assert b_node["children"][0]["pack_name"] == "d"
   314	        assert b_node["children"][0]["circular"] is False
   315	        assert len(c_node["children"]) == 1
   316	        assert c_node["children"][0]["pack_name"] == "d"
   317	        assert c_node["children"][0]["circular"] is False
   318	
   319	    def test_deep_chain(self, tmp_path):
   320	        """Deep chain A->B->C->D builds correctly."""
   321	        store = _make_store(tmp_path)
   322	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("a", pack_deps=[PackDependencyRef(pack_name="b")]))
   323	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("b", pack_deps=[PackDependencyRef(pack_name="c")]))
   324	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("c", pack_deps=[PackDependencyRef(pack_name="d")]))
   325	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("d"))
   326	
   327	        tree = _build_tree_via_store(store, "a")
   328	        assert tree["pack_name"] == "a"
   329	        assert tree["children"][0]["pack_name"] == "b"
   330	        assert tree["children"][0]["children"][0]["pack_name"] == "c"
   331	        assert tree["children"][0]["children"][0]["children"][0]["pack_name"] == "d"
   332	        assert tree["children"][0]["children"][0]["children"][0]["children"] == []
   333	
   334	    def test_max_depth_respected(self, tmp_path):
   335	        """Tree stops at max_depth."""
   336	        store = _make_store(tmp_path)
   337	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("a", pack_deps=[PackDependencyRef(pack_name="b")]))
   338	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("b", pack_deps=[PackDependencyRef(pack_name="c")]))
   339	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("c"))
   340	
   341	        tree = _build_tree_via_store(store, "a", max_depth=1)
   342	        assert tree["depth"] == 0
   343	        assert len(tree["children"]) == 1
   344	        child_b = tree["children"][0]
   345	        assert child_b["depth"] == 1
   346	        # pack-b has pack_dependencies but depth == max_depth so no recursion
   347	        assert child_b["children"] == []
   348	
   349	    def test_trigger_words_aggregated(self, tmp_path):
   350	        """Trigger words are aggregated from pack's asset dependencies."""
   351	        store = _make_store(tmp_path)
   352	        store.layout.save_pack(_make_pack("pack-a", deps=[
   353	            _make_dep("lora1", trigger_words=["word1", "word2"]),
   354	            _make_dep("lora2", trigger_words=["word3"]),
   355	            _make_dep("checkpoint", kind=AssetKind.CHECKPOINT),
   356	        ]))
   357	
   358	        tree = _build_tree_via_store(store, "pack-a")
   359	        assert tree["trigger_words"] == ["word1", "word2", "word3"]
   360	        assert tree["asset_count"] == 3

  2455	def _get_import_executor():
  2456	    """Get or create import thread pool (max 2 concurrent imports)."""
  2457	    global _import_executor
  2458	    if _import_executor is None:
  2459	        from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor
  2460	        _import_executor = ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=MAX_CONCURRENT_IMPORTS, thread_name_prefix="import")
  2461	    return _import_executor
  2462	
  2463	
  2464	def _cleanup_old_imports():
  2465	    """Remove old completed/failed imports to prevent memory leak."""
  2466	    if len(_active_imports) <= MAX_IMPORT_HISTORY:
  2467	        return
  2468	    completed = [
  2469	        (k, v) for k, v in _active_imports.items()
  2470	        if v.get("status") in ("completed", "failed")
  2471	    ]
  2472	    completed.sort(key=lambda x: x[1].get("_finished_at", 0))
  2473	    to_remove = len(_active_imports) - MAX_IMPORT_HISTORY
  2474	    for k, _ in completed[:to_remove]:
  2475	        del _active_imports[k]

  2502	@v2_packs_router.get("/{pack_name}/recommend-local")
  2503	def recommend_local_files(
  2504	    pack_name: str,
  2505	    dep_id: str = Query(...),
  2506	    directory: str = Query(...),
  2507	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  2508	):
  2509	    """Scan directory and recommend files matching a dependency."""
  2510	    from .models import AssetKind as AK
  2511	    pack = store.get_pack(pack_name)
  2512	    if not pack:
  2513	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"Pack not found: {pack_name}")
  2514	
  2515	    dep = None
  2516	    for d in pack.dependencies:
  2517	        if d.id == dep_id:
  2518	            dep = d
  2519	            break
  2520	    if not dep:
  2521	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"Dependency not found: {dep_id}")
  2522	
  2523	    kind = getattr(dep, "kind", None)
  2524	    recommendations = store.local_file_service.recommend(directory, dep, kind)
  2525	
  2526	    return {
  2527	        "recommendations": [
  2528	            {
  2529	                "file": {
  2530	                    "name": r.file.name,
  2531	                    "path": r.file.path,
  2532	                    "size": r.file.size,
  2533	                    "mtime": r.file.mtime,
  2534	                    "extension": r.file.extension,

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/**
     2	 * DependencyResolverModal
     3	 *
     4	 * Generic modal for resolving ANY dependency type (checkpoint, LoRA, VAE, etc.).
     5	 * Replaces BaseModelResolverModal for all non-base-model dependencies.
     6	 *
     7	 * Tabs:
     8	 * 1. Candidates — auto-suggested results from evidence providers
     9	 * 2. Preview Analysis — metadata from preview images (if available)
    10	 * 3. AI Resolve — AI-powered search (if avatar available)
    11	 * 4. Civitai — manual Civitai search
    12	 * 5. HuggingFace — manual HF search (only for eligible kinds)
    13	 *
    14	 * Design follows BaseModelResolverModal aesthetic:
    15	 * - Dark theme with synapse accent
    16	 * - Rounded cards with selection state
    17	 * - Loading spinners, empty states
    18	 */
    19	
    20	import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react'
    21	import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'
    22	import {
    23	  X,
    24	  Loader2,
    25	  Check,
    26	  Search,
    27	  Sparkles,
    28	  Image,
    29	  Globe,
    30	  Database,
    31	  AlertTriangle,
    32	  ChevronDown,
    33	  ChevronRight,
    34	  Shield,
    35	  ShieldCheck,
    36	  ShieldQuestion,
    37	  ShieldAlert,
    38	  Download,
    39	  Info,
    40	  HardDrive,
    41	} from 'lucide-react'
    42	import { clsx } from 'clsx'
    43	import { Button } from '@/components/ui/Button'
    44	import type {
    45	  AssetType,
    46	  ResolutionCandidate,
    47	  SuggestResult,
    48	  SuggestOptions,
    49	  EvidenceGroupInfo,
    50	  ConfidenceLevel,
    51	} from '../types'
    52	import { HF_ELIGIBLE_KINDS } from '../types'
    53	import { ANIMATION_PRESETS } from '../constants'
    54	import { PreviewAnalysisTab } from './PreviewAnalysisTab'
    55	import { LocalResolveTab } from './LocalResolveTab'
    56	
    57	// =============================================================================
    58	// Types
    59	// =============================================================================
    60	
    61	type ResolverTab = 'candidates' | 'preview' | 'local' | 'ai-resolve' | 'civitai' | 'huggingface'
    62	
    63	export interface DependencyResolverModalProps {
    64	  isOpen: boolean
    65	  onClose: () => void
    66	  packName: string
    67	  depId: string
    68	  depName: string
    69	  kind: AssetType
    70	  baseModelHint?: string
    71	
    72	  // Candidates from suggest
    73	  candidates: ResolutionCandidate[]
    74	  isSuggesting: boolean
    75	  requestId?: string
    76	
    77	  // Actions
    78	  onSuggest: (options?: SuggestOptions) => Promise<SuggestResult>
    79	  onApply: (candidateId: string) => void
    80	  onApplyAndDownload: (candidateId: string) => void
    81	  isApplying: boolean
    82	
    83	  // Avatar
    84	  avatarAvailable: boolean
    85	}
    86	
    87	// =============================================================================
    88	// Helpers
    89	// =============================================================================
    90	
    91	function getConfidenceLevel(candidate: ResolutionCandidate): ConfidenceLevel {
    92	  if (candidate.tier === 1) return 'exact'
    93	  if (candidate.tier === 2) return 'high'
    94	  if (candidate.tier === 3) return 'possible'
    95	  return 'hint'
    96	}
    97	
    98	const CONFIDENCE_DISPLAY: Record<
    99	  ConfidenceLevel,
   100	  { icon: typeof ShieldCheck; label: string; color: string; bg: string }
   101	> = {
   102	  exact: {
   103	    icon: ShieldCheck,
   104	    label: 'Exact match',
   105	    color: 'text-green-400',
   106	    bg: 'bg-green-500/15',
   107	  },
   108	  high: {
   109	    icon: Shield,
   110	    label: 'High confidence',
   111	    color: 'text-blue-400',
   112	    bg: 'bg-blue-500/15',
   113	  },
   114	  possible: {
   115	    icon: ShieldQuestion,
   116	    label: 'Possible match',
   117	    color: 'text-amber-400',
   118	    bg: 'bg-amber-500/15',
   119	  },
   120	  hint: {
   121	    icon: ShieldAlert,
   122	    label: 'Hint — verify',
   123	    color: 'text-text-muted',
   124	    bg: 'bg-slate-mid/30',
   125	  },
   126	}
   127	
   128	function getDefaultTab(
   129	  candidates: ResolutionCandidate[],
   130	  avatarAvailable: boolean,
   131	): ResolverTab {
   132	  if (candidates.some((c) => c.tier <= 2)) return 'candidates'
   133	  if (candidates.length === 0) return 'candidates'
   134	  if (avatarAvailable) return 'ai-resolve'
   135	  return 'candidates'
   136	}
   137	
   138	// =============================================================================
   139	// Sub-components
   140	// =============================================================================
   141	
   142	interface TabDef {
   143	  id: ResolverTab
   144	  label: string
   145	  icon: React.ReactNode
   146	  visible: boolean
   147	}
   148	
   149	function TabButton({
   150	  tab,
   151	  currentTab,
   152	  onClick,
   153	  icon,
   154	  label,
   155	  badge,
   156	}: {
   157	  tab: ResolverTab
   158	  currentTab: ResolverTab
   159	  onClick: () => void
   160	  icon: React.ReactNode
   161	  label: string
   162	  badge?: number
   163	}) {
   164	  const isActive = tab === currentTab
   165	
   166	  return (
   167	    <button
   168	      onClick={onClick}
   169	      className={clsx(
   170	        'flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-3 px-3',
   171	        'transition-all duration-200 font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap',
   172	        isActive
   173	          ? 'text-synapse border-b-2 border-synapse bg-synapse/10'
   174	          : 'text-text-muted hover:text-text-primary hover:bg-slate-mid/30'
   175	      )}
   176	    >
   177	      {icon}
   178	      {label}
   179	      {badge !== undefined && badge > 0 && (
   180	        <span
   181	          className={clsx(
   182	            'ml-1 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold',
   183	            isActive ? 'bg-synapse/20 text-synapse' : 'bg-slate-mid text-text-muted'
   184	          )}
   185	        >
   186	          {badge}
   187	        </span>
   188	      )}
   189	    </button>
   190	  )
   191	}
   192	
   193	function CandidateCard({
   194	  candidate,
   195	  isSelected,
   196	  onSelect,
   197	  isExpanded,
   198	  onToggleExpand,
   199	}: {
   200	  candidate: ResolutionCandidate
   201	  isSelected: boolean
   202	  onSelect: () => void
   203	  isExpanded: boolean
   204	  onToggleExpand: () => void
   205	}) {
   206	  const level = getConfidenceLevel(candidate)
   207	  const display = CONFIDENCE_DISPLAY[level]
   208	  const IconComponent = display.icon
   209	
   210	  return (
   211	    <div
   212	      className={clsx(
   213	        'rounded-xl overflow-hidden transition-all duration-200',
   214	        isSelected
   215	          ? 'bg-synapse/20 border-2 border-synapse'
   216	          : 'bg-slate-dark border border-slate-mid hover:border-slate-mid/80'
   217	      )}
   218	    >
   219	      <div role="button" tabIndex={0} onClick={onSelect} onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') onSelect() }} className="w-full text-left p-4 cursor-pointer">
   220	        <div className="flex items-start gap-3">

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/**
     2	 * usePackEdit Hook
     3	 *
     4	 * Manages pack edit mode state including:
     5	 * - Edit mode toggle (global and per-section)
     6	 * - Unsaved changes tracking
     7	 * - Field-level state management
     8	 * - Save/discard operations
     9	 *
    10	 * PHILOSOPHY:
    11	 * - Single source of truth for edit state
    12	 * - Optimistic updates with rollback on error
    13	 * - Warn before losing unsaved changes
    14	 */
    15	
    16	import { useState, useCallback, useRef, useEffect } from 'react'
    17	import type { PackDetail, PackSection, ValidationResult } from '../types'
    18	
    19	// =============================================================================
    20	// Types
    21	// =============================================================================
    22	
    23	export interface FieldChange {
    24	  path: string
    25	  oldValue: unknown
    26	  newValue: unknown
    27	  timestamp: number
    28	}
    29	
    30	export interface UsePackEditOptions {
    31	  /**
    32	   * Initial pack data for comparison
    33	   */
    34	  initialPack?: PackDetail
    35	
    36	  /**
    37	   * Callback when save is triggered
    38	   */
    39	  onSave?: (changes: Partial<PackDetail>) => Promise<void>
    40	
    41	  /**
    42	   * Callback when edit mode changes
    43	   */
    44	  onEditModeChange?: (isEditing: boolean) => void
    45	
    46	  /**
    47	   * Custom validation function
    48	   */
    49	  validate?: (changes: Partial<PackDetail>) => ValidationResult
    50	
    51	  /**
    52	   * Auto-save interval in ms (0 = disabled)
    53	   */
    54	  autoSaveInterval?: number
    55	}
    56	
    57	export interface UsePackEditReturn {
    58	  // State
    59	  isEditing: boolean
    60	  isGlobalEdit: boolean
    61	  editingSection: PackSection | null
    62	  hasUnsavedChanges: boolean
    63	  isSaving: boolean
    64	  saveError: string | null
    65	
    66	  // Pending changes
    67	  pendingChanges: Partial<PackDetail>
    68	  changeHistory: FieldChange[]
    69	
    70	  // Actions
    71	  startEditing: (section?: PackSection) => void
    72	  stopEditing: () => void
    73	  saveChanges: () => Promise<boolean>
    74	  discardChanges: () => void
    75	
    76	  // Field-level operations
    77	  setFieldValue: <T>(path: string, value: T) => void
    78	  getFieldValue: <T>(path: string, defaultValue?: T) => T
    79	  getFieldError: (path: string) => string | null
    80	  hasFieldChanged: (path: string) => boolean
    81	
    82	  // Validation
    83	  errors: Record<string, string>
    84	  isValid: boolean
    85	  validateAll: () => ValidationResult
    86	}
    87	
    88	// =============================================================================
    89	// Utility Functions
    90	// =============================================================================
    91	
    92	/**
    93	 * Get nested value from object by dot-notation path
    94	 */
    95	function getNestedValue<T>(obj: Record<string, unknown>, path: string, defaultValue?: T): T {
    96	  const keys = path.split('.')
    97	  let current: unknown = obj
    98	
    99	  for (const key of keys) {
   100	    if (current === null || current === undefined) {
   101	      return defaultValue as T
   102	    }
   103	    current = (current as Record<string, unknown>)[key]
   104	  }
   105	
   106	  return (current ?? defaultValue) as T
   107	}
   108	
   109	/**
   110	 * Set nested value in object by dot-notation path (immutable)
   111	 */
   112	function setNestedValue<T extends Record<string, unknown>>(
   113	  obj: T,
   114	  path: string,
   115	  value: unknown
   116	): T {
   117	  const keys = path.split('.')
   118	  const result = { ...obj }
   119	  let current: Record<string, unknown> = result
   120	
   121	  for (let i = 0; i < keys.length - 1; i++) {
   122	    const key = keys[i]
   123	    current[key] = { ...(current[key] as Record<string, unknown> || {}) }
   124	    current = current[key] as Record<string, unknown>
   125	  }
   126	
   127	  current[keys[keys.length - 1]] = value
   128	  return result as T
   129	}
   130	
   131	/**
   132	 * Deep compare two values
   133	 */
   134	function deepEqual(a: unknown, b: unknown): boolean {
   135	  if (a === b) return true
   136	  if (a === null || b === null) return a === b
   137	  if (typeof a !== typeof b) return false
   138	  if (typeof a !== 'object') return a === b
   139	
   140	  const aObj = a as Record<string, unknown>
   141	  const bObj = b as Record<string, unknown>
   142	
   143	  const aKeys = Object.keys(aObj)
   144	  const bKeys = Object.keys(bObj)
   145	
   146	  if (aKeys.length !== bKeys.length) return false
   147	
   148	  return aKeys.every(key => deepEqual(aObj[key], bObj[key]))
   149	}
   150	
   151	// =============================================================================
   152	// Main Hook
   153	// =============================================================================
   154	
   155	export function usePackEdit(options: UsePackEditOptions = {}): UsePackEditReturn {
   156	  const {
   157	    initialPack,
   158	    onSave,
   159	    onEditModeChange,
   160	    validate,
   161	    autoSaveInterval = 0,
   162	  } = options
   163	
   164	  // Core state
   165	  const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false)
   166	  const [editingSection, setEditingSection] = useState<PackSection | null>(null)
   167	  const [pendingChanges, setPendingChanges] = useState<Partial<PackDetail>>({})
   168	  const [changeHistory, setChangeHistory] = useState<FieldChange[]>([])
   169	  const [errors, setErrors] = useState<Record<string, string>>({})
   170	  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false)
   171	  const [saveError, setSaveError] = useState<string | null>(null)
   172	
   173	  // Refs for comparison
   174	  const initialPackRef = useRef<PackDetail | undefined>(initialPack)
   175	  const autoSaveTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null)
   176	
   177	  // Update initial pack ref when it changes
   178	  useEffect(() => {
   179	    if (initialPack && !isEditing) {
   180	      initialPackRef.current = initialPack
   181	    }
   182	  }, [initialPack, isEditing])
   183	
   184	  // Computed values
   185	  const hasUnsavedChanges = Object.keys(pendingChanges).length > 0
   186	  const isGlobalEdit = isEditing && editingSection === null
   187	
   188	  // Validation
   189	  const validateAll = useCallback((): ValidationResult => {
   190	    if (validate) {
   191	      return validate(pendingChanges)
   192	    }
   193	    // Default validation - always valid
   194	    return { valid: true, errors: {} }
   195	  }, [pendingChanges, validate])
   196	
   197	  const isValid = Object.keys(errors).length === 0
   198	
   199	  // Auto-save logic
   200	  useEffect(() => {
   201	    if (autoSaveInterval > 0 && hasUnsavedChanges && isEditing) {
   202	      if (autoSaveTimerRef.current) {
   203	        clearTimeout(autoSaveTimerRef.current)
   204	      }
   205	      autoSaveTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
   206	        // Auto-save would go here
   207	      }, autoSaveInterval)
   208	    }
   209	
   210	    return () => {
   211	      if (autoSaveTimerRef.current) {
   212	        clearTimeout(autoSaveTimerRef.current)
   213	      }
   214	    }
   215	  }, [autoSaveInterval, hasUnsavedChanges, isEditing])
   216	
   217	  // Start editing
   218	  const startEditing = useCallback((section?: PackSection) => {
   219	    setIsEditing(true)
   220	    setEditingSection(section || null)
   221	    setSaveError(null)
   222	    onEditModeChange?.(true)
   223	  }, [onEditModeChange])
   224	
   225	  // Stop editing (without saving)
   226	  const stopEditing = useCallback(() => {
   227	    setIsEditing(false)
   228	    setEditingSection(null)
   229	    onEditModeChange?.(false)
   230	  }, [onEditModeChange])
   231	
   232	  // Save changes
   233	  const saveChanges = useCallback(async (): Promise<boolean> => {
   234	    if (!hasUnsavedChanges) {
   235	      stopEditing()
   236	      return true
   237	    }
   238	
   239	    // Validate before saving
   240	    const validation = validateAll()

   304	// =============================================================================
   305	// Main Component
   306	// =============================================================================
   307	
   308	export function PackInfoSection({ pack, onEditDescription, animationDelay = 0 }: PackInfoSectionProps) {
   309	  const hasTriggerWords = pack.model_info?.trigger_words && pack.model_info.trigger_words.length > 0
   310	  const hasModelInfo = !!pack.model_info
   311	  const hasDescription = !!pack.description
   312	
   313	  // Return null if no content
   314	  if (!hasTriggerWords && !hasModelInfo && !hasDescription) {
   315	    return null
   316	  }
   317	
   318	  // Stagger delays for each card
   319	  const delays = {
   320	    triggerWords: animationDelay,
   321	    modelInfo: animationDelay + 50,
   322	    description: animationDelay + 100,
   323	  }
   324	
   325	  return (
   326	    <div className="space-y-4">
   327	      {/* Trigger Words */}
   328	      {hasTriggerWords && (
   329	        <TriggerWordsCard
   330	          triggerWords={pack.model_info!.trigger_words}
   331	          animationDelay={delays.triggerWords}
   332	        />
   333	      )}
   334	
   335	      {/* Model Info */}
   336	      {hasModelInfo && (
   337	        <ModelInfoCard
   338	          modelInfo={pack.model_info!}
   339	          animationDelay={delays.modelInfo}
   340	        />
   341	      )}
   342	
   343	      {/* Description */}
   344	      {hasDescription && (
   345	        <DescriptionCard
   346	          description={pack.description!}
   347	          animationDelay={delays.description}
   348	          onEdit={onEditDescription}
   349	        />
   350	      )}
   351	    </div>
   352	  )
   353	}
   354	
   355	export default PackInfoSection

**Custom Pack Audit**

Scope: current `main` workspace, with cross-check against `feat/resolve-model-redesign` where relevant. No files were changed and I did not run the test suite.

**Executive Summary**

- Custom Pack creation exists and correctly creates `PackCategory.CUSTOM`.
- The backend model is ready for custom packs: local source, dependencies, pack dependencies, parameters, workflows, previews.
- The active UI is only partially wired.
- The biggest Release 1 gap is dependency authoring: there is no working generic “add model dependency” flow.
- Pack-to-pack dependencies have backend CRUD, but the UI controls are effectively hidden because edit mode is not wired.
- Description and gallery editing exist, but blank custom packs cannot access the first-add affordance from detail.
- Profile integration works for direct pack assets, but does not recursively include `pack_dependencies`.
- Export/import of a custom pack archive was not found.
- Update handling is undefined for custom packs: backend can update follow-latest Civitai deps, UI disables updates for CustomPlugin.
- The spec marks several things complete that are implemented as scaffolding or dead/unreachable UI.

**1. Creation**

- `PackCategory.CUSTOM` is defined as the locally-created, fully-editable category.
- Ref: `src/store/models.py:78`.
- The main `Pack` model has `pack_category`, `source`, `dependencies`, `pack_dependencies`, `parameters`, and `workflows`.
- Refs: `src/store/models.py:837`, `src/store/models.py:842`, `src/store/models.py:843`, `src/store/models.py:844`, `src/store/models.py:845`, `src/store/models.py:870`, `src/store/models.py:875`.

- A Create Pack button exists on the packs page.
- Refs: `apps/web/src/components/modules/PacksPage.tsx:244`, `apps/web/src/components/modules/PacksPage.tsx:461`.

- The frontend create mutation posts to `/api/packs/create`.
- Ref: `apps/web/src/components/modules/PacksPage.tsx:108`.

- On success, it invalidates and navigates to `/packs/{name}`.
- Ref: `apps/web/src/components/modules/PacksPage.tsx:125`.

- Backend creation endpoint exists.
- Ref: `src/store/api.py:3275`.

- `CreatePackRequest` supports name, pack type, description, base model, version, author, tags, user tags, and trigger words.
- Ref: `src/store/api.py:3262`.

- The backend creates a `Pack` with `pack_category=PackCategory.CUSTOM`.
- Ref: `src/store/api.py:3313`.

- The backend sets `source.provider=ProviderName.LOCAL`.
- Ref: `src/store/api.py:3315`.

- It saves the pack through `store.layout.save_pack(pack)`, so it produces `pack.json`.
- Ref: `src/store/api.py:3331`.

- It creates preview and workflow directories.
- Refs: `src/store/api.py:3335`, `src/store/api.py:3336`.

- This is a valid Custom Pack creation path.

- Creation gap: the wizard only creates metadata and directories.
- It does not let the user add initial dependencies, local files, Civitai files, HF files, pack dependencies, previews, or workflows.

- Creation gap: pack type choices are limited.
- The modal type options include only the listed values around `apps/web/src/components/modules/pack-detail/modals/CreatePackModal.tsx:75`.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: whether Release 1 requires every `AssetKind`; current choices omit some model kinds in the backend enum.

- Creation gap: validation is minimal.
- Frontend only checks `name.trim().length > 0`.
- Ref: `apps/web/src/components/modules/pack-detail/modals/CreatePackModal.tsx:194`.

- Creation gap: custom pack is not automatically added to the global profile.
- Civitai import has an `add_to_global` path in `Store.import_civitai`; custom create endpoint does not.
- Ref for create save-only path: `src/store/api.py:3331`.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: desired product behavior after creation.

**2. Editing**

- Backend patch endpoint exists.
- Ref: `src/store/api.py:3355`.

- `UpdatePackRequest` supports partial metadata updates.
- Ref: `src/store/api.py:3245`.

- Backend supports updating description, tags, cover URL, author, version, trigger words, base model, and user tags.
- Refs: `src/store/api.py:3365`, `src/store/api.py:3388`, `src/store/api.py:3413`.

- Backend supports rename by moving the pack directory and saving.
- Refs: `src/store/api.py:3413`, `src/store/api.py:3434`.

- Frontend generic `usePackData.updatePack` is typed only as `{ user_tags: string[] }`.
- Ref: `apps/web/src/components/modules/pack-detail/hooks/usePackData.ts:48`.

- The mutation itself could send any JSON at runtime, but the public hook contract narrows it to user tags.
- Ref: `apps/web/src/components/modules/pack-detail/hooks/usePackData.ts:247`.

- `usePackEdit` exists and can track edits.
- Refs: `apps/web/src/components/modules/pack-detail/hooks/usePackEdit.ts:155`, `apps/web/src/components/modules/pack-detail/hooks/usePackEdit.ts:217`, `apps/web/src/components/modules/pack-detail/hooks/usePackEdit.ts:233`.

- But PackDetailPage intentionally does not pass `onStartEdit` into `PackHeader`.
- Ref: `apps/web/src/components/modules/PackDetailPage.tsx:309`.

- Therefore header/global edit mode is not reachable from the active page.
- Ref: `apps/web/src/components/modules/PackDetailPage.tsx:315`.

- Name edit:
- Backend supports rename.
- Ref: `src/store/api.py:3413`.
- Active UI does not expose name editing.
- The active `EditPackModal` is only used for user tags.
- Ref: `apps/web/src/components/modules/PackDetailPage.tsx:467`.
- Missing for Release 1.

- Description edit:
- Backend supports description patch.
- Ref: `src/store/api.py:3373`.
- UI has `DescriptionEditorModal`.
- Ref: `apps/web/src/components/modules/PackDetailPage.tsx:570`.
- UI opens it via `PackInfoSection` when metadata editing is allowed.
- Ref: `apps/web/src/components/modules/PackDetailPage.tsx:340`.

- Description gap:
- `PackInfoSection` returns `null` if there are no trigger words, model info, or description.
- Ref: `apps/web/src/components/modules/pack-detail/sections/PackInfoSection.tsx:313`.
- A custom pack created with blank description has no visible section and no edit button to add the first description.

- Gallery edit:
- Backend supports batch preview update.
- Ref: `src/store/api.py:3682`.
- Backend supports preview upload.
- Ref: `src/store/api.py:3794`.
- Backend supports ordering, cover selection, and delete.
- Refs: `src/store/api.py:3905`, `src/store/api.py:3947`, `src/store/api.py:3985`.

- UI has `EditPreviewsModal`.
- Ref: `apps/web/src/components/modules/PackDetailPage.tsx:526`.

- Gallery gap:
- `PackGallery` only renders when `pack.previews.length > 0`.
- Ref: `apps/web/src/components/modules/PackDetailPage.tsx:327`.
- A new custom pack with zero previews has no gallery section and no “add first preview” affordance.

- Model dependencies:
- Backend model supports Civitai, HF, local, URL, and base model selectors.
- Refs: `src/store/models.py:374`, `src/store/models.py:406`.

- Backend has resolvers for those strategies.
- Refs: `src/store/dependency_resolver.py:50`, `src/store/dependency_resolver.py:270`, `src/store/dependency_resolver.py:299`, `src/store/dependency_resolver.py:316`.

- Active main branch does not expose a generic POST/PATCH endpoint to add a `PackDependency`.
- I found delete-resource and set-base-model endpoints, but not dependency CRUD for model dependencies.
- Refs: `src/store/api.py:2837`, `src/store/api.py:2903`.

- UI has `EditDependenciesModal`, but it is not imported/rendered by `PackDetailPage`.
- Refs: `apps/web/src/components/modules/pack-detail/modals/EditDependenciesModal.tsx:2`, `apps/web/src/components/modules/PackDetailPage.tsx:34`.

- The active dependencies section has download, resolve, restore, delete-resource, and base-model actions, but no add/edit dependency action.
- Ref: `apps/web/src/components/modules/pack-detail/sections/PackDependenciesSection.tsx:637`.

- Dependency empty state only says no dependencies.
- Ref: `apps/web/src/components/modules/pack-detail/sections/PackDependenciesSection.tsx:713`.

- Delete dependency gap:
- `deleteResource` can remove a dependency only if `delete_dependency=true`.
- Ref: `src/store/api.py:2837`.
- The active UI’s dependency action path is resource-oriented and the text says the dependency remains.
- Ref: `apps/web/src/i18n/locales/en.json:81`.

- pack_dependencies:
- Backend model exists.
- Ref: `src/store/models.py:438`.

- Backend CRUD exists.
- Refs: `src/store/api.py:2963`, `src/store/api.py:3036`, `src/store/api.py:3080`.

- Backend dependency tree exists.
- Ref: `src/store/api.py:3116`.

- UI section exists.
- Ref: `apps/web/src/components/modules/pack-detail/sections/PackDepsSection.tsx:418`.

- UI add/remove controls are gated on `isEditing`.
- Refs: `apps/web/src/components/modules/pack-detail/sections/PackDepsSection.tsx:528`, `apps/web/src/components/modules/pack-detail/sections/PackDepsSection.tsx:585`.

- Since edit mode is not reachable from PackDetailPage, pack dependency management is effectively unreachable.
- Ref: `apps/web/src/components/modules/PackDetailPage.tsx:309`.

- `version_constraint` exists in the model.
- Ref: `src/store/models.py:452`.
- Add endpoint only takes `pack_name` and `required`.
- Ref: `src/store/api.py:3059`.
- Add modal only exposes required/optional.
- Ref: `apps/web/src/components/modules/pack-detail/modals/AddPackDependencyModal.tsx:210`.

- pack_dependencies gap:
- POST add checks duplicate/self-reference but does not verify the target pack exists before adding.
- Refs: `src/store/api.py:3051`, `src/store/api.py:3059`.
- Missing target is represented later in status/tree.
- Refs: `src/store/api.py:2976`, `tests/store/test_dependency_tree.py:240`.

- Parameters:
- Backend GET/PATCH exists.
- Refs: `src/store/api.py:3453`, `src/store/api.py:3492`.

- Parameters persist in `pack.parameters`.
- Refs: `src/store/api.py:3516`, `src/store/api.py:3524`.

- UI renders parameters and edit modal.
- Refs: `apps/web/src/components/modules/PackDetailPage.tsx:402`, `apps/web/src/components/modules/PackDetailPage.tsx:479`.

- Parameters look usable for Custom Pack Release 1.

- Workflows:
- Backend lists workflow files.
- Ref: `src/store/api.py:4044`.

- Backend generates a default workflow.
- Ref: `src/store/api.py:4068`.

- Backend upload-file exists.

- Backend delete workflow exists.
